name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Why we need to win in Georgia, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm really grateful you chose to open this email. Now, I have another request - **can you please read it all the way through?** I promise I'll keep it short.

Herschel Walker is competing against Democrat Raphael Warnock in a runoff election. For the short two years he's already been in the Senate, Warnock has been a rubber stamp for the radical Left's agenda. _Can you imagine the damage he would cause if elected to a full six-year term?_

Herschel's runoff is two weeks away, and he let me know he's worried he may not have the resources to keep up with his opponent - on TV, on volunteer recruitment, online, or even at the ballot box.

I'm reaching out because I'm hoping you will see how important Herschel's race is. **[I'm not asking for much, just $25 can make a difference in this tight race:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931728:JgiD-yGiN:m:1:3372576248:9B3A87C084C93E22A8CB82C77BCAE6CA:r "I’m not asking for much, just $10 can make a difference in this tight race:")**
---
| | | [SEND $25 TO HERSCHEL](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931728:JgiD-yGiN:m:1:3372576248:9B3A87C084C93E22A8CB82C77BCAE6CA:r "SEND $10 TO HERSCHEL")
---
We simply can't afford to fall short of his goal today. Herschel and I would both be thrilled to see you step up.

Thank you,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931728:JgiD-yGiN:m:1:3372576248:9B3A87C084C93E22A8CB82C77BCAE6CA:r "SMR Headshot")

Marco Rubio

* * *

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931729:JgiD-yGiN:m:1:3372576248:9B3A87C084C93E22A8CB82C77BCAE6CA:r "Join my fight
to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931729:JgiD-yGiN:m:1:3372576248:9B3A87C084C93E22A8CB82C77BCAE6CA:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931730:JgiD-yGiN:m:1:3372576248:9B3A87C084C93E22A8CB82C77BCAE6CA:r "Stop the Dems Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931730:JgiD-yGiN:m:1:3372576248:9B3A87C084C93E22A8CB82C77BCAE6CA:r "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need

Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0b3d1b8f2922483cb937f04129ae9d30&_e=E7VLIBLQjfVXjslDyZLJkwkLM86by2TCsF_K3kugDz2QPu243OrELxXPBi-Je8rOMdKFg9CaG38KlUoMrpwvMQAJtmcBcZAN4XXorHkIjyG5STy3FjbtY4BMJYyamcXl5m0Voschc_OKyaWF9tQs0OKWopYyxN2C1DHTWDRRNdHRBYhC8F8VM0K1AVdbqEMyOAyi7DH5kaZarCiBX934g5zblreeEEX5jYEtPk4olCnJlq4_Tu631fPSPfxDDEsEOvs6Nsh6-j7J1-SP2LP-KnW8mbX3K4lvGVnDwwZIxdREe-SgyASITe5veTIZyRFBWCo50hu_hWPfrGECmcq86YE6_8MYq0sw0BQSUZo4UYzlnZIpo7_J0z901027rcvQ4DcySylylB5w_8RUpqrYRjWz4TapWVFjGMsBeVWFW9JjBMdwkM5qO6-d6N-4-9AHa6fQiytOUE9lp8Ts-zgwVQ%3D%3D)**

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $5 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.

---

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

subject: So much is at stake

body:
| | |
---
**Friend, with early voting in our must-win runoff right around the corner, I needed to give you this time-sensitive update:**
* _**FIRST:**_ Election night results showed our people-powered campaign narrowly leading Herschel Walker – meaning we're primed to win.

* **_BUT THEN:_** National Republicans started _panicking_. Mitch McConnell's super PACs started launching nasty attack ads, and GOP donors flooded Walker's campaign with more than $37 million to defeat me.

* **_NOW:_** **We're running out of time to fight back against GOP attacks and mobilize the voters who will decide this race – but we're falling short of what we need to power our on-the-ground efforts.**

**So much is at stake. And if you know me, you know that I don't take a cent from corporate PACs. That's why I'm counting on you, friend, to chip in at this critical moment to help me fight back.**

Friend,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

name: Team AOC
subject: Show your support for the queer community today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221121-3637-header&t=1&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1)
We are heartbroken by the senseless violence and lives lost on Saturday night after a gunman opened fire with an AR-style rifle in an LGBTQ+ nightclub in Colorado Springs. Club Q, like so many queer spaces, was a refuge for LGBTQ+ people to escape the hateful rhetoric, discrimination, and violence often found outside its doors.
[While we continue the fight against bigotry and for gun safety, we're asking you to show your support for the queer community today by splitting a meaningful donation between two LGBTQ+ focused organizations — PFLAG National and Colectivo Intercultural TRANSgrediendo. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221121.jajl1c&refcode=em20221121-3637-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1)
**[Donate →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221121.jajl1c&refcode=em20221121-3637-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1)**
_100% of your donation will go directly to these organizations._
Here’s a bit more about them:
\- **PFLAG National** is a community of more than 350,000 members and supporters working to create a caring, just, and affirming world for LGBTQ+ people and those who love them. With hundreds of chapters across the country, PFLAG provides confidential peer support, education, and advocacy to LGBTQ+ people, their parents and families, and allies.
\- **Colectivo Intercultural TRANSgrediendo** , based in Queens, provides legal, medical, and psychosocial assistance to trans and non-binary people through the implementation of community and educational support programs.
This tragedy is only deepened as it came on the eve of Transgender Day of Remembrance, which was created to commemorate the lives of those lost to anti-transgender violence.1 Alexandria and Team AOC stand in solidarity with the transgender community and the entire LGBTQ+ community.
[100% of your donation will go directly to these organizations. Please chip in if you’re able to, and together we will continue to support our queer community today and always. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221121.jajl1c&refcode=em20221121-3637-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1)
With resolve,
Team AOC
* * *
1 - Transgender Day of Remembrance (TDOR) was started in 1999 by transgender advocate Gwendolyn Ann Smith as a vigil to honor the memory of Rita Hester, a transgender woman who was killed in 1998.
The vigil commemorated all the transgender people lost to violence since Rita Hester's death, and began an important tradition that has become the annual Transgender Day of Remembrance.

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221121?refcode=em20221121-3637-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=23&refcode2=3637_2526796_PgoCP1&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221121-3637-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=24&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3637%2E2526796%2EPgoCP1)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

This tragedy is only deepened as it came on the eve of Transgender Day of Remembrance, which was created to commemorate the lives of those lost to anti-transgender violence.1 Alexandria and Team AOC stand in solidarity with the transgender community and the entire LGBTQ+ community. With resolve, Team AOC 1 - Transgender Day of Remembrance (TDOR) was started in 1999 by transgender advocate Gwendolyn Ann Smith as a vigil to honor the memory of Rita Hester, a transgender woman who was killed in 1998. The vigil commemorated all the transgender people lost to violence since Rita Hester's death, and began an important tradition that has become the annual Transgender Day of Remembrance. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: San Francisco District Attorney Refuses to Release Details of Police Response to Assault of Paul Pelosi
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that the San Francisco district attorney refused to provide documents and video of the police activity at the home of Paul Pelosi, husband of the Speaker of the House, where David Wayne DePape was arrested following an alleged assault on October 28, 2022.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 21, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that the San Francisco district attorney refused to provide documents and video of the police activity at the home of Paul Pelosi, husband of the Speaker of the House, where David Wayne DePape was arrested following an alleged assault on October 28, 2022. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 21, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced recently that the San Francisco district attorney refused to provide documents and video of the police activity at the home of Paul Pelosi, husband of the Speaker of the House, where David Wayne DePape was arrested following an alleged assault on October 28, 2022. = ---|--- | | | | | In its appeal Judicial Watch points out that the lower court was mistaken when it upheld the FBI’s Glomar response (neither confirming nor denying the existence of records) because the FBI previously acknowledged the existence of the records in multiple ways. For instance, court records filed in support of a criminal case include the FBI’s statement of facts that provides the defendant’s address, which was obtained through “his Bank of America account and recent Expedia transactions.” ---|--- | | | | == | == The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and abuse of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to a report filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector General. == ---|--- | | | | = | = The records were obtained in response to a February 28, 2022, Judicial Watch Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request to the Defense Threat Reduction Agency for records regarding the funding of Black & Veatch involving work of any manner with biosafety laboratories in the country of Ukraine. = ---|--- | | | == Just the News Conservative watchdog Judicial Watch on Wednesday announced an appeal of a prior court decision permitting the FBI to withhold communications between the bureau and certain financial institutions related to purchases made in the D.C. area on Jan. 5-6, 2021. == == BizPac Review The Biden administration released guidance Thursday ensuring abortions for illegal migrant youth at the expense of American taxpayers, even if it means transferring them across state lines, allowing “predators to continue victimizing women and children.” == == New York Post The Federal Trade Commission can sanction shady corporate bait-and-switch tactics but it has no jurisdiction over fraudulent political payoffs. Judicial Watch’s Tom Fitton tweeted today: “Was Biden’s unlawful student debt scheme election interference?” Did Biden delay the announcement of student-loan bailout until close to the mid-term elections so it would not be overturned before purported beneficiaries expressed their gratitude with their ballots? == = = | CLIPS | = | | == | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931986:JbKodyGCN:m:1:3331421248:1D1BE84ECC3EC7C3A433C0550E9E419C:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931986:JbKodyGCN:m:1:3331421248:1D1BE84ECC3EC7C3A433C0550E9E419C:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931986:JbKodyGCN:m:1:3331421248:1D1BE84ECC3EC7C3A433C0550E9E419C:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931986:JbKodyGCN:m:1:3331421248:1D1BE84ECC3EC7C3A433C0550E9E419C:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

clean_body: | Peter, Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th. Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible. Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on. Today's Goal: Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters. How we win: By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th. We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want. I sincerely hope you'll answer the call. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. * Bonds have recorded worst year in history.
* The housing prices are falling for the first time in a decade.
* The FED hiked rates before year end to be at 4.25%.
* Inflation at 8.3%.
* Nuclear War at the table.Retirement account changes posing risk to your money.

**Only Gold and Silver** seem to withstand this economic winter due to its value preservation, tangibility and rarity. **[Get your Free Investment guide](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._X07w).**Acknowledging Nixon's istakes, Rep. Alex Mooney (R-WV) introduced bill HR9157 to congress to put the US back on a gold standard.Titled the Gold Standard Restoration Act, the legislation would peg the dollar to a fixed weight of gold."The gold standard would protect against Washington;s irreDctdible spending habits and the creation of money out of thin air," Rep. Mooney said in a statement. "Prices would be shaped by economics rather than the instincts of bureaucrats. No longer would our economy be at the mercy of the Federal Reserve and reckless Washington spenders."With bill HR9157 passing, Gold and Silver are expected to skyrocket. name: Tyler Lee
subject: I Can Still Represent You
body:
Good morning,

I want you to know that I am so appreciative of your prayers and support the past 18 months. Although the result didn't end the way we expected, it was an absolute honor to have been the Congressional nominee for district 12. The good news is that I'll still be just as involved representing the wonderful people of the Carolinas, just in a different capacity... _for now._

Prior to my political run, I was a full-time real estate investor. I sold all of my assets to run for Congress, so I'm currently rebuilding my life in the private sector. I'm very excited to share that I'm now a full-time realtor with Realty One Group Revolution in the Charlotte region!

I worked very hard to earn your vote, and if I can earn your business, I will work just as hard to represent you in your next home purchase or sale. Please keep me in mind for all of your future real estate needs, and feel free to pass along my information to anyone you may know in the market for a new home.

God bless you, and Happy Thanksgiving!

**Tyler Lee**

_Realty One Group - Revolution Charlotte_
704.412.1301
tyler@tylerleerealty.com
[www.tylerleerealty.com](http://url2320.myrealtyonegroup.com/ls/click?upn=jnBGs1lGpyP30fHYh6dZoffXI4gohKxdjEoTG7FOpyl2MZS5IL3sOQpYsHOVoshfjYbZ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjmVtQtXXc8NpGDAv0ZfT8sZxf6dhzMVoCdWy0cr60NxXZh22-2BSDP1uxmgHGQf-2FeGy-2Bczhp8jH4elCqKl-2Bs0e7fQCEAPlkVZ9ZVwgIlp-2BZa-2B1Xaxre2uroMeZqSdLR4i8DhLrADMOmScC0hZ041nhd8qVb2RgHJByNr9ufr4hmJMEYNvXBJIqmA-2FhYF8XVMik4-3D)

| | | Peter,

I'm really grateful you chose to open this email. Now, I have another request - **can you please read it all the way through?** I promise I'll keep it short.

Herschel Walker is competing against Democrat Raphael Warnock in a runoff election. For the short two years he's already been in the Senate, Warnock has been a rubber stamp for the radical Left's agenda. _Can you imagine the damage he would cause if elected to a full six-year term?_

Herschel's runoff is two weeks away, and he let me know he's worried he may not have the resources to keep up with his opponent - on TV, on volunteer recruitment, online, or even at the ballot box.

I'm reaching out because I'm hoping you will see how important Herschel's race is. **[I'm not asking for much, just $25 can make a difference in this tight race:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931999:JfH0dyGbN:m:1:3331421248:F76EAE2C474455920DA8BFA91CB9EBBC:r "I’m not asking for much, just $10 can make a difference in this tight race:")**

---
We simply can't afford to fall short of his goal today. Herschel and I would both be thrilled to see you step up.

Thank you,

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

subject: Our inalienable rights are at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Pledge to support the Second Amendment | Politicians like Joe Biden prioritize their political agenda over the rights...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931995:6WqjHyG5N:m:1:3331703221:2F3AB1FFA4A8E6B428F74A3B4A4E86AA:r)

Peter,

Politicians like Joe Biden prioritize their political agenda over the rights and safety of everyday Americans. _**Frankly, they don 't give a damn about your freedom or the rule of law.**_

They dare to blame, threaten, and punish law-abiding citizens for the rise in violent crime when violent criminals are roaming the streets with little punishment. But in turn, _Americans are buying firearms in record numbers to protect themselves and their families from harm._

_**In this crucial time when our inalienable rights are at risk, I am asking every patriotic American to officially pledge their support for the Second Amendment.**_

**[DO YOU PLEDGE TO SUPPORT THE 2ND AMENDMENT?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61931995:6WqjHyG5N:m:1:3331703221:2F3AB1FFA4A8E6B428F74A3B4A4E86AA:r)**

The NRA fights every day to stand between the American people and the radical politicians threatening to strip them of their rights. We are committed to protecting your rights, and I ask that you join us in the fight.

clean_body: Pledge to support the Second Amendment | Politicians like Joe Biden prioritize their political agenda over the rights... Peter, Politicians like Joe Biden prioritize their political agenda over the rights and safety of everyday Americans. Frankly, they don 't give a damn about your freedom or the rule of law. But in turn, Americans are buying firearms in record numbers to protect themselves and their families from harm. In this crucial time when our inalienable rights are at risk, I am asking every patriotic American to officially pledge their support for the Second Amendment. We are committed to protecting your rights, and I ask that you join us in the fight. name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I have a secret. Promise not to tell
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932109:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)

Hello Peter,

I have a secret to tell you -- just make sure to keep it from the radical Left.

Here it is: **America 's Future has spies inside their organizations. **

And we have people working behind enemy lines in companies like CNN, Google, and TikTok.

My name is Cindy Cerquitella, executive director at America's Future (AF). AF helps young professionals to become effective, lifelong advocates who inspire others to embrace freedom.

You see, America's Future members are young, liberty-minded professionals working to build a freer culture in America.

**And they need your support, Peter.** That's why I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters before the end of the week.

[_**Can you support a student today by chipping in just $25, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932109:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)

Many popular conservative and libertarian writers you hear about today were often AF members when they were younger. But that's not all.

**AF members may live across the country and work in different sectors, but they all have one goal in mind: continuing the fight for liberty.**

AF empowers young people to be active, civil, and curious citizens who build freer communities that lead to fulfillment, dignity, and happiness for all. We offer opportunities for networking, mentoring, and leadership through our national network and extensive programming.

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young liberty activists. **

We invest and train 20-year-olds today so that by the time they are 40 and have power, they know how to stand strong in their principles and beliefs.

Our events and programs give the next generation the skills and connections needed to champion the ideas of free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility for the long term.

[_**Support a young professional today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932109:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)

By building up lifelong advocates, supporting young leaders, and building robust communities that believe in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

These brave liberty activists who work behind enemy lines all started at the same point as our new members. But thanks to generous supporters like you, they have moved into leadership positions where they can make a change.

Peter, can you invest in the future of America by supporting an AF member? **Click below to send your gift and help us reach our goal.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932110:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932111:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932112:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932113:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932114:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932115:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932116:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932109:6_7EHyGNb:m:1:3253819041:A750AE7DBB7B9EFC06BBE9113F6183A3:r)

Thank you,

Cindy Cerquitella
Executive Director
America's Future

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1t60dvgc404j5r0dcjkabimfjd3mh8gratn85eg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62p76cth2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z190tdu7gu38oudap8c3d7svr2r6ip967ocsdid8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62p76cth2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrlladop09bvm4ml62de210848b316ucf8pa39a8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62p76cth2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zumnacgirb1q72ragrrvbf4sn4405qg7co2cnicg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62p76cth2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zubpj7eudmrmmn3p4p5puqmmv12734smfp320ta0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62p76cth2bs)

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlk0hlc4i32ijovbrba67ul41afi6ileu2h3paa8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62p70c9h2bs)**

|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933150:6S0ZHyGNH:m:1:3317145305:F024400EEA79E76D37EDBC0F2A1B2F0B:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933150:6S0ZHyGNH:m:1:3317145305:F024400EEA79E76D37EDBC0F2A1B2F0B:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933150:6S0ZHyGNH:m:1:3317145305:F024400EEA79E76D37EDBC0F2A1B2F0B:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933150:6S0ZHyGNH:m:1:3317145305:F024400EEA79E76D37EDBC0F2A1B2F0B:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933150:6S0ZHyGNH:m:1:3317145305:F024400EEA79E76D37EDBC0F2A1B2F0B:r)

clean_body: | Peter, Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th. Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible. Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on. Today's Goal: Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters. How we win: By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th. We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want. I sincerely hope you'll answer the call. name: ICYMI News
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr0t19aaa2fom19vb92ees195nmg9ihmn2ft2mgg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o75c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl09k55g46pflaftvoao6jelljb9hv21aeuf1c88_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o75c1h2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjlbe5mnhsl9os1ufdcpkpgt8dqnd8bjb2licgvo_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o71cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2o35eppj4tbnc5p38or6c9o7cd7465qb9p9kekq6ashicur76c76chij6tr5e3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9omcs5kmdh6fdr4cooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtm2ourkmct9rjni82m5bqkp243ks8vusvrlb60_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o71cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zboj7ttrivpv48po3ogi5hh1lmaefvmrdceorfn0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o71cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5f9j3471s94cpa6s1jta6rnmedsvf8p7n2oajoo_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o71cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Putting them on trial
body:
And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK, The College Scam.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3l3ir49ontrlni7dse0abjk4b9frvshr01aopio_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2oj5msqb1ob6mdim4ptn6coe2t3jchi6cobhepom6cbi6ep7cs3m6mon0pb6c1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9omcs5kmdh6fdr6coor1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm9p34c5ge6pb24no)
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl3m695fv8jiftoncs5opsk7evq8g22fmfgc8ii8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o73clh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeqik9ns3uer85ualcmb7blq0afjcertapjjk1no_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o73clh2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziv8fusvpi4uj2s6decti5gqbnnhqugd3tmo562o_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi62o73clh2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m getting concerned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932715:JSQIhyGwN:m:1:3345639852:1A24CD89C4E3C8FEFD2A9A12B3EBB188:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932715:JSQIhyGwN:m:1:3345639852:1A24CD89C4E3C8FEFD2A9A12B3EBB188:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932715:JSQIhyGwN:m:1:3345639852:1A24CD89C4E3C8FEFD2A9A12B3EBB188:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932715:JSQIhyGwN:m:1:3345639852:1A24CD89C4E3C8FEFD2A9A12B3EBB188:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932715:JSQIhyGwN:m:1:3345639852:1A24CD89C4E3C8FEFD2A9A12B3EBB188:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932715:JSQIhyGwN:m:1:3345639852:1A24CD89C4E3C8FEFD2A9A12B3EBB188:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932715:JSQIhyGwN:m:1:3345639852:1A24CD89C4E3C8FEFD2A9A12B3EBB188:r)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9fnobcmr3fvfc0qpofqe58b9vvuq08aau8mi7u8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi61ob2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zspbh2cib12lboojlu7m12gmm1kp3f7qeik55d5g_rp22sh2s8i66or4shi61ob2c3h2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Imagine an incredible moment: Senator Raphael Warnock is declared the winner in Georgia. The press is forced to cover how once again Donald Trump has been rejected by American people …
body:
GOP civil war?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8bb37ed-650d-4c52-ad8f-c2994ed58d6c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | I want you to **imagine an incredible moment**. Senator **Raphael Warnock is declared the winner in Georgia**. The press is forced to cover how once again Donald Trump has been rejected by American people, in a swing state no less. He cost Republicans a majority, as another of his kooky candidates, Herschel Walker, has now lost. **([Can we, the Blue Amp Action Community, help make this a reality by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can afford to the Warnock for Senate campaign to ensure we gain a seat in the Senate?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T776e1854-c71f-49fa-bcf0-67af9649e91c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))** The press must also cover how Mitch McConnell is also a loser. Not only did he not gain seats in a midterm when the opposing party had the presidency--a given!--he, in fact, lost a seat. He is weak, further from a majority, and has Josh Hawley openly challenging him, while Ted Cruz and Rick Scott are attacking his leadership. This all after 10 Republican Senators--or 1/5th of their caucus--voted against him as leader, something that's never happened to him before.
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc114adb8-02e1-402b-a1c2-dc135a0c41eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | Imagine Trump & McConnell are fighting. McConnell & Rick Scott are fighting. Trump & DeSantis are fighting. McConnell & Peter Thiel are fighting. And this is all going on as Kevin McCarthy may not have the votes to be Speaker--with a razor-thin majority and two Republicans already saying they won't support him. **There are always ripple effects to any vote, and in this case, it could be outright civil war in the GOP** , while Democrats build a governing coalition that strengthens democracy, passes key progressive legislation and leads by example. **[But we need Senator Warnock to win December 6th for all this to happen. For Democrats to be on offense! Can we, the Blue Amp Action Community, help make this a reality by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can afford to the Warnock for Senate campaign to ensure we gain a seat in the Senate?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86fcab3c-6700-470e-af15-90b9b32e6f58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you for realizing the importance of this moment.
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0010a3d0-1161-4608-97a0-261da0d9ccf9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Your America
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6469%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=pb5GN6fqkG6qbdNaptgfFA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83229%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qnax1%2fTIqJf9fGgb48vLLQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83220%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0xfSH93t%2bCNNNlFpc8EJ9Q&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6469%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=pb5GN6fqkG6qbdNaptgfFA&sysid=1)_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8sorplt554319a2tl2fqjkm47lsu7ej69g2l0v0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shh64o35chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhpo54hb10t3efu497achd5h3e181k1d9imccu7g_rp22sh2s8i66or4shh64o35chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlaie2ab07u5jlif84dhr9dp15jpku9ndbivkbjo_rp22sh2s8i66or4shh64o35chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zn24tpvfirhacknaqh3d6prl3knih9ck0iek0pdo).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z31d0juph5sirl9lr8c0sld1tu6bfko6qdmm31qg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3cji64oj0cli649fg)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfs7dpukkptcofqjr35vrhmhapkmchdb8no9em60_rp22sh2s8i66or4shh64o34cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4oidjamc73klml9kdglp3idv9bv4jk5fbjvd79g_rp22sh2s8i66or4shh64o34cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7mk7rk22o07s67ain5frqe1lnv93tuu05drlbgo_rp22sh2s8i66or4shh64o34cdh2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

name: Candace Owens
subject: I will always tell the TRUTH
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933135:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)

Peter,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in just $25, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933135:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933135:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933135:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933136:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933137:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933138:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933139:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933140:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933141:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933142:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933143:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933135:JxRvcyGNT:m:1:3253819041:CE7387B4417F1592DF52C836DBA4FE48:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

_Soros knows that with a 51-seat Senate majority, Biden and Harris will be able to push their liberal agenda to the extreme._

body:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61934859:6VHC3yGKN:m:1:3364136623:458539204C1F7963A7F36987F5B4BE67:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61934859:6VHC3yGKN:m:1:3364136623:458539204C1F7963A7F36987F5B4BE67:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61934860:6VHC3yGKN:m:1:3364136623:458539204C1F7963A7F36987F5B4BE67:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s all going to come down to turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932740:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932740:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932740:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932740:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932740:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932740:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932740:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932741:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932742:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932743:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932744:JLq1ayGN7:m:1:3359512271:2C560186589E3E130D49839F9745A2BA:r)

clean_body: We’re in new territory with this race. | | | Derek: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. Here's why: • FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win. • BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election. • NOW, we need all hands on deck to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short. So much is at stake, Derek. I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Raphael Warnock and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Let's go win this. – Rev. Raphael Warnock = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
I have an update on our ground game in this critical Georgia Senate race. WATCH NOW.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcgsuel3p639m525lnspv10sua5p3tql545t2dvg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdi61i3epb3c9hbaor16pon2s36cpqm2d76m1h34p3lc9rm0ohkcgpm2dr0ekrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32d5l63g75cj661ob6oj7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6p74cph6coj1c8iv0)
|
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za7j7bkn7kgeq10q38o2058tk9jv8jf4odtbpdg8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj64pj2c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He 's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That 's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmd9e779uv0i6hujoepr1o75qpgoo9c47g4n4ifg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj64pj2c5h2bs)**
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zndpf6vh33g061hrh83kad7npegsjjhu56lh6a30_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj64pj2c5h2bs)

**Today 's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $5 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $5 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr5mv74k70ngd0jafnca9og6v6936eg9ld9148jg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj64pj2c5h2bs)**
[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $5 -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjoiv1mj05gr5albchbhjq1jmktjguss1abs8d18_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj64pj2c5h2bs)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,
