name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=76383eeca1ac441695297bb8b3c84895&_e=Im3rWd2yeZupbyW-GT5uq0ur3nsdqklvz4-aZ7FpEggCEpQtFI0AfoWcpq4yOpym3my2n44S9DyMCvGB-kzfmYEUrL1Ws9W8WqDFuv-sZ5-fuPRrO6Oy1fQAkacGbs4gf_e1EAkV4aAAXUXnbClFb_MV_aAuFnvN12OLxSyPuIrkKtEZ4vYQvwX6n3jW6aDswaHV73exA1vO-YIFHA3thgXYMpQl78DAR_ZDTnnWi4LeEoeO4U4Y8Q0Qb5k0aaL6JG-7vIIDyJWRHjizQmiYNACbNT3TnEjCX1iY86zxvPkEMyLaGUphHjjducWoL9lnks2dIx-3kAv6N7IzG4MJZ7Jmm9l0bIbc3PIcog7Bo68q50dAwfbvNwtSgRP0YVcjxxTmUKYFdpyGehuxLFDHpA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=76383eeca1ac441695297bb8b3c84895&_e=Im3rWd2yeZupbyW-GT5uq0ur3nsdqklvz4-aZ7FpEggCEpQtFI0AfoWcpq4yOpym3my2n44S9DyMCvGB-kzfmYEUrL1Ws9W8WqDFuv-sZ5-fuPRrO6Oy1fQAkacGbs4gf_e1EAkV4aAAXUXnbClFb_MV_aAuFnvN12OLxSyPuIrkKtEZ4vYQvwX6n3jW6aDswaHV73exA1vO-YIFHA3thgXYMpQl78DAR_ZDTnnWi4JXedfM_klltPmqGoIWfbY8-04-7Z3kZEKBjDdMt7nvLVlnUAMWK_umsdY1PchusevUo1YxVI2fQ8tGl0MSmVENP0dqpjr3W6yTGgLP5bABFeO0Ffx1TxiY9ofpz3jX9ssBtNTnVwk3OXbRRRVDOn1JeEoQQIcf0Zf7am7YLGlSMQ%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=76383eeca1ac441695297bb8b3c84895&_e=Im3rWd2yeZupbyW-GT5uq0ur3nsdqklvz4-aZ7FpEggCEpQtFI0AfoWcpq4yOpym3my2n44S9DyMCvGB-kzfmYEUrL1Ws9W8WqDFuv-sZ5-fuPRrO6Oy1fQAkacGbs4gf_e1EAkV4aAAXUXnbClFb_MV_aAuFnvN12OLxSyPuIrkKtEZ4vYQvwX6n3jW6aDswaHV73exA1vO-YIFHA3thgXYMpQl78DAR_ZDTnnWi4JtkNy-kjHCCAvkwHqVJACNOkxoX7Y-4IzwTfhC6RXoxReH5GjUeB8M9AQkkivapdoT8-KM9aeE7R9k8g0gJnBaLYdNad5JgdlOa-ItW-m4yp4Cdept5t7AmYT8W2ANjFTrhnzVJEN3l1CyvyrYR9zwUWdI14_Y4EmpmNz2HCImIw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. And today I need your help. |
---
| | Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn.** And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

Dr. Ben Carson

](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30191c27d95a4dbca618e8ff875b8d71&_e=tdR1aWSl2-Av-7OFxND_oSTUhDDFeOUuYjFG7l4omIOYWGaxJ1rNTYdIU6vUTF4Asu6r1lfMs_4qN1cQKGMW9lXVeaGl-hkQyvM1tljlAu4c8J5kvRSCaqHpXo1_0D48XoRTIoIPg4bVnD_7t-xF_liq2nc3WWn3PqUMohp2g8jPtOKqxRNTvEWiyhEuUJbhOikhCFIOEjP9YkJ55ps95BW7_1bTwc7mucfiFvSKi1o9GJO1TDoEzNsm08gOK885Jv6RFLovP53yUUTrHkIvxSb6VmmQTwcqmdNlNsVzKZ_LP1CCR52MCaQeMTPccZPvY9WNW-wle3pISiDnHr9phQ%3D%3D)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake.)

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What 's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** "They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30191c27d95a4dbca618e8ff875b8d71&_e=tdR1aWSl2-Av-7OFxND_oSTUhDDFeOUuYjFG7l4omIOYWGaxJ1rNTYdIU6vUTF4Asu6r1lfMs_4qN1cQKGMW9lXVeaGl-hkQyvM1tljlAu4c8J5kvRSCaqHpXo1_0D48XoRTIoIPg4bVnD_7t-xF_liq2nc3WWn3PqUMohp2g8jPtOKqxRNTvEWiyhEuUJbhUmVNs6L5-LT6NGw02-oCcH4pvL-YmrIiZyio2QvhYQz4O1kgZhLBw_GbtUi0u693PiA_CyAGEa28MZAgTeLpaDc9MiSOOQ-RoD36qCqNTroHV3saeIouaRjSee3V4o1J5QkWVWHRiWW_8ogkqSk0bw%3D%3D)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30191c27d95a4dbca618e8ff875b8d71&_e=tdR1aWSl2-Av-7OFxND_oSTUhDDFeOUuYjFG7l4omIOYWGaxJ1rNTYdIU6vUTF4Asu6r1lfMs_4qN1cQKGMW9lXVeaGl-hkQyvM1tljlAu4c8J5kvRSCaqHpXo1_0D48XoRTIoIPg4bVnD_7t-xF_liq2nc3WWn3PqUMohp2g8jPtOKqxRNTvEWiyhEuUJbha2o_Inuv6NRW0_uPTyxGnx7RnQktt2I9l96c6rsp-4fEEBOvCVMrEfMX8MxKosnMW3lnhhjERR6t46rhagnHWhf1FY7l0mTeyGK4AWGiktAWXdaqpAT3JB6-BsZADXIxiINnifO5BVT_QO1CWgC-6Q%3D%3D)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Update: Though Rudy Salas is currently slightly trailing his GOP opponent in the CA-22 District, The Washington Post election model predicts when all the votes are counted that Salas will win! So let's secure this race for Rudy Salas by making sure EVERY VOTE IS COUNTED!!
body:
Republicans in chaos?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8f731b7-1b87-4e44-8632-9c188c4e5025/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **_UPDATE :_**** ** Republicans currently have 219 House seats--giving them a three-seat majority--yet, there are a few seats left, and we're in very good shape in most to all of them. _In CA-22, the news is really good. __Though Rudy Salas is currently slightly trailing his GOP opponent, The Washington Post election model predicts when all the votes are counted that Salas will win! So let's secure this race for Rudy Salas by making sure EVERY VOTE IS COUNTED!!_ **[To do this, can you give $5, $10, $25 to Rudy Salas so he can pay staffers and lawyers--the watchdogs--for this effort? Let's take another seat, keep the GOP majority so small they remain in chaos and have an even better Thanksgiving!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ab8f4ce-2611-496d-b704-40d8999d8710/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_THANK YOU!_**
**_Cliff_** On Sun, Nov 20, 2022 at 10:28 PM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **WE HAVE A FEW RACES LEFT THAT WE MUST DELIVER** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebde8561-b1c0-44af-ad63-ae00cac4e898/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Republicans are now expected to have a 5-7 vote edge in the House. Two of those votes, lunatics Andy Biggs & Matt Gaetz, have promised to will NEVER vote for Kevin McCarthy as leader. 31 voted for Biggs over McCartthy in a leadership contest. And Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, who is one of the more normal Republicans, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats if McCarthy doesn't have the votes._** **__This all adds up to something simple: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.__** **_One of the races still outstanding is California's 22nd Congressional District, a seat long held by Democrats, but taken over in 2020 by Republican David Valadao. Democrat Rudy Salas is currently within 4,000 votes with an entire 25% of the vote left to count. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-22 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d4ce08b-2464-4e76-9b04-9fa7c6afa55e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te610acf6-4849-45c2-9b00-4e9cf88fee32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you to all the members of the Blue Amp Action Community who keep showing they intend to take every seat we can._** **_Cliff_**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Warnock has done this before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932745:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932745:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932745:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932745:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932745:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932745:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932745:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932746:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932747:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932748:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932749:6UlufyGNC:m:1:3360412034:9F91ECB5CF159E8D1A1DE71471069F67:r)

name: Laurie Teper
subject: A message from Courtney
body:
Hi Volunteers!!

We fought a good fight in district 4!! Like many of you, I was very disappointed with the results. I really thought it was going to be a close race. We did make the democrat party nervous, which was fun :)

Bryan and I spent a week in Mexico, as our delayed honeymoon, and it was very nice to get away and reset. Many people have asked if I will run again? I don't know. I am going to be praying for direction from God and those with more experience than me in this area of politics. I have so appreciated having you all as a family working together for a common cause, and we need to continue using that energy to change the political atmosphere of our district and state. There are many ways to do this, and we need to work together to be strategic.

For now, let's celebrate Christ's birth with our fellow patriots at this event that I want to share with you all below! I hope to see most of you there, and thank you, thank you, thank you for supporting me for the past year and a half. I'm sorry the ending was not what we hoped for, but we made a big impact in the blue areas and made it very clear we are not sitting back without resistance. In good news.... we have the majority in the US House, so maybe the Republicans in the federal government will slow the spending!

Thank you all again, and I hope you can join all of us at the Homestead on December 10th!

The "Patriot's Christmas Party" is being hosted by the Durham County GOP, the Triangle Republican Women and CORE Durham and will be held on Saturday night, December 10, 6:00 pm to 9:30 pm in the Festival House at Homestead Steakhouse. We will have a cash bar with beer, wine and stronger spirits and there will be musical entertainment throughout the evening. Our menu will be a four meat buffet with grilled chicken, pork tenderloin, beef tips on rice and lasagna. The hot vegetables will be string beans, green butter beans with corn and mashed potatoes. Salads will be their seven layer salad and a marinated vegetable salad in Italian dressing. Deserts will be peach cobbler and banana pudding. The buffet will also include rolls, tea and water.

Tickets for the party are $35 and can be purchased on the Durham Co GOP website by ** _" carefully"_** following these steps:
**1.** Click the link below and it should carry you to the Durham GOP website page for the party. If it does not, Google the Durham Co GOP website. Scroll down to the bottom of the home page, locate EVENTS and click on "Patriot's Christmas Party". That should carry you to the page for the party.
**2.** Once on the party page, scroll down till you see in big red letters **" RESERVE YOUR TICKETS"**, click on that and a new page should appear where you can select the number of tickets you want to purchase.
**3.** Select the number of tickets you want, fill in **" ALL" **of the personal information requested, enter your credit card information and click PAY ONCE. We suggest using a credit card versus paying thru PayPal.
**4.** You should see a new page confirming your purchase (it may say donation) and shortly after you should receive an email transaction receipt. We suggest you print the receipt and bring it with you to the party, just in case.

**Tickets must be purchased by Thursday, December 01**. Tickets will not be available at the door. The Festival House is a large facility and we would love to have a big crowd to help us celebrate the Christmas season. Thank you All.

**<https://durham.nc.gop/patriot_s_christmas_dinner>**

\--

Courtney Geels
Email: [courtney@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:courtney@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (919)593-6738
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com/)

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Director
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

name: Right Wing Report
subject: Megyn Kelly Said Four Words About Donald Trump That Threw Everything Into Turmoil
body:
[unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW59i7pDNX)

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES CAMPAIGN TO MOBILIZE DISENFRANCHISED VOTERS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 22
GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES CAMPAIGN TO MOBILIZE DISENFRANCHISED VOTERS
(ATLANTA) - Today, Greater Georgia launched a new campaign to mobilize disenfranchised voters ahead of the Tuesday, December 6th runoff election. The effort is targeted at Georgians who lost faith in Georgia's elections after 2020, and aims to help restore voter confidence to drive them to the polls next month. The campaign will include texts, phone calls, digital ads, and radio ads specifically targeted at voters in north Georgia.
About 339,000 Georgians failed to come back out to vote in the 2021 runoff election after voting in the 2020 general election, largely over concerns about election integrity. In the 2022 general election, just over 100,000 of the 339,000 disenfranchised voters came out to vote.
"If just a fraction of Georgia's 339,000 disenfranchised voters had come back out to vote after November 2020, conservatives would have won both United States Senate seats in January 2021," said Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "That's why, over the last 18 months, Greater Georgia has focused heavily on re-engaging disenfranchised voters - informing them about Georgia's Election Integrity Act and the new provisions that ensure it's easy to vote and hard to cheat.
"Today, with headlines highlighting election issues in states like Arizona and Nevada, this work is as critical as ever. So for the next two weeks, Greater Georgia will be putting our full effort into supporting voter confidence and turning out the vote - to ensure that what happened in Georgia in 2021 doesn't happen again on December 6th."
---
| ###
Media Contact: [press@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com)

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d1ca7284436410d90ac9706ef24ad0a&_e=sR8cyHWvTSczi3ruiAKJBzOT4ei2fjtoyXmAq9widxcWcmY15kKx95XEksvdfsPAISVNiaiFGHWDA4Hk2cc4CthDxtjgs0-s68Y_9k5UA-WUR0JRJ6e53e4w2EzTnyTxOA6gXTKk9mpqVxpj7GE4qWQ_IPrqJ6cypf6ADa8QvhePXYYZZFjaMWeWjShP3s2I-QJv2tppaiVakYgEs93tdQCS-2-k8BtnykWeZGe1aVSlm4YSk70mkeK3OwZbVrkjuuFPDcI79GAQE7vdx7kbeA4Syzb0DHFeP0t8nR_PLFtvg2_crREhoeOfNe6h5kGk)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d1ca7284436410d90ac9706ef24ad0a&_e=sR8cyHWvTSczi3ruiAKJBzOT4ei2fjtoyXmAq9widxcWcmY15kKx95XEksvdfsPAISVNiaiFGHWDA4Hk2cc4CthDxtjgs0-s68Y_9k5UA-WUR0JRJ6e53e4w2EzTnyTxOA6gXTKk9mpqVxpj7GE4qRKwha6jKoltuPunxQn74YrWGtVpn-4OZ6Mc3j5NtaAF5eOPtNixaFBy1ILYC4czEMgX1dxieJZQcGY9bMQaywEqLGl7ArkH6s0YY6TcQih_bgo25UeEmTIMjn2UKvcSfPxOBz9xtkNxa2Nq3m5S15VB2HYIkfKeUkpYk7EIWqm0)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d1ca7284436410d90ac9706ef24ad0a&_e=sR8cyHWvTSczi3ruiAKJBzOT4ei2fjtoyXmAq9widxcWcmY15kKx95XEksvdfsPAISVNiaiFGHWDA4Hk2cc4CthDxtjgs0-s68Y_9k5UA-WUR0JRJ6e53e4w2EzTnyTxOA6gXTKk9mpqVxpj7GE4qfrxA_A9Xzgr404bd_54YNfz0p8Lu8gUZxlI5WFWXOpzDKmWkaLIXp2fSbfSwwqLxOoaWnqhoyRl5SVij5BbMQDT9RYiY318VPEIoRTo0q86pTC6fzNGUOGZKuRgUJJxUb6KO3DIvv65bnk86ICjKcWo7rtIf0tbfRaDVfx9J0Wa)
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d1ca7284436410d90ac9706ef24ad0a&_e=sR8cyHWvTSczi3ruiAKJBzOT4ei2fjtoyXmAq9widxcWcmY15kKx95XEksvdfsPAISVNiaiFGHWDA4Hk2cc4CthDxtjgs0-s68Y_9k5UA-WUR0JRJ6e53e4w2EzTnyTxOA6gXTKk9mpqVxpj7GE4qd0wnFM9gJFT_zx96RU95cit6WeeTpQ70P5Q4B9r81YKBYUtCD_ppQk6nLD2OwDUTlizvSnyWy9_NEjOkaNwW_Db_ak-AGPeT6GWCTx1n8GEAYgAF5-DU4dfR8ldbBeyL-VvtKxkWekmajwy3g68gwRgUQ30zrp1tzeFNL41HCQ-)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d1ca7284436410d90ac9706ef24ad0a&_e=sR8cyHWvTSczi3ruiAKJBzOT4ei2fjtoyXmAq9widxcWcmY15kKx95XEksvdfsPAISVNiaiFGHWDA4Hk2cc4CthDxtjgs0-s68Y_9k5UA-WUR0JRJ6e53e4w2EzTnyTxOA6gXTKk9mpqVxpj7GE4qZenAFFdePUzpFX4RnH_YV7wkYfF_qIVPihypQuO0horIG38kzm69gNf_vAfcPNAkx90MLDySqUXXju-oo5xnfJ7dRBUvWggS9Xw2zwYDBmWtUQuPCpnOQNxpRicRzvSdbvtvMRh7syDGcCzWsk0txUhY9FFV4pzVLb06oSHlHDX) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d1ca7284436410d90ac9706ef24ad0a&_e=sR8cyHWvTSczi3ruiAKJBzOT4ei2fjtoyXmAq9widxcWcmY15kKx95XEksvdfsPAISVNiaiFGHWDA4Hk2cc4CthDxtjgs0-s68Y_9k5UA-WUR0JRJ6e53e4w2EzTnyTxOA6gXTKk9mpqVxpj7GE4qSchvcwuvhnQERzRwsO-AAoBIOBYiNr1DTUUyKfCULry_LszGhgs44CDu8aOLnyfVGrpUfrdaWQR0Bis8KPf_XZ1x0dbWP82M88Knf9eL4oomnJY7mAp_Nrr0gJ2gIc8zyJSLuED6vr1HkaSsOvpe7FED81nVzAgbiS5cUUUuxF5)

The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d1ca7284436410d90ac9706ef24ad0a&_e=sR8cyHWvTSczi3ruiAKJBzOT4ei2fjtoyXmAq9widxcWcmY15kKx95XEksvdfsPAISVNiaiFGHWDA4Hk2cc4CthDxtjgs0-s68Y_9k5UA-WUR0JRJ6e53e4w2EzTnyTxOA6gXTKk9mpqVxpj7GE4qTNmUe349OzV4nHnFLQqh_T46HK8woFKuMrMilLm9mAQqPw2arBH4p6xgcZQUy1hn0SgUa7yMzhIeY41siPibACcwWRbxfliPJwuGoX0K5OJqIbtgZNiRL90z89IZyHMOAxSeR5y5-ANdsFhvLtdulmDkuKzp3pgROTZ3tpmPIjX) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Friends, While we successfully staved off a red wave at the polls this November, it looks like control of the U.S. House just barely fell into Republican hands. With that in mind, it’s all the more reason we need to expand our Senate majority. **Right now, Democrats just have one tie-breaking vote, but we can win the 51st vote by reelecting Senator Raphael Warnock.** Rev. Warnock has committed his life to public service, serving as Senior Pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the former pulpit of Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., and working to alleviate poverty and expand access to healthcare. He is a champion for working families and a much needed presence in the Senate. **Though Rev. Warnock received more votes this November, neither he or his Republican opponent achieved 50 percent of the vote, sending them to a runoff election on December 6.** **Rev. Warnock is up against a far-right MAGA extremist who’s in it for himself, not the people of Georgia or the country as a whole. But right-wing Super PACs are spending millions to stop Rev. Warnock, just like they did to try to stop me.** [**Help us save this critical Senate seat and re-elect Rev. clean_body: | = Friends, While we successfully staved off a red wave at the polls this November, it looks like control of the U.S. House just barely fell into Republican hands. With that in mind, it’s all the more reason we need to expand our Senate majority. Right now, Democrats just have one tie-breaking vote, but we can win the 51st vote by reelecting Senator Raphael Warnock. Rev. Warnock has committed his life to public service, serving as Senior Pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the former pulpit of Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., and working to alleviate poverty and expand access to healthcare. He is a champion for working families and a much needed presence in the Senate. Though Rev. Warnock received more votes this November, neither he or his Republican opponent achieved 50 percent of the vote, sending them to a runoff election on December 6. Rev. Warnock is up against a far-right MAGA extremist who’s in it for himself, not the people of Georgia or the country as a whole. But right-wing Super PACs are spending millions to stop Rev. Warnock, just like they did to try to stop me. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With your support, we can expand our Senate majority and have a stronger chance at making more progress for the people. Thanks, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That’s why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvj0osaqkmv4488ah3pm5nrbhs2ihih3ol3ara7g_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj62p70shh2bs) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** ’s great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They’re not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl8eb7olu8ip93rr4bl53v5kdre86umrs4hdstmo_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj62p70shh2bs) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents andthe community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo8t7v9tg74ie1qflfrvtib91i6k0rsb7h1f9djo_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj62p70shh2bs) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today – $50, $100, $250 or more – I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits – we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zea2t8bqbgfhg7ituk35au72567unkpovmc8d67g_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj62p70shh2bs) We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon

name: Herschel Walker
subject: He now has 900 campaign staff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932765:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932765:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932765:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932765:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932765:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932765:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932765:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932766:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932767:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932768:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932769:6lw1zyGNc:m:1:3361486117:32950796D152AA0B95ACB2CEA0C4E40E:r)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I just want to say _thank you._
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $5 between me and Kirsten Gillibrand right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54955009/380194187/1384586616?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3799-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODI3NjNkYi04NzZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3rXaopa9riKZMplIk9_p5HtCPTgiLirkLpL2Ztz7VQ=)**
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. **
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54955010/380194188/1384586616?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3799-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODI3NjNkYi04NzZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3rXaopa9riKZMplIk9_p5HtCPTgiLirkLpL2Ztz7VQ=)**
Thank you for your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2757aj1q5jb3s8fg33svu57qm95q660ebj1v0g0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj66pb0chh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvfq6qn33jjtq73v8o1n5aufspsvi5u2btlek9q8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj66pb0chh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zodq4e3jcrlvscnd4ps7vv3d5p2j0f49gm1s0kp8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj66pb0chh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbdjvkiv5hoqm3sua10s26hulu2qakh7a0uhejmo_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj66pb0chh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z65u7ieo9qhe2lvmifbhv73ctqeohhp4f2rtp340_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj66pb0chh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z80fk7fjutohuianq8kiin3m8s8p5i29jfqetns0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shj66pb0chh2bs)
---

subject: I know I’ve asked a lot lately
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

Peter,

**This is it.**

_**This is when we dig deep.**_

We're in overtime. The crowd is cheering, and the lights are bright.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937410:6t_LnyG-N:m:1:3331703221:CE14E5055BE72A0ADD56716EAE1C5841:r)
I have asked for a lot of you over the last few months, **[but can you dig a little deeper right now and invest $25 or more in our Senate campaign to help us win in overtime?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937410:6t_LnyG-N:m:1:3331703221:CE14E5055BE72A0ADD56716EAE1C5841:r)**

_**I can't remember ever losing an overtime game in my football career, and I certainly don't intend to start now.**_ I'm asking for your support today so that I can be the 50th Senate vote against the disastrous Biden-Schumer-Warnock agenda.

Georgia deserves better. America deserves better.

It's time to pull out this win in overtime.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937410:6t_LnyG-N:m:1:3331703221:CE14E5055BE72A0ADD56716EAE1C5841:r)
Herschel

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Thank You 💙
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Thank you Peter,

We know you'll be busy with your family this week, but we wanted to thank you all for your support. Because of you, we are moving the needle forward here in Tennessee.

It wouldn't have been possible without this amazing team. Whether you donated, volunteered, called your friends and family to make sure they voted, or even reposted us on social media, your support made the difference. All of you own part of our movement forward to progress.

Working to flip Tennessee blue is not something we take lightly. We understand the heavy task of going up against the Republican machine, and we know that it won't happen overnight. Despite working against the worst gerrymandering our state has ever seen, our democratic incumbents were reelected, and we strengthened our caucus with new members.

Here's what we did because of your support:

✅ 100,000+ doors knocked
✅ 250,000+ phones called
✅ 2,500,000+ texts sent
✅ 1,200,000+ mail pieces sent

But our work isn’t finished yet.

We're so grateful to have the opportunity to organize for Democrats in Tennessee — we deeply believe in our urgent cause to put power back in the hands of working people, and that starts with electing Democrats. All of us are honored to have you fighting alongside us.

From the bottom of our hearts, thank you for your incredible support, for your votes, and for believing in Tennessee Democrats. We truly couldn't do this without you.

Onward,

— Tennessee Democratic Party

Help us keep going so we can build for 2024 → https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Despite working against the worst gerrymandering our state has ever seen, our democratic incumbents were reelected, and we strengthened our caucus with new members. Here's what we did because of your support: ✅ 100,000+ doors knocked ✅ 250,000+ phones called ✅ 2,500,000+ texts sent ✅ 1,200,000+ mail pieces sent But our work isn’t finished yet. We're so grateful to have the opportunity to organize for Democrats in Tennessee — we deeply believe in our urgent cause to put power back in the hands of working people, and that starts with electing Democrats. All of us are honored to have you fighting alongside us. From the bottom of our hearts, thank you for your incredible support, for your votes, and for believing in Tennessee Democrats. We truly couldn't do this without you. Onward, — Tennessee Democratic Party Help us keep going so we can build for 2024 → [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lavern=20Spicer?=
subject: Thanksgiving is almost here
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=65d770f048&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello PeterMany of you know me from my Congressional run in 2022 where I ran as a Republican in Miami.During my campaign I often told the stories of the food bank that I run here in Miami - where we feed, clothe and help those who need a helping hands.We serve thousands of families each week and have been doing it for twenty plus years. At this food bank, we don’t only serve canned foods and leftovers - we go out of our way to give the people a sense of dignity and some good things to eat!
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=67f1d1c156&e=fdefed58de)
Well, at Thanksgiving time we are the lifeline for so many families. It means that our resources are stretched thin and we need all the help that we can get.Curley’s is a non-profit organization and with the high prices of food this year, it’s been extremely hard to keep up with the quality we’re used to. We’re not a canned food type of food bank - we do our best to give our people high quality food.With Thanksgiving two days away, we need your help. Can you donate today?
| [DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=71b18c2724&e=fdefed58de)
---
Whatever you can give will be greatly appreciated, because times are extremely hard out here. They even say we’re going to have a Thanksgiving turkey shortage so you know those prices are about to skyrocket, too!**And just so you know, whatever that you donate to Curley’s House is tax-deductible as we are a non-profit organization. So please, give generously as possible.****You will be helping us feed families right here in America - not some distant foreign land. We need help HERE in America right on OUR streets!****Please pitch in anything you can with your generous spirit of giving today!**
| [DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dfe0d2d86e&e=fdefed58de)
---
With love and gratitude,Lavern SpicerFounder of Curley’s House

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zejth7o0mfts9b2qg1jccrjfrgc63j2lk5sd2nc0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm0o34cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj41kj72i6tsvkk23abif139spc4mce2egj61t60_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm0o34cph2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z89eemg1n3v1048v21j12ipe50lvfmn6p1nscomg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm0o34cph2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z01mpr82lkgh2g69ts0p3kqhd4s25btl67c65qmg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm0o34cph2bs)

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze76k3drpudr686bv8a4deig3c2kom043b7ibbto_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm0o34cph2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8qml8puj767vrr124p630jdbmgjv99t2mkpcbn8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm0o34cph2bs)

**This is it.**

We're in overtime. The crowd is cheering, and the lights are bright.

body:
BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee voted to subpoena Trump!!
| **BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee votes to subpoena Trump**

**FIRST:** The January 6th Committee held their first public hearing to expose Donald Trump’s treasonous crimes on Jan. 6th, 2021.

**THEN:** The committee JUST voted to SUBPOENA Donald Trump for his crimes.. _AMAZING!!_

**NOW:** We need to send the Jan. 6th Committee a HUGE thank you note for their brave work.

[**We're sending a HUGE Thank You card to the January 6th Committee and we need your signature! We have 460 more spots open for Democrats in your state to sign – don’t wait, sign right now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35368?t=6&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35368?t=7&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1)
---
To: The January 6th Committee
From: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35368?t=8&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1) Dear January 6th Committee,

**Thank you** for exposing Donald Trump’s involvement in the January 6th attempted insurrection.

**Thank you** for doing what's right and voting unanimously to subpoena Donald Trump.

**Thank you** for spending countless hours combing over evidence to find the truth out that horrific day.

_**Today, you made me proud to be an American.**_

I’m so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you’ve shown in standing up for what’s right will go down in history.**

Despite the attacks you’ve endured and the censorship you’ve received, you’ve never wavered.

**So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.** [**Today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35368?t=9&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35368?t=10&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1)
---
Sincerely,

A Proud Democrat
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5431%2E878179%2EAm5Vc1)
---

subject: Not one more dollar for Ukraine
body:
| | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xtu459oavkaAgIhUCsimKSu0PVsPFiiN0T--bXPqev9DPYxnhf7xkSuJxW6TUD7c1Jm6AdcRbsyoYlpclqLUHMsx9fd-wXW6lKXcpK4RSU-n7oieCd-AKLi-7KexkBpRY6K51nX9z_K8IFBkZ3VZLtQA25uF_-5NEt3vIpQtaqRsPs5BJLNZph3EBMOKpPQ3YRfs4jmZXR8iZwRoSm52Og==&c=4juHnpYUP6lLPLKV4aQ7em0Zz9SE01WJwFhr9jS_WUvbHpOvUROSfg==&ch=ITpaawI6iyeMUofq0jLe9MFY5ER0tl7m-wKl1wRtEOTh0nYSu5ombQ==)
---
| ALERT: America First Republicans Call to AUDIT Ukraine $$$!
---
| Peter,
---
| The days of endless cash being sent thousands of miles away to Eastern Europe to sleepwalk us into a nuclear war are numbered.
I WILL NOT VOTE FOR ONE MORE DOLLAR FOR UKRAINE!
We are far too entangled in this conflict, and the American People deserve to know exactly how the BILLIONS have been spent so far.
Democrats can be the party that funds Ukraine's government forever and caters to every demand of Zelenskyy...
Republicans should be the party that chooses to put the American People FIRST!
If you agree that's the direction we need to go - [let me know right now!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xtu459oavkaAgIhUCsimKSu0PVsPFiiN0T--bXPqev9DPYxnhf7xkSuJxW6TUD7c1Jm6AdcRbsyoYlpclqLUHMsx9fd-wXW6lKXcpK4RSU-n7oieCd-AKLi-7KexkBpRY6K51nX9z_K8IFBkZ3VZLtQA25uF_-5NEt3vIpQtaqRsPs5BJLNZph3EBMOKpPQ3YRfs4jmZXR8iZwRoSm52Og==&c=4juHnpYUP6lLPLKV4aQ7em0Zz9SE01WJwFhr9jS_WUvbHpOvUROSfg==&ch=ITpaawI6iyeMUofq0jLe9MFY5ER0tl7m-wKl1wRtEOTh0nYSu5ombQ==)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0177%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=3rO49KASVsfEdG6Ukp9Usg&sysid=1)
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41589%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b7TRTof7fIBfptgZYKFOPg&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41580%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x4IR7dPGAc1Zn8lcwv9ufw&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41581%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jbwQM9E7r8MIlphsJs93nw&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41582%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2femHnZMXVzuadFQ8L%2blrw&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41583%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lb3gAY0N6HngloTiw98log&sysid=1)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41584%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7moiperMgr6nGbMwm4qN6g&sysid=1)
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0177%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=3rO49KASVsfEdG6Ukp9Usg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0177%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=3rO49KASVsfEdG6Ukp9Usg&sysid=1)

body:

---
America needs you.

clean_body: He’s our only shot at stopping Biden’s 51-seat majority in the Senate. He’s our only shot at stopping Biden’s 51-seat majority in the Senate. | Friend, America needs you. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are on the brink of building a 51-seat majority in the Senate. Herschel Walker is America’s only hope of stopping that doomsday scenario dead in its tracks. Republicans just officially won the House majority. It would be an utter shame to then have Biden and Kamala win a 51-seat majority in the Senate... That’s why we’re going all in to help Herschel fight for victory. But with Democrats spending millions of dollars to defeat us, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to help give Herschel the boost he needs to win this runoff.
