subject: it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and pull ahead in this must-win runoff race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I'm urgently asking
| | |
---
Friend, this is important: **Herschel Walker and I are officially heading to a runoff, meaning he and I will be facing off again in just two weeks.**
With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, defending this seat will come down to your grassroots support. **So I’m urgently asking:[Will you give $5 or more right now so we can win this race and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54938639/380129935/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5070-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDQ4ZmRjNi02OTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i3m-ma3Ge4Oqp8WnoCWzlA4PjXDE-OeDEbk7mq57gYc=)**
Here’s why your support today couldn’t be more important: Even before the runoff, experts were calling me the most vulnerable senator on the ballot.
That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. They have poured more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat.
With our very democracy at stake, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and pull ahead in this must-win runoff race. **That’s why we just set a critical goal to raise $100,000 by midnight – but with just a few hours left, we’re dangerously short.**
**So please, friend, I’m counting on you:[Will you give an urgent donation of $5 or more before midnight tonight so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54938640/380129936/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5070-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDQ4ZmRjNi02OTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i3m-ma3Ge4Oqp8WnoCWzlA4PjXDE-OeDEbk7mq57gYc=)**

Thank you for stepping up when it matters most, friend. I truly appreciate it.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

Thank you!

name: PA Democrats
subject: Trump’s Twitter Account Restored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Over the weekend, Donald Trump's Twitter account was restored. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, **You might have already seen the news. Over the weekend, Donald Trump’s Twitter account was restored. ** For years leading up to his ban, Trump used Twitter to promote harassment, election lies, and health disinformation – all of which were in direct violation to the platform's rules. When a mob of insurrectionists, inspired directly by Trump’s directives, descended on the Capitol on January 6th, 2021, Twitter finally bit the bullet and banned Trump from the site. **But thanks to the decision of new Twitter CEO Elon Musk, Trump will now have free reign to spew his conspiracy theories and hate speech to his 78 million followers.** We can't stand by and let that happen.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54971521/380212052/2100725358?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTI5NjBlOS05NzZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpYyhbLPZZbld9THDGOodmYDmBXFKpPcYAX_V_kL-SU=&emci=755cfd6c-876a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b92960e9-976a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25616296)

**Look, we already know that Pennsylvania will be a swing state in 2024. clean_body: Over the weekend, Donald Trump's Twitter account was restored. | | | | | Dear Peter, You might have already seen the news. Over the weekend, Donald Trump’s Twitter account was restored. For years leading up to his ban, Trump used Twitter to promote harassment, election lies, and health disinformation – all of which were in direct violation to the platform's rules. When a mob of insurrectionists, inspired directly by Trump’s directives, descended on the Capitol on January 6th, 2021, Twitter finally bit the bullet and banned Trump from the site. But thanks to the decision of new Twitter CEO Elon Musk, Trump will now have free reign to spew his conspiracy theories and hate speech to his 78 million followers. We can't stand by and let that happen. Look, we already know that Pennsylvania will be a swing state in 2024. With Donald Trump running again, it’s crucial that we begin to build resources for that fight. = And while you’re here, on whether you think Twitter should ban Trump for good! name: John Kennedy
subject: Can you say this 3X fast?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm218jec37bdqd2ploh3qo11hdre0f59krmfhmb8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgmcor4cjh2bs)
---
Friends,

**Try saying this 3X Fast ->**

Schumer squandered saving society by solidifying his socialist squad.

Schumer's sanctimonious stance is a somber show of his sickening schemes.

The senseless shortsighted socialist scam is sabotaging our state.

Of that, I'm sure.
| [**SAVE AMERICA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkbse65sumbg40mn7b06k6o1aac2b7456vet5948_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgmcor4cjh2bs)
---

We cannot be rid of radical Chuck Schumer quickly enough. Unfortunately for us, we're stuck with him for a while. **But we can and will be a thorn in the side of every ridiculous radical piece of legislation he puts through Congress.**

name: Election Integrity NOW
subject: Join our Lawsuit
body:
The Left is pushing to allow non-citizens and illegal aliens vote in elections!

Peter: Are you mad about the Red Wave fizzling on election day? **[2024 is going to be much worse unless you help us win our lawsuit to stop non-citizens from voting in U.S. elections!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938005:65lBZyGDN:m:1:3360412034:42993564B0B590EDC1F294F09F14F1B5:r "2024 is
going to be much worse unless you help us win our lawsuit to stop non-citizens from voting in U.S. elections!")** Look I get it. The Left has stacked the deck against conservatives with mail-in balloting, weeks of early [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938005:65lBZyGDN:m:1:3360412034:42993564B0B590EDC1F294F09F14F1B5:r "Headline")balloting, California-style ballot harvesting, and results that don't add up. But here's the kicker - their coup de grace is already happening in local communities across the country - allowing non-citizens and illegal aliens to vote in elections! **[That's why if you care one iota about election integrity, then help us win our lawsuit to stop non-citizen voting with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938005:65lBZyGDN:m:1:3360412034:42993564B0B590EDC1F294F09F14F1B5:r "That’s why if you care one iota about election integrity,
then help us win our lawsuit to stop non-citizen voting with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today!")** Right now, we're battling the City of Oakland, California (on the other side of the San Francisco Bay) which is pushing for elections that they say are just for school board elections. **Don 't. Believe. That. For. A. Second!** School Board voting is just letting the camel's nose under the tent. Their ultimate goal is clear - **the left will barnstorm the country to permit non-citizen voting ensuring that EVERY election will allow illegal aliens to pick our members of Congress, Senators, and even the President of the United States!** **[That's why you need to join us in our lawsuit against the City of Oakland and stop this unconstitutional law from being passed! Will you help us protect the Constitution and preserve our election integrity with your donation today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938005:65lBZyGDN:m:1:3360412034:42993564B0B590EDC1F294F09F14F1B5:r "That’s why you need to join us in our lawsuit against the
City of Oakland and stop this unconstitutional law from being passed! Will you help us protect the Constitution and preserve our election integrity
with your donation today?")** This lawsuit is going to be costly. They're hoping they can run out the clock on us by dragging it out through the appellate process. That's why you need to join us in the fight. **[Even a $50 donation will help ensure we preserve election integrity in this country.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938005:65lBZyGDN:m:1:3360412034:42993564B0B590EDC1F294F09F14F1B5:r "Even a $50 donation will help ensure we preserve election integrity in this country.")** The results on November 8th were bad enough on their own. We can't let the Left get a permanent advantage by allowing illegal aliens to vote in future elections. We must secure our elections for years to come. Overturning this law is the key to ensuring election integrity. Stand up and help us fight this unconstitutional law. **[Donate today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938005:65lBZyGDN:m:1:3360412034:42993564B0B590EDC1F294F09F14F1B5:r "Donate today!")** Thank you,
James V. Lacy
President, U.S. Justice Foundation

Right now, we're battling the City of Oakland, California (on the other side of the San Francisco Bay) which is pushing for elections that they say are just for school board elections. Don 't. Believe. That. For. A. Second! School Board voting is just letting the camel's nose under the tent. Their ultimate goal is clear - the left will barnstorm the country to permit non-citizen voting ensuring that EVERY election will allow illegal aliens to pick our members of Congress, Senators, and even the President of the United States! "That’s why you need to join us in our lawsuit against the City of Oakland and stop this unconstitutional law from being passed! Will you help us protect the Constitution and preserve our election integrity with your donation today?" This lawsuit is going to be costly. They're hoping they can run out the clock on us by dragging it out through the appellate process. That's why you need to join us in the fight. "Even a $50 donation will help ensure we preserve election integrity in this country." The results on November 8th were bad enough on their own. We can't let the Left get a permanent advantage by allowing illegal aliens to vote in future elections. We must secure our elections for years to come. Overturning this law is the key to ensuring election integrity. Stand up and help us fight this unconstitutional law. "Donate today!" Thank you, James V. Lacy President, U.S. Justice Foundation Contributions and gifts to the United States Justice Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions to the fullest extent of the law. subject: Warnock has done this before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932934:JB2eZyGON:m:1:3369487795:D1C58F70188D838842CFBA56E39DCC31:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932934:JB2eZyGON:m:1:3369487795:D1C58F70188D838842CFBA56E39DCC31:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932934:JB2eZyGON:m:1:3369487795:D1C58F70188D838842CFBA56E39DCC31:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932934:JB2eZyGON:m:1:3369487795:D1C58F70188D838842CFBA56E39DCC31:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932934:JB2eZyGON:m:1:3369487795:D1C58F70188D838842CFBA56E39DCC31:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932934:JB2eZyGON:m:1:3369487795:D1C58F70188D838842CFBA56E39DCC31:r)

Peter,

**This is it.**

_**This is when we dig deep.**_

We're in overtime. The crowd is cheering, and the lights are bright.

It's time to pull out this win in overtime.

Thanks,

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Who are the real racists?
body:
The people trying to hold Black people accountable to lift themselves out of poverty through enterprise and hard work?
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg9hjehtt9ronlqp36ng1ruad603lefnpqv5n9p0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)

Hey Friend,

Who are the real racists in America?

The people trying to hold Black people accountable to lift themselves out of poverty through enterprise and hard work?

_**Or those telling Black people that they are forever victims and can't get ahead in life, so they need to depend on the government and rich liberals?**_

The answer? The latter group.

The media, academic institutions, and the radicals all treat Black people like they can't achieve anything on their own.

They're turning victimhood into a nationwide epidemic.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum. I co-founded BLEXIT with Candace Owens. Our mission is to change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities -- with a particular focus on Black Americans.

This month, one of our goals is to raise $50,000 to support our mission of uplifting Black and minority communities.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to stop modern racism? All you have to do is donate any amount today. Click here to join our mission >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z946c3e78bctlv8m3a2qstv6ppdv4p9nc69d8ino_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)

This is deeply personal to me.

I served in the Tucson Police Department as a SWAT operator, field training officer, general instructor, and Public Information Officer.

I've patrolled the streets and interacted with these communities.

And I saw young men and women who believed they were hopeless because all they heard was, _" You're helpless," "You can't do that because of your skin color,"_ and _ "You won't achieve anything."_

But that's not true, and we're here to prove it!

**BLEXIT is doing things no other organization in the country is doing.** We work with communities that are often ignored and provide opportunities for leaders to step forward to make our country a better place.

We are empowering Black communities to abolish the mainstream narrative of the victimhood mentality.

[_**Can you help share the truth -- that these young men and women can achieve anything -- with a gift of $10, $35, or any amount? **__**Click here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z20fri4fs3fn58vlvlhfi191mm3asku33aoegac8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)

BLEXIT's programs give people the opportunity to shape their futures
and pursue the American Dream. All while championing our values of**faith, family, and freedom** to empower Black and urban communities.

It is our goal to lift up these urban communities.

Friend, I am personally asking you to help make this goal a reality.

Supporting BLEXIT means you're supporting your fellow Americans as they
change the narrative that's holding them back.

Can you send your urgent donation today to meet our fundraising goal?

[**Donate $10 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z42tjl0nsvqbiejl1a5qqrrhoedo20qn3copk1d8_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)
[**Donate $35 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4tin2k3ut6kdaag12qfn33vs7pob8ulgotj26hg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)
[**Donate $50 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3vtnr8lp0e3ut95iqf5japuoi1kb32bmuhi0ui0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)
[**Donate $100 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdbh8955bfeurrfhiremsn12bh7osbn5a7v80b58_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)
[**Donate $250 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpupvfj3reimv0glop36p72ek51uq06kscs2v8i0_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)
[**Donate $500 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zchcm7dmv4qp3ra848cdqdpteggi07fdmbidoi8g_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)
[**Donate $1,000 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zer4gvbnjcktmptr2smfpc7pa6c24u7e5sfmg0lg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)
[**Donate $2,500 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1dpbe1ecfkflqg0p8fatr36rnccisnp08isvi7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr24ccgtp8eop3dumejn35bc6ui26dsuf7upkrqo_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgm4o73c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC
body:
|
---
| | _By donating to this email, you are giving to Raphael Warnock in his runoff race and helping Democrats Win Seats build for the next year._
Peter, I just want to say _thank you_.

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: **_[Will you split $10 between me and Democrats Win Seats right now to help them prepare for the next year and to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54972576/380216272/-347734368?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20221122_FR_1.1_0_1MO_splitwarnock_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzJlNDMxOC05YzZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ebd_eQlAN3zhQWnneZAzwAjrFTxfIKgB7XfyhQXJGJA=)_**

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:_[Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Democrats Win Seats to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54972578/380216274/-347734368?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20221122_FR_1.1_0_1MO_splitwarnock_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzJlNDMxOC05YzZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ebd_eQlAN3zhQWnneZAzwAjrFTxfIKgB7XfyhQXJGJA=)_**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

---
|
---

PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC
315 INSPIRATION LANE
GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878.
NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z560daua6kpbsfvim9uo97u639var0s0likmt75o_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgmcor4cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrt10454ls9etq678feciucs4ojonfjpc51lqu7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgmcor4cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za1barqupu270t919k188rd7gumv1ss7hita374o_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgmcor4cdh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt0ncpdr4f9cct3sk5tooi1s7c6sb169v484ljjg_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgmcor4cdh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zks0lfkmn8ndq7i1ht7pcb2pahg415p6noksljio_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgmcor4cdh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdma48rdf62fls24858iicrl6aohk8p4th4slo7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4shgmcor4cdh2bs)
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zjqcgg5j8lmgc4t6nrdoqs2je4ju76t9o2sfjqo8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf2qc7nbv5af82oo0k4din1np3v193e5elb4kt68_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3cji62pj3chhm49fg)

subject: Help me help you, Peter?

body:
**Hi Peter -- It 's Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.** I'm looking for critical feedback before the next session of Congress begins and you're someone I know I can trust.
[**Will you take just 2 minutes of your time to answer my brand new Majority Leader Survey?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937767:J1Rc9yGNZ:m:1:3317145305:3D305A72846A2763FB8A2CE12B0BAA51:r)
**Here 's some of the things I need advice on:**
_Should a Republican Congress focus MORE or LESS on protecting Pro-Life protections?_
_Should a Republican Congress focus MORE or LESS on stopping Critical Race Theory in Schools?_
_Should a Republican Congress COMPLETE the Southern Border Wall?_
**[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937767:J1Rc9yGNZ:m:1:3317145305:3D305A72846A2763FB8A2CE12B0BAA51:r)**
Peter, time is of the essence. Republican leaders like myself only have a few more days to put together our playbook of ideas for the upcoming Congressional session.
_In other words: help me help you!_
[**Please, take just 2 minutes to answer some of the most important questions I 've ever asked you before I meet with my top colleagues and Team Scalise to review your responses.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937767:J1Rc9yGNZ:m:1:3317145305:3D305A72846A2763FB8A2CE12B0BAA51:r)

subject: FWD: Defend Oregon's Public Forests!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Congress
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54972863/380218262/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZWVmNGIwLTlmNmEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JIHNutRv_NS0aeoSxLe8uECW5xe3TDmWCke-uz503kk=&emci=5dce2369-8a6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b4eef4b0-9f6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) | | | Hi there, I wanted to make sure you got this message before the holiday weekend! I’m asking you to [_**take action today to support better protections for Oregon’s Western State Forests.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54972864/380218263/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZWVmNGIwLTlmNmEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JIHNutRv_NS0aeoSxLe8uECW5xe3TDmWCke-uz503kk=&emci=5dce2369-8a6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b4eef4b0-9f6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230)** ** The Oregon Board of Forestry (ODF) is voting on a Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP), and the public comment period for forest-lovers like us to make our voices heard closes next Wednesday. We’ve had a phenomenal response so far, with _hundreds_ of our supporters speaking up for a strong HCP to better protect endangered species and drinking water sources from excessive clear-cutting. Let’s keep the momentum going to get it passed! **The deadline for comment is next Wednesday,** so [_**don’t miss this opportunity to tell ODF to pass the strongest possible Habitat Conservation Plan!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54972865/380218264/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZWVmNGIwLTlmNmEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JIHNutRv_NS0aeoSxLe8uECW5xe3TDmWCke-uz503kk=&emci=5dce2369-8a6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b4eef4b0-9f6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) Thank you, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV \----- FORWARD: ----- Dear Peter, I just got done testifying before the Oregon Board of Forestry (ODF) this morning. My message: **pass a strong Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP) to conserve Western Oregon’s State Forests.** A strong HCP will help protect fish, wildlife, our climate, and the drinking water of rural Oregon communities. This is why we need ODF to pass the strongest HCP possible. [_**Will you join us and ask the Oregon Board of Forestry to pass the strongest possible HCP to defend our publicly-owned forests?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54972866/380218265/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZWVmNGIwLTlmNmEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JIHNutRv_NS0aeoSxLe8uECW5xe3TDmWCke-uz503kk=&emci=5dce2369-8a6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b4eef4b0-9f6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) The Board of Forestry is accepting public comment for the next two weeks before they make a final decision. It is crucial that ODF pass a strong HCP. The health of forest ecosystems and the invaluable climate benefits they offer by storing large amounts of carbon depends on it. If passed, the HCP would limit harmful clear-cutting on public state forest lands in Western Oregon.**Many critical and endangered species, such as spotted owls, would gain better protections under a strong HCP.** Industrial logging doesn’t just hurt trees and the animals who need them – **it pollutes rivers and waterways too.** This pollution damages the habitats of threatened fish like salmon and pollutes vital drinking water resources. _Our state needs to prioritize wildlife, water, and public forest lands over clear-cutting and timber profits._ [_**Send the Board of Forestry a message urging them to pass the HCP using our easy, pre-written template!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54972867/380218266/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZWVmNGIwLTlmNmEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JIHNutRv_NS0aeoSxLe8uECW5xe3TDmWCke-uz503kk=&emci=5dce2369-8a6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b4eef4b0-9f6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) Everyone’s first experience witnessing the marvels of Oregon’s Western State Forests is unforgettable. The early-morning mist shrouding vibrant corridors of greenery. The rich aroma of old-growth Spruce trees. The squelching of mud beneath your feet as you follow a winding trail across roots and moss-covered rocks, tilting your head to the trees occasionally to identify the source of a musical birdsong echoing through silence. **State forests aren’t only invaluable to the species who dwell within, but as recreation areas for people like us.** Unfortunately, Big Timber is doing everything they can to stop the Habitat Conservation Plan. That means we need a **HUGE** outpouring of public support for a strong HCP. It’s time to send a message to the Board of Forestry making it clear that Oregonians care about our publicly owned forests and won’t tolerate excessive clear-cutting on public lands. So, [_**will you join me in asking them to pass a strong HCP and help preserve our forests for future generations?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54972868/380218267/1237686242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0ZWVmNGIwLTlmNmEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JIHNutRv_NS0aeoSxLe8uECW5xe3TDmWCke-uz503kk=&emci=5dce2369-8a6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=b4eef4b0-9f6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2107230) Thank you for your commitment to protecting our public lands, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |

clean_body: | | | Hi there, I wanted to make sure you got this message before the holiday weekend! I’m asking you to The Oregon Board of Forestry (ODF) is voting on a Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP), and the public comment period for forest-lovers like us to make our voices heard closes next Wednesday. We’ve had a phenomenal response so far, with hundreds of our supporters speaking up for a strong HCP to better protect endangered species and drinking water sources from excessive clear-cutting. Let’s keep the momentum going to get it passed! The deadline for comment is next Wednesday, so Thank you, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV \----- FORWARD: ----- Dear Peter, I just got done testifying before the Oregon Board of Forestry (ODF) this morning. My message: pass a strong Habitat Conservation Plan (HCP) to conserve Western Oregon’s State Forests. A strong HCP will help protect fish, wildlife, our climate, and the drinking water of rural Oregon communities. This is why we need ODF to pass the strongest HCP possible. The Board of Forestry is accepting public comment for the next two weeks before they make a final decision. It is crucial that ODF pass a strong HCP. The health of forest ecosystems and the invaluable climate benefits they offer by storing large amounts of carbon depends on it. If passed, the HCP would limit harmful clear-cutting on public state forest lands in Western Oregon.Many critical and endangered species, such as spotted owls, would gain better protections under a strong HCP. Industrial logging doesn’t just hurt trees and the animals who need them – it pollutes rivers and waterways too. This pollution damages the habitats of threatened fish like salmon and pollutes vital drinking water resources. Our state needs to prioritize wildlife, water, and public forest lands over clear-cutting and timber profits. Everyone’s first experience witnessing the marvels of Oregon’s Western State Forests is unforgettable. The early-morning mist shrouding vibrant corridors of greenery. The rich aroma of old-growth Spruce trees. The squelching of mud beneath your feet as you follow a winding trail across roots and moss-covered rocks, tilting your head to the trees occasionally to identify the source of a musical birdsong echoing through silence. State forests aren’t only invaluable to the species who dwell within, but as recreation areas for people like us. Unfortunately, Big Timber is doing everything they can to stop the Habitat Conservation Plan. That means we need a HUGE outpouring of public support for a strong HCP. It’s time to send a message to the Board of Forestry making it clear that Oregonians care about our publicly owned forests and won’t tolerate excessive clear-cutting on public lands. So, Thank you for your commitment to protecting our public lands, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Congress. | ---|---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:

| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4a3fc43d00d434c823fa9e3d1ae3091&_e=waVa2KMg9PKrw6EgmYWWkACahLfkarwIyiz4sbwM1UjOeQZigcjZebF0U9-I4BcPgNFn1XQY6n49AjYoLNgkb0K4EvtWH4OPYEHgnXT2Ljudv7YCTv7MGLGAI9afrPqH0e1JLOu1LMVnl4RaAxVtiUiunL0UdU_Bx-TWor7ln5liJaDWepy-tw4hHHFl4CYxHO5NRiVT4h8Y79ksogBbOUemRMoffIZj9hB2zjlv3oW8qQWUc98vlW0MVSdW7NoeHVaDCeQZ48dapRN3f5V_NYK0E8N7LjlnjBDBjUKU1RL5JwIj5c12fEpsVgaQ6TTHP9tPBA6tBY10c_JXpNKT6w%3D%3D) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4a3fc43d00d434c823fa9e3d1ae3091&_e=waVa2KMg9PKrw6EgmYWWkACahLfkarwIyiz4sbwM1UjOeQZigcjZebF0U9-I4BcPgNFn1XQY6n49AjYoLNgkb0K4EvtWH4OPYEHgnXT2Ljudv7YCTv7MGLGAI9afrPqH0e1JLOu1LMVnl4RaAxVtiUiunL0UdU_Bx-TWor7ln5liJaDWepy-tw4hHHFl4CYxpgH5xybyd4v23MxvbljSe-0gPRRKssrvD-_UjS-SIN3jUYQTOGr-udYIOi-AVJJC_i2sHtLH8AKMlP3PkOMKllg4i1zBIe5GFM8HuXfaYEi0RIlj8AoAojLJZTq5sTCxUuk2MAUNBZij3CilFWEH2w%3D%3D)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake.)

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What 's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** "They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4a3fc43d00d434c823fa9e3d1ae3091&_e=waVa2KMg9PKrw6EgmYWWkACahLfkarwIyiz4sbwM1UjOeQZigcjZebF0U9-I4BcPgNFn1XQY6n49AjYoLNgkb0K4EvtWH4OPYEHgnXT2Ljudv7YCTv7MGLGAI9afrPqH0e1JLOu1LMVnl4RaAxVtiUiunL0UdU_Bx-TWor7ln5liJaDWepy-tw4hHHFl4CYxwK1UaUNnd-Q3iDP7Cau9bNl4W915eI45yVcZUyiIry48mTXrPczwnLGyJQXCvFXxAhLz5fo-CY2vn2pNC3pK5E1i6kOWzX-IY77GXttFz0uCP5yD8LLJi5r_3r0lHbi2Mr5e8kjJ89OgZyt9YOeEUw%3D%3D)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4a3fc43d00d434c823fa9e3d1ae3091&_e=waVa2KMg9PKrw6EgmYWWkACahLfkarwIyiz4sbwM1UjOeQZigcjZebF0U9-I4BcPgNFn1XQY6n49AjYoLNgkb0K4EvtWH4OPYEHgnXT2Ljudv7YCTv7MGLGAI9afrPqH0e1JLOu1LMVnl4RaAxVtiUiunL0UdU_Bx-TWor7ln5liJaDWepy-tw4hHHFl4CYx6jReZ4N81wroCEJKCb_clExBWXQYt5rgrDHmq4CXwNizAZaAQ5LDyfqnw33LbZi963JLI92cLU-S_KzO-fJcrbBCsg-gVmHzQEj_VfGqu02IXT_kACnYpB7Bo6foi-R00_LZ62DmmtgZXtJQoeWFCg%3D%3D)

The more we can narrow the margin of the Republican majority, the more leverage we have. Can you support a fair count for this important race?

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: The Woke Mob can kick rocks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
---
| | I am sick and tired of the Woke Left running roughshod over our country. They have gone full throttle in their mission to change every single component that makes America who we are.

They will stop at nothing to bring about their liberal agenda, no matter what democratic institution they have to erode, public figures they have to cancel or businesses they have to close. _And I've had it up to my eyeballs. _
**[_There is too much riding on this fight for patriots to sit on the sidelines._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937404:6uUEtyGNL:m:1:3331421248:7EC000E45D7C403829B4C982DE7D7C85:r)** If there is one thing we can count on, it's that the Woke Mob will not rest until every politician, corporation and American caves to their _pronouns-first, real issues-last_ twisted outlook.
---
[**STOP THE WOKE MOB**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937404:6uUEtyGNL:m:1:3331421248:7EC000E45D7C403829B4C982DE7D7C85:r)
---
Peter, I won't cave. Never have, never will.

My father fought in the second World War and instilled the very conservative principles in me that men and women have died fighting to protect. American freedom is too precious to lose.

**[And we're going to have to fight like hell to save it.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937404:6uUEtyGNL:m:1:3331421248:7EC000E45D7C403829B4C982DE7D7C85:r)**
The Woke Mob fights dirty. So this is going to take each and every one of us standing up. If you're willing to join me and lock horns with the Radical Left, step up below.
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937404:6uUEtyGNL:m:1:3331421248:7EC000E45D7C403829B4C982DE7D7C85:r)
---
---
Thank you,

Patrick Morrisey
---

---

subject: The Recount Will Continue!
body:
New Hampshire Republican State Committee

| Derek --
# Democracy won today!
## The NH court system announced today that the recount in Manchester Ward 6 will continue!
## Thank you all for your continuous support as we fought for your vote and ensured that the Democrats wouldn't wrongfully steal a seat from us!
## Your contributions and support are what pushed us over the victory line--thank you!
## Please consider [donating to our election integrity fund](https://nhgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbN8VpbX8uCSwVng0pXaveQ5V090UwaiOfNGL0_Uq9-PyQ&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=recount_contiue_fr_blast_t1&n=1) so that we are further equipped to push back against the foreseeable future of Democratic voter disenfranchisement.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Gun safety is a winning issue thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The midterm elections may be over, but the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence is not.
#

Friends -
When I started this organization almost ten years ago, I didn’t know what to expect. Talking about gun safety was taboo for many elected officials and candidates in tough races. The issue was deemed as too divisive, too risky politically.
But times have changed—the results of this year’s midterm elections prove that gun safety is a winning issue. We are fired up, and we’re ready to take real action to keep our communities safe.
That’s because nobody should feel worried about attending services at their places of worship.
Nobody should feel afraid to see a movie in theaters.
No child should feel afraid to go to school.
I want to thank you so much for supporting Giffords. Since our founding, over nearly one million people have stepped up and contributed to our work to keep our communities safer from gun violence. I’m hoping that today, you will join them by making your first online contribution to Giffords PAC.
It’s clear that we have the power here to bridge the partisan divide and make sure we pass gun legislation that will save lives. We must keep moving forward, and I need you with me if we’re going to continue making progress.
[**Can I count on you to step up and make a contribution to Giffords PAC today? The midterm elections may be over, but our work to keep our communities safe from gun violence has not slowed down.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221122-1-15&t=1&akid=2778%2E3935704%2ExunzmC)

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: The midterm elections may be over, but the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence is not. Friends - When I started this organization almost ten years ago, I didn’t know what to expect. Talking about gun safety was taboo for many elected officials and candidates in tough races. The issue was deemed as too divisive, too risky politically. But times have changed—the results of this year’s midterm elections prove that gun safety is a winning issue. We are fired up, and we’re ready to take real action to keep our communities safe. That’s because nobody should feel worried about attending services at their places of worship. Nobody should feel afraid to see a movie in theaters. No child should feel afraid to go to school. I want to thank you so much for supporting Giffords. Since our founding, over nearly one million people have stepped up and contributed to our work to keep our communities safer from gun violence. I’m hoping that today, you will join them by making your first online contribution to Giffords PAC. It’s clear that we have the power here to bridge the partisan divide and make sure we pass gun legislation that will save lives. We must keep moving forward, and I need you with me if we’re going to continue making progress. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** The success of this organization is all thanks to supporters like you. So thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for all that you do. Onward, Gabby Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

body:
We aren’t kidding

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54947893/380167385/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Y5MDRmNC03ODZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IXUmuqCzMFM_fuTEqyIGKFFfN0rucpK3rS_W9l-RKoM=&emci=700d7170-126a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=bcf904f4-786a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, we aren’t exaggerating when we say that Herschel Walker could be the next Senator from Georgia.

The polls right up to November 8th had him up by one point over Rev. Warnock, and in the end, Rev. Warnock got less than 1% more votes.

We don’t have to tell you that this is going to be an extremely close race, and if we don’t do everything we can to re-elect Rev. Warnock, **_Herschel Walker could win._**

He’s got Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, shady GOP donors, and the entire RNC establishment pumping money, staff, and volunteers into his race – and if we aren’t careful, they could flip Georgia RED.

**_[But here’s what we have: you. We have a massive grassroots team that has already come together to flip Georgia blue. We changed history in 2020 and 2021, and we’re going to win again this year. Will you pitch in whatever you can, right now, to help fund our team and re-elect Rev. Warnock?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54947894/380167386/710125701?refcode=20221122.2_GADems_11DE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Y5MDRmNC03ODZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IXUmuqCzMFM_fuTEqyIGKFFfN0rucpK3rS_W9l-RKoM=)_** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Derek -
At VoteVets, we actually put your contributions to work like we say we will.

name: LCV Giving Tuesday Challenge
subject: [LCV GIVING TUESDAY]: Peter, holy moly -- this is big.
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/8wqzCN~ ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8933585&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDQxMzA3MAS2&spReportId=MTYyMDQxMzA3MAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8933585&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDQxMzA3MAS2&spReportId=MTYyMDQxMzA3MAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM- https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8933585&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDQxMzA3MAS2&spReportId=MTYyMDQxMzA3MAS2
clean_body: Time sensitive Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled ). The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now. Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now. In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen. Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters. This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises. Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline: Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including: Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040 Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team. Onward, Gene Karpinski President League of Conservation Voters

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Watch ‘Innovation Race’ at home starting today!
body:
| | |
---
On the heels of the successful theatrical premiere last week of our documentary, _Innovation Race,_ I am thrilled to announce the virtual cinematic launch happening today, Tuesday, November 22nd! **This means you can watch _Innovation Race_ from the comfort of your own home!** Simply [**go to the website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._0oG9LYNzQTPGhAA) to buy your Virtual Cinema tickets and to get all the details about how to watch! The film will be available in this format for a few weeks, so take advantage of this opportunity while you can! What’s more – we are launching with a special early Black Friday special for 40% off that will run through midnight Friday (12am 11/26/2022). _Innovation Race_ boldly explores the imminent threat of China exploiting weaknesses in U.S. patent protection and presents solutions for restoring our dominance in innovation, technology, and invention.
---
[PURCHASE TICKETS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-itTMjxQBF45S7dacUmVyg)
---
A review from _Film Threat_[ 1](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMjYtOTBjZDRhMzNkMTQ1NDU4NzgwMmE1ODFiMTYzMGUxZjciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiX2Z0bnJlZjEiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9maWxtdGhyZWF0LmNvbS9yZXZpZXdzL2lubm92YXRpb24tcmFjZS8_bWlkPTQ2MTA2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/S-XCZQa4Kb_vRCVRavGHvw), an independent movie guide, had this to say about _Innovation Race:_ _Innovation Race_ warns us of a looming threat that could not only supplant the U.S. from its decades-long top spot but could represent a fundamental global economic shift... [The documentary] is not at a loss for credible witnesses. The filmmaker interviews over two dozen experts in innovation and U.S./China relations, with the likes of Delaware Democrat Senator Chris Coons and Kentucky Republican Representative Thomas Massie for a little bipartisanship. Other notables include Brig. Gen. Robert Spalding, expert Patent lawyer, and judge Paul Michael, author of The Great U.S.-China. Tech War Gordon Chang and many inventors had their ideas and intellectual property stolen over the years... Now the question is not just figuring out our next step but whether we’re still committed to excellence and innovation anymore. And, from Seton Motley[2](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._vqJcvAIm47ky_D0HQ), Founder and President of Less Government: It is a well-produced and informative documentary chronicling the US’s crucial history of invention - and the patent protections that made that invention possible. And how - in the service of Big Tech-Big Biz-Big China cronyism - our Big Government has spent the last decade-plus fundamentally undermining these vitally important patent protections. Finally, from _IP CloseUp_[ 3](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.): A new documentary film featuring a broad range of industry experts is a call to action for the U.S. to get its research and intellectual property house in order. I hope you will be able to watch the documentary today, or in the coming weeks! Won't you make it a movie night and [join us at the (virtual) cinema?](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-PfL3UR59667Nu2ZaA) In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
|
---
**FILM SYNOPSIS** For the past century, America has been the world leader in ideas, invention, and innovation. Developing new technologies to solve complex issues as well as tools to make our lives more comfortable and efficient is the realization of the American dream for many. But our grip on ‘world leader’ status is loosening as China has emerged as a powerful political and industrial force. Today, China is threatening American innovation by exploiting weaknesses in US patent protection, and big tech is letting them get away with it. _Innovation Race_ explores these critical issues impacting all Americans, and proposes solutions for how we can restore US dominance in invention, technology and innovation.

If you would like to It's because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU that we will WIN BIG in 2022!

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s all going to come down to turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932939:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932939:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932939:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932939:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932939:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932939:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932939:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932940:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932941:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932942:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932943:JtOU_yGcN:m:1:3371220873:B2E29D846DCA7A268B1AEE8F68DA6C94:r)

Peter,
---
George Soros is hellbent on giving Democrats a _**51-seat majority**_ in the Senate.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Our work is more important than ever!
body:
You have an enormous stake in helping protect the honesty and integrity of American elections...the linchpin of our Republic.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

With the radical Left Biden administration in office, our work is increasingly urgent and important.
**[So...can I count on you to make a tax-deductible contribution today?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61157&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61157&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

**Your support now means a great deal to us because _we are fighting for important outcomes that mean a great deal_ : **
* We continue to _successfully_ do the hard work, _state by state_ , needed to protect the **integrity of our elections** against the unremitting assaults of the Left;

* We are pushing ahead on multiple legal fronts to pursue _accountability_ for the evidence that we and others have uncovered about **Biden family corruption** ;

* We are using state open records laws and the courts to **expose and challenge the abuse** of taxpayer dollars to promote Marxist **Critical Race Theory** and other racist propaganda in our schools and military;

* And we are investigating new opportunities to successfully **stop radical Left** **quotas** that discriminate based on race, gender, ethnicity and sexual orientation in violation of the law, state constitutions and the U.S. Constitution.

Our work defending the rule of law is intensifying. That means that winning these and other important legal battles will not be possible without the support of friends like you.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61157&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

For example, to ensure **honest and fair elections** , we are pursuing lawsuits against **Colorado** , **New York** and **Pennsylvania** over their failures to clean their voter rolls...and our election law team _is reviewing results from the midterm elections_ and federal data to determine additional states that we need to warn and, potentially, _sue_ over their failure to follow federal election law

And after years of work challenging **San Francisco 's and Santa Clara County's illegal sanctuary policies, **we are now ramping up our research and investigations into ways that we can most effectively use the courts and legal system to enforce accountability from the Biden administration for its criminal failure to enforce our laws against illegal immigration.

Congress and the media won't hold Joe Biden accountable for the horrible crisis he and his administration have created on our southern border... _but Judicial Watch will_!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61157&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

And when it comes to _government stonewalling_ on issues ranging from travel records and costs for "climate envoy" John Kerry; to Biden's calamitous withdrawal from Afghanistan; to Covid-19 vaccine safety studies; to Biden family corruption...

... _Judicial Watch continues to be the largest and most impactful open records litigator in the country_ , fighting every day for the American people's "right to know!"

[That's why I'm hoping you'll help us with a tax-deductible gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61157&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61157&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

Your support will allow us to investigate corruption, perform critical research, file groundbreaking lawsuits and persist with dogged determination against the radical Left.

Just as importantly, we are educating the American people about what their government is up to - which is why the Left and dishonest government officials are so desperate to stop us!

In other words, [your support is the lifeblood of all we do to fight radical Biden government lawlessness, unlawful government secrecy and corruption. Please help us again!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61157&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=)

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61157&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

clean_body: The GOP wants to take our country backward, restrict abortion rights, and more. I’m running to continue delivering for Georgia’s families. | | I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: Herschel Walker is not fit to represent the people of Georgia. The people of this state deserve better than a man who lies about his record and his values. That’s why I need you, Derek. Grassroots donations helped my campaign win our runoff last year, and they’ll make all the difference this year, too. Contributions of $10 will ensure that we can hit our daily and weekly goals before next month’s runoff. Can you split a donation between my campaign and the DNC to make that happen and elect Democrats nationwide in the years to come? I’m going to level with you: beating Herschel Walker and the Republican establishment here in Georgia will be tough. But we won in 2020 and delivered a Democratic Senate that passed consequential and historic legislation. We can win again. But it’s going to take everyone , Derek. The GOP wants to take our country backward, restrict abortion rights, and more. I’m running to continue delivering for Georgia’s families. I’m running for every community across this great state. Thank you for all you do. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Runoff Alerts (via Stand For America PAC)
subject: OT in GA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Will you support Herschel a second time?
|
---
| | | Peter,Herschel Walker doesn't quit when the game goes into overtime.

With every other Senate race called, Herschel is the Republicans' last chance to pick up a **HUGE** Senate win.

Right now, it's overtime in Georgia, and we're at the 2-minute warning. We only have **2 WEEKS** to get out the vote for Herschel. The last time we had a runoff in a Georgia Senate race, the Democrats dominated. But this time, we have a secret weapon: **YOU**. If grassroots supporters, like yourself, band together, we CAN win this final race. Will you join thousands of fellow Republicans and support Herschel Walker with just 2 weeks left to go?
---
| | | [SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938022:JIgUxyG1N:m:1:3331703221:CB028BC717FB4CE15D53E23D115E5022:r)
---
Time is running out, and Georgia is still up for grabs. We've seen what happens when we take victory for granted and when we think we'll win, but people don't show up to the polls. That's why we need to know: Do you have Herschel's back?
---

Peter,

**It was just announced that former President Barack Obama is coming back to stump for Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia's Senate runoff.**

Obama's visit on December 1st will create a lot of buzz and excitement with Democrat voters, so we need YOUR HELP to build our own momentum.

**[Watch a message from Herschel Walker and Lindsey Graham:](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=2edc49cb471f4aeeb882bea420233593&_e=D5apw2KYOy_dHvvHULf0cRnfK2EU3elr9Cyh6wGlyHptHUr__Iqkux4MakqmgYfjeU3bZxsYVfpxxGp3gdxOPmCzV2_q4DCG2U7_npzUQxcTWbzh5hECnyqFljgzB00AwddehZ9-Ewuy9olrtavim34Ay2LlCKv_iqaJLNJs2u1TYtCBakhe0A1eZQEvqkKoPtGs8cz4fCLBxs3D_HddMQ7T9FGd5D1VWHptjjJoxxHIZLGTP9dXRQlcccIlRuSu6teUeQ_pKa5Yh9zgVAT90G9qPGLdz5-gv7FDOMAUb6FQZM_vquwMYuF_hi7zKEPkHO8VfIC2irFhwjPB9WBxIarz22Q4TbktgdZRjmhEcyF_nB8kpStxVkcpqx8V-BoBe-wfRIdEUURhG-vVSW9t4iWFfnJgBOFgO9M_FIeK0Co%3D)**

[](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=2edc49cb471f4aeeb882bea420233593&_e=D5apw2KYOy_dHvvHULf0cRnfK2EU3elr9Cyh6wGlyHptHUr__Iqkux4MakqmgYfjeU3bZxsYVfpxxGp3gdxOPmCzV2_q4DCG2U7_npzUQxcTWbzh5hECnyqFljgzB00AwddehZ9-Ewuy9olrtavim34Ay2LlCKv_iqaJLNJs2u1TYtCBakhe0A1eZQEvqkKoPtGs8cz4fCLBxs3D_HddMQ7T9FGd5D1VWHptjjJoxxHIZLGTP9dXRQlcccIlRuSu6teUeQ_pKa5Yh9zgVAT90ETMnO63BFO6uA4p3Cq_Mkz-jLoHpMflGjMYycK2qgGiz7HHiM6s7MjXeF093dbqq_a-TCazPq34gv-XFnK0bj7Q_Caj7v2z2qNmNLCd2bUNFxfgN5C3J0hynCanfw9_wl_LRmPJOOs3XDUi8XkBgqk%3D)

We will save America!**
But we cannot without your help. **[Will you help us raise an additional $10,000 before Obama comes back to Georgia?](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=2edc49cb471f4aeeb882bea420233593&_e=D5apw2KYOy_dHvvHULf0cRnfK2EU3elr9Cyh6wGlyHptHUr__Iqkux4MakqmgYfjeU3bZxsYVfpxxGp3gdxOPmCzV2_q4DCG2U7_npzUQxcTWbzh5hECnyqFljgzB00AwddehZ9-Ewuy9olrtavim34Ay2LlCKv_iqaJLNJs2u1TYtCBakhe0A1eZQEvqkKoPtGs8cz4fCLBxs3D_HddMQ7T9FGd5D1VWHptjjJoxxHIZLGTP9dXRQlcccIlRuSu6teUeQ_pKa5Yh9zgVAT90FsABTrh2WZm-6mBET_MmlKp4rmrlF7X0ARab9MGNFZ4cBjCKXasWRJg0eRtmzv9huuWblpK-wA1Xo9jx1Mqa94wiSzkcUqPFaPr3nkHDow22bulBqqkexurnLd2dLvfxDWnh20J0ld-v3qQWpXdIeI%3D)**

**[Every little bit helps, whether it's $5, $10, or even $34. We must show Barack Obama, Raphael Warnock, and the Democrats we have the ground game to win.](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=2edc49cb471f4aeeb882bea420233593&_e=D5apw2KYOy_dHvvHULf0cRnfK2EU3elr9Cyh6wGlyHptHUr__Iqkux4MakqmgYfjeU3bZxsYVfpxxGp3gdxOPmCzV2_q4DCG2U7_npzUQxcTWbzh5hECnyqFljgzB00AwddehZ9-Ewuy9olrtavim34Ay2LlCKv_iqaJLNJs2u1TYtCBakhe0A1eZQEvqkKoPtGs8cz4fCLBxs3D_HddMQ7T9FGd5D1VWHptjjJoxxHIZLGTP9dXRQlcccIlRuSu6teUeQ_pKa5Yh9zgVAT90JguY_u5tCpOBQXH5iwHldbkSIE4BTfWsnCJL9y8HLx2ZPpBbrtg5Qzz0LTMpr0ibWIq5NPUwm7s-VwNdtzUnWJ16w27VREdDjwwHvZl9V7qupojbxNMfW0VOmBJmlJzDLHJZfNrgT0L3jpllrZlv_E%3D)**

Team Herschel
