name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m so grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54976003/380233228/353348678?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.22_b1_nb_all-nd&refcode2=d87593d0-ae6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODc1OTNkMC1hZTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbH4AHrGBwvg3HooyLqOxDrlcV5nVYR-s2v6JB5au_0=)
With Thanksgiving right around the corner, I wanted to reach out to personally thank you for all the support you’ve shown me since the start of my campaign.

Two weeks ago, we came together to flip IL-13 blue, and after celebrating our historic win, I got straight to work in Washington, D.C. for New Member Orientation. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54976004/380233229/353348678?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.22_b1_nb_all-nd&refcode2=d87593d0-ae6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODc1OTNkMC1hZTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbH4AHrGBwvg3HooyLqOxDrlcV5nVYR-s2v6JB5au_0=)** It has been so exciting meeting my fellow freshman colleagues and members and preparing to represent Illinois’ 13th District in the 118th Congress.
None of this would have been possible without your support. **We won because we had the grassroots enthusiasm of folks like you who believe in a brighter future for the hardworking people of Illinois.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54976005/380233230/353348678?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.22_b1_nb_all-nd&refcode2=d87593d0-ae6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODc1OTNkMC1hZTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbH4AHrGBwvg3HooyLqOxDrlcV5nVYR-s2v6JB5au_0=)** I have a lot to be thankful for this year, and I am most thankful to you for giving me the ability to serve in Congress. It is the greatest honor of my life, and I am eager to get to work on your behalf.
Wishing you and your loved ones a very Happy Thanksgiving.
All my best,
Nikki
| [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54976006/380233231/353348678?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.22_b1_nb_all-nd&refcode2=d87593d0-ae6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODc1OTNkMC1hZTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbH4AHrGBwvg3HooyLqOxDrlcV5nVYR-s2v6JB5au_0=)
---

Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

clean_body: = With Thanksgiving right around the corner, I wanted to reach out to personally thank you for all the support you’ve shown me since the start of my campaign. Two weeks ago, we came together to flip IL-13 blue, and after celebrating our historic win, I got straight to work in Washington, D.C. for New Member Orientation. = It has been so exciting meeting my fellow freshman colleagues and members and preparing to represent Illinois’ 13th District in the 118th Congress. None of this would have been possible without your support. We won because we had the grassroots enthusiasm of folks like you who believe in a brighter future for the hardworking people of Illinois. = I have a lot to be thankful for this year, and I am most thankful to you for giving me the ability to serve in Congress. It is the greatest honor of my life, and I am eager to get to work on your behalf. Wishing you and your loved ones a very Happy Thanksgiving. All my best, Nikki | = Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. . | | =

name: Josh Harder
subject: My thoughts on Trump’s announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cC0fbuUVc8j1bkKBeVBP_LAFW3pdteMFLgIDMmjpxUM=/33xw2SCMn0pw7aaictdIJmC07Edrx7SlNHd5Nnw8fxo=?refcode=E19492-20221121-TrumpAnnouncement-header-Trump-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25)** | Peter, By now, you've heard the news. Trump is running for President again in 2024. What do I think? Well, **we now have another existential threat to democracy on our hands.** Clearly Trump won't admit he was defeated in 2020, so we're simply going to have to do it again in 2024. I don't mean to sound flippant, it's going to take an incredible amount of work to beat him. But I'll tell you where the battle actually starts - right here in the halls of Congress. Will Republicans allow Marjorie Taylor Greene and the extremist caucus to control their party? Will they let election deniers who stoked January 6th take over their party? If they do, I believe we're in for a very tough next two years as Trump runs for office. Every conspiracy theory and lie that comes out of Trump's mouth will have a thousand-fold microphone with them in power. **But it doesn 't have to be that way.** Representatives like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger showed us there are still Washington Republicans with a backbone. The question is - are there any Republicans in DC like that left? I truly hope some of my Republican colleagues step up. In the meantime, I'm ready to do my part. To speak truth to power and fight back in all the ways I can. We cannot let Trump ever step foot back in the White House again. \- Josh
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cC0fbuUVc8j1bkKBeVBP_LAFW3pdteMFLgIDMmjpxUM=/J6h40Nh96U-C8G2AYrk2lgzNwlt0FCqDRfUgdDaucP8=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/cC0fbuUVc8j1bkKBeVBP_LAFW3pdteMFLgIDMmjpxUM=/UwPQalSvQpnTL0j3FnQK4XKb_sks3tDG2NFaBmnI3mU=)

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e983bf2c7494818876ae712ae73dcba&_e=dx0SfkUx8gSeCHWM-VIkhDtAcPmbYgS6zx63tfMk8Le4AwaXZOdC5-Cdk4PL9uq6V3A9toxaX2dNKDoDA5MGsaPTOmODn005sWEv3orXmrTgyAbPaAgs8C-tEp07ruTmZiGRCoGiOhKz3_Gc4WCKbQ3_vd4oHvtjYLHye8iEmli9Qw_gTRk_EJ7H5869IJMNYpeh0BEAdMEKuWGf7oO4zEYG-R3-nnuY9AAv1buoaZ8rqrbDAuAwbTp8Ix9qaGw30E1fiNr42igRhjBj9Kax-wEjXvHxIxCP7Q2TyilGVOLt8kRFwwHtYUHJ-D5t7rsr)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e983bf2c7494818876ae712ae73dcba&_e=dx0SfkUx8gSeCHWM-VIkhDtAcPmbYgS6zx63tfMk8Le4AwaXZOdC5-Cdk4PL9uq6V3A9toxaX2dNKDoDA5MGsaPTOmODn005sWEv3orXmrTgyAbPaAgs8C-tEp07ruTmZiGRCoGiOhKz3_Gc4WCKbQ3_vd4oHvtjYLHye8iEmlgIb3aKlKty9FFGhov63rjzCPHOq7WcgU4RMcMcuAmfV7UR2D1_hrYTQfYKju6YjoP_xHULz3S85OigNlQAlDRW8jrtyRH095Gdy9YssairXihFYG0TwP9mzsNy-JN-QvE3GaWxEF_jY5dvSa0zTMpc)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e983bf2c7494818876ae712ae73dcba&_e=dx0SfkUx8gSeCHWM-VIkhDtAcPmbYgS6zx63tfMk8Le4AwaXZOdC5-Cdk4PL9uq6V3A9toxaX2dNKDoDA5MGsaPTOmODn005sWEv3orXmrTgyAbPaAgs8C-tEp07ruTmZiGRCoGiOhKz3_Gc4WCKbQ3_vd4oHvtjYLHye8iEmlgcqSdoW4HnIUFe2hiYkQneVenWqZeqyqwyRBqLjfI2RV4c1kKcycPNWhX4-lQ5tQi4-gj339RsAMgp-zdopXVDPvE20L44NSdQio2dG64bq82OcgB3_gWlwEE_OyOQnW3PFPbsHsWi7peIIJuxQSd4)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e983bf2c7494818876ae712ae73dcba&_e=dx0SfkUx8gSeCHWM-VIkhDtAcPmbYgS6zx63tfMk8Le4AwaXZOdC5-Cdk4PL9uq6V3A9toxaX2dNKDoDA5MGsaPTOmODn005sWEv3orXmrTgyAbPaAgs8C-tEp07ruTmZiGRCoGiOhKz3_Gc4WCKbQ3_vd4oHvtjYLHye8iEmljmsbaT3Oewc4Wx7zjVKuHjzGjfvcrT6GJN6GoFSKtuXns5MgRq5b67x2PETo0i7IswNVYhSu_8EHOfcc-LSFUSza19muCuGyjUsiJJAyD80hH2xs0-vkKZJK4wJLuKZMxtyRljTwZ7q-vasQDtNx2o)

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can't do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: 1 missed message from Tim Scott
subject: FWD: An oxymoron
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Tim Scott personally reached out the other day, Peter, and we wanted to make sure you didn't miss his important message.

He doesn't take asking for money lightly and knows the value of a dollar raises every day in Biden's America.

**_[Your contribution today, whether it be $25, $50, or $100, allows State Republicans to fight and ensure that our voices are heard and our country's future is protected.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938077:J_J-eyGqN:m:1:3346849603:7C47F29BA5CD871B67DCDDC0228568A3:r "Your contribution
today, whether it be $1, $10, or $100, allows State Republicans to fight and ensure that our voices are heard and our country’s future
is protected.")_**
---
| | [JOIN TIM TO SUPPORT STATE GOP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938078:J_J-eyGqN:m:1:3346849603:7C47F29BA5CD871B67DCDDC0228568A3:r)
---
Tim Scott believes in our country and wants to create better opportunities for the next generation, and it begins in the states.

If it weren't for unwavering supporters like you, Peter, Tim's fight would not be possible, but we've got to continue his strides in order to reclaim the country we know and love. Will you join Tim Scott today to help fight for America?
---
| | [JOIN TIM TO SUPPORT STATE GOP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938079:J_J-eyGqN:m:1:3346849603:7C47F29BA5CD871B67DCDDC0228568A3:r)
---

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
Subject: An oxymoron
From: Tim Scott
To: <_**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938078:J_J-eyGqN:m:1:3346849603:7C47F29BA5CD871B67DCDDC0228568A3:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**_ >

Peter,

First, Joe Biden told voters, "you ain't black" if they were still deciding between voting for him or Donald Trump.

Then, a liberal MSNBC guest called Winsome Sears 'The Black Mouth Of White Supremacy' when she became the first woman elected to the office of Lt. Governor in Virginia as a Black Republican.

Now, the co-host of "The View," Sunny Hostin, said on air that she "doesn't understand black Republicans," and that a black Republican is "an oxymoron."

I've seen more than my share of vicious opposition from "liberals" who want to tear me down simply because my life story is a direct rebuke to everything they're constantly saying about how our nation is "irredeemably racist" and how the "deck is stacked against" people like me.

I am the first African American Republican to serve in the U.S. Senate since 1979. And I am the first African American EVER to represent South Carolina in the U.S. Senate.

Peter, Democrats' divisiveness only hurts our country, and it is deeply saddening to see.

**[I'm reaching out to you today because I know I can count on you to show the Democrats that the GOP is indeed the big tent party - and we won't let their divisiveness tear our nation down.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938077:J_J-eyGqN:m:1:3346849603:7C47F29BA5CD871B67DCDDC0228568A3:r "I’m
reaching out to you today because I know I can count on you to show the Democrats that the GOP is indeed the big tent party - and we won’t let
their divisiveness tear our nation down.")**

As a Black man from South Carolina who was raised by a single mom who routinely worked double shifts to provide for my brother and me, I will always be grateful for the opportunities our nation has provided me and my family.

And I will defend those opportunities for your family and for the next generation. **[That's why I am asking that you join me and support State GOP Leaders that are upholding the values that make our country Great.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938077:J_J-eyGqN:m:1:3346849603:7C47F29BA5CD871B67DCDDC0228568A3:r "That’s why I am asking that you join me and support State GOP Leaders that are upholding
the values that make our country Great.")**
---
| | [JOIN ME & SUPPORT STATE GOP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938078:J_J-eyGqN:m:1:3346849603:7C47F29BA5CD871B67DCDDC0228568A3:r)
---
Your support today is crucial to help more State Republicans stand up against Joe Biden's radical administration and protect the American Dream before it's permanently destroyed by open borders and Socialism.

Thank you in advance, Peter for supporting State Republican candidates at this important time for America.

Sincerely,

Senator Tim Scott (R - South Carolina)
---
| | [DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938078:J_J-eyGqN:m:1:3346849603:7C47F29BA5CD871B67DCDDC0228568A3:r)
---
| |
---

| Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
---
1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675
Washington, DC 20004

Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible.

This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate.

This solicitation seeks only funds that comply with the contribution limits and source prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from individuals in excess of $2,900 and contributions from corporations will not be accepted.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
#
Friends: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a donor to our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**
My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.
Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you chip in $3 or more right now so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221122-1-tt1&t=1&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml)
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221122-1-tt1&t=2&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml)
I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.
**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win – now more than ever.**
[**So please, I'm personally asking: Will you donate $3 or more to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221122-1-tt1&t=3&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml)
Thank you,
Reverend Warnock
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221122-1-tt1&t=4&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml)
Mandela is counting on people like you to fund this campaign. [**Make a contribution to stand with Mandela today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandela-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=4092_196590_K5v4ml&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml)
Be sure to [**visit our campaign store**](https://store.mandelabarnes.com/?t=9&akid=4092%2E196590%2EK5v4ml) to check out all of the latest Mandela merchandise.
To receive important updates from our campaign, text JOIN to 99749 or [**if you're on a mobile device, follow this link to opt in to text updates.**](https://mandela.afy.ai/GaB1F)
[](https://mandela.afy.ai/GaB1F)
By providing your cell phone number you consent to receive recurring text message updates from Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin, including by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Message and data rates may apply. [Privacy Policy](https://mandelabarnes.com/privacy-policy) and [Terms of Service](https://mandelabarnes.com/terms-of-service).
Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I’ll keep this short:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
Peter,

I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.

So please, will you split $10 between me and Linda Sánchez today to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia? (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-san-warnock-2022?refcode=BLU-SAN-20221118-1-EM&amount=10)

Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: These kids want to celebrate America
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Fellow Patriot, THOUSANDS of patriotic young people are already eager to attend Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST this year -- and I don't want to have to turn away ANY of them!
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
**With support from grassroots patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST can be the TIPPING POINT in our efforts to make kids love America again and WIN the American Culture War.** _That's why the Turning Point USA team and I are working to bring AS MANY students AS POSSIBLE to this year's AmericaFest!_ [**Will you help sponsor a Conservative student to attend AmericaFest this year? A gift of $50 will help sponsor ONE MORE STUDENT to attend AmericaFest ... a gift of $100 will help sponsor TWO MORE STUDENTS ... and the more you give, the more students you can support.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[ Sponsor 1 student ($50)](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._jADwS2WSw)
---
[Sponsor 2 students ($100)](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[Sponsor 3 students ($150)](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[Help sponsor for any amount](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-2oSQ)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
**AMERICAFEST is the best celebration of America you'll see all year.** It's an energizing, empowering, and exhilarating experience for young conservatives as they close out their year and prepare to enter the next. As we approach this year's event, we have already confirmed top-shelf speakers like **Candace Owens, Tucker Carlson, Newt Gingrich, Matt Walsh,** and more to be announced soon... ... which is probably why we expect at least **_TEN THOUSAND_** young conservatives to join us for this amazing patriotic event! But with your support of the **AMERICAFEST SCHOLARSHIP FUND** , we can bring EVEN MORE young Americans to this life-changing event and help them rediscover their love for our country. [**Please make a generous gift of $50, $100, $150, or whatever you can possibly afford today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) **I have spent TEN YEARS criss-crossing America to speak directly with young people about American Greatness.** And I must tell you that I have never before seen: Young people SO FIRED UP with Patriotism and Love of our great Country Leftists SO FURIOUS and AFRAID of how Turning Point USA is inspiring the next generation to reject Socialism and "Woke" culture Our Pro-America Movement have such a TREMENDOUS OPPORTUNITY to make kids love America again and WIN the American Culture War FOR GOOD! _This year's AmericaFest is more important than EVER, and I want to make sure EVERY young patriot who wants to attend can join us in Arizona for the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America!_ **I hope that I can count on you to JUMP-START Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST SCHOLARSHIP FUND.** [**Please make your MOST GENEROUS gift in support of Turning Point USA's AmericaFest right now. Whether you're able to help sponsor ONE STUDENT for $50 ... TWO STUDENTS for $100 ... THREE STUDENTS for $150 ... or to contribute to this important event with another amount, YOUR SUPPORT will make a powerful difference to our success.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[ Help sponsor young Conservatives](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzI5MjcifQ/FZWq295het5mJFO6dUeBFQ)
---
Thank YOU for standing with Turning Point USA to build the NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots! For America,
---
| | Charlie Kirk Founder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
---
[Support Turning Point USA](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzI5MjcifQ/5Y0IqY0Z9WY550w1dK-CNQ)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzI2LWEzY2RhZmNmYzQ5MzRkZDhiZTQ1ZmQ5OTM3ZjQ3MmQzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/qL2asiPDr8TPly9aTBwWbA) to unsubscribe.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Nancy Pelosi was the first woman to serve as House speaker and has done so with grace, grit, and intelligence. She has ALWAYS put our Democracy first and deserves respect and gratitude. We’re sending her this MASSIVE digital card to tell her THANK YOU for all she’s done as House Speaker. And we want you to be the first to sign! [There are only [10] slots available for Pennsylvania Democrats to sign Nancy Pelosi’s Thank You card. Please add your name now:]() | She’s going to LOVE this, Team Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . Friend,
---
It’s official: We’ve reclaimed the House majority from Pelosi’s control!
---
While this victory gives us a much-needed check on Biden and Kamala’s disastrous agenda, _the next Republican majority MUST be more than just a stopgap._
---
There’s no denying the outcome of the midterms was not the red wave so many predicted, but control of the House still gives us the chance to deliver victories for the American people.
---
**Simply put, this next majority needs to _FIGHT FOR YOU_. That is my measure of success for our majority over the next 2 years.**
---
_But to ensure I accomplish that mission, I’m counting on my most trusted grassroots supporters to tell me what issues matter most to you._

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! They're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f622f584c04b4e6ca5880bd314460927&_e=to3s0gVlD69Ygylyv4KV8xlbv9A_oBiTrvLb7E8uEw0dXArp1SVfgW5FlPpJjO5hKGGI4IYgw75DROxdOKY50EBdMMcx-RfAhfpOr6K2jU7Ez3tNHaDKqgo8jiP_EV0zXLa_a2FQ5LrapLGFawxywIevOnRdQkAirFsZrDL7wz3opbYmvD6UJOj3dUm39kXiF2DstKuTLj5iyb8qrI_LkNV1TvUvBpS1qVv4FxKZ3GyrwdUW1Muo5QIMgFqoxqFYW0MHblmhedKUxzI4Bu0xWngzID3MdGCuUMuMod7RPLu39hM4KO3KmynPDHCkfrd7)

| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f622f584c04b4e6ca5880bd314460927&_e=to3s0gVlD69Ygylyv4KV8xlbv9A_oBiTrvLb7E8uEw0dXArp1SVfgW5FlPpJjO5hKGGI4IYgw75DROxdOKY50EBdMMcx-RfAhfpOr6K2jU7Ez3tNHaDKqgo8jiP_EV0zXLa_a2FQ5LrapLGFawxywIevOnRdQkAirFsZrDL7wz1zlgHl_K2xBl_suvhOJqj1nv03u9kQqqEsLIrL9Mm1X-fc906520czhyDaC4-UeeHFK506PI4zzljQA14orQuaE2ZvjbxYDqn-NJxwedvg-kvPsMgtncvQMRSP86JryvcZvRUaFFQ9QEWXN4YDOUX0) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f622f584c04b4e6ca5880bd314460927&_e=to3s0gVlD69Ygylyv4KV8xlbv9A_oBiTrvLb7E8uEw0dXArp1SVfgW5FlPpJjO5hKGGI4IYgw75DROxdOKY50EBdMMcx-RfAhfpOr6K2jU7Ez3tNHaDKqgo8jiP_EV0zXLa_a2FQ5LrapLGFawxywIevOnRdQkAirFsZrDL7wz0L0csWo0l3uaujInUv-6Va8ETncgf7uYOhp4dHI7aULXpcTnRcYpXQF_-mM6GecWfLxKSGPF2ecwnSVdygegGNrB4qcgZU34JLbQ5JE1STIGXEhDVtYj47gcD8I-5ZLCtVQKuCAS4xGN8bB8inVMBR)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f622f584c04b4e6ca5880bd314460927&_e=to3s0gVlD69Ygylyv4KV8xlbv9A_oBiTrvLb7E8uEw0dXArp1SVfgW5FlPpJjO5hKGGI4IYgw75DROxdOKY50EBdMMcx-RfAhfpOr6K2jU7Ez3tNHaDKqgo8jiP_EV0zXLa_a2FQ5LrapLGFawxywIevOnRdQkAirFsZrDL7wz3yDZVt9eWXJjntjCkQxryVb-bvooOfTlaHx8tftbZrt2XVn3aBXdGnqpwlHF-XCgkbsdrd4sWlmyuADUi9s1hEK4PgoUTsTXiRkwUEbNz1ONVaO5Kmf3Vsuw8BLctaJi0FvOMecihwaTp_qxXySs-C)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f622f584c04b4e6ca5880bd314460927&_e=to3s0gVlD69Ygylyv4KV8xlbv9A_oBiTrvLb7E8uEw0dXArp1SVfgW5FlPpJjO5hKGGI4IYgw75DROxdOKY50EBdMMcx-RfAhfpOr6K2jU7Ez3tNHaDKqgo8jiP_EV0zXLa_a2FQ5LrapLGFawxywIevOnRdQkAirFsZrDL7wz0qcX2pHy0q2q2tW3nE6OJSpX0ygCc5QYoiJG3Oio-MQgS5cRQW6RK-8jr5R37z7HBqH8fzb8qJodIKYaAlA3BkdAdZj5iO9hEjWTPEBo7cSBW1PjZc7JiOHhZC6XHSzA8mr6Y2AP6yCz-Lj_FBhHwy)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f622f584c04b4e6ca5880bd314460927&_e=to3s0gVlD69Ygylyv4KV8xlbv9A_oBiTrvLb7E8uEw0dXArp1SVfgW5FlPpJjO5hKGGI4IYgw75DROxdOKY50EBdMMcx-RfAhfpOr6K2jU7Ez3tNHaDKqgo8jiP_EV0zXLa_a2FQ5LrapLGFawxywIevOnRdQkAirFsZrDL7wz1-4tg7bPoervpxR5-KDnoiH9dscIQakz9jbdnVJjzU5OV4id49dCsBs9nmkUuEmrhSBwhFqnw48ktu8LuJvaz77yIGyGq_RHSbKy1BQzmmVeyfiZLK2FRkHZyxJXL236d0AiLABP32fuzxsPd1-8XZ)
---

clean_body: Crafting the initiatives we need means we need to hear from you. After a tense midterm election season, it’s time to regroup. That means we need to hear from you. Your involvement in our campaign this past cycle was critical to our success, and as we gear up for next year’s legislative session, it is important that we have your input on the issues that are most critical to you. When Lisa goes to Washington, we all go to Washington. But to make sure Lisa has the tools she needs to be your voice in Congress, she wants to hear more about the issues directly affecting you and your community. Only with your input can we truly craft the people-conscious policies we need to move our nation forward and create a brighter Delaware for every citizen. Lisa’s looking forward to hearing from you, team, so please complete this as soon as you have a free moment. Thanks, Team LBR Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Morrisey?=
subject: The Woke Mob can kick rocks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
Go Woke, go broke. | | | | | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I am sick and tired of the Woke Left running roughshod over our country. They have gone full throttle in their mission to change every single component that makes America who we are.

They will stop at nothing to bring about their liberal agenda, no matter what democratic institution they have to erode, public figures they have to cancel or businesses they have to close. _And I’ve had it up to my eyeballs._
**[_There is too much riding on this fight for patriots to sit on the sidelines._](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1868905e9b&e=fdefed58de)** If there is one thing we can count on, it’s that the Woke Mob will not rest until every politician, corporation and American caves to their _pronouns-first, real issues-last_ twisted outlook.
---
[**STOP THE WOKE MOB**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=bee39bbb89&e=fdefed58de)
---
Fellow Conservative, I won’t cave. Never have, never will.

My father fought in the second World War and instilled the very conservative principles in me that men and women have died fighting to protect. American freedom is too precious to lose.

**[And we’re going to have to fight like hell to save it.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0d94a605a0&e=fdefed58de)**
The Woke Mob fights dirty. So this is going to take each and every one of us standing up. If you’re willing to join me and lock horns with the Radical Left, step up below.
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ef72df2c40&e=fdefed58de)
---

---
Thank you,

Patrick Morrisey
---

---

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=db43861ca448459b81a8c0f8237e1746&_e=TZO-wZtN21fn2e4bAWJ3t8iNFfmH_Rmcf0qnNB6ZYtr1jkQFCPbgP8RpmCRBdDAjo5FUISaDGimM-tvSwQ9xxPjEQ6A0ksZLfcERs4f6VXNQyMdNHtmen2g6v2LE7aiUK9gTwKtvQa__8UVlo9Jdrv3ZHEaBt1E7Rpv1_y1Kcl42UHXqXN9iyIAkkpMALFqTY3sCBw62vwNs7Qrcv9H1ODOU0W1EqBZhXEJ8t85rpI179FOmRWkkRLIikGh5yO_DmOuwlsFEVSSG9v4J7Kk6C1zOkeqgEpaYkTPJOMm-cKGnTxk6JoCPsba7l16db_Io6KHNwA1WouMr7S6BmrLjEA%3D%3D)

Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.**

Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.**

But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.**

**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!**

As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.**

If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

**“They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”**

That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=db43861ca448459b81a8c0f8237e1746&_e=TZO-wZtN21fn2e4bAWJ3t8iNFfmH_Rmcf0qnNB6ZYtr1jkQFCPbgP8RpmCRBdDAjo5FUISaDGimM-tvSwQ9xxPjEQ6A0ksZLfcERs4f6VXNQyMdNHtmen2g6v2LE7aiUK9gTwKtvQa__8UVlo9Jdrv3ZHEaBt1E7Rpv1_y1Kcl42UHXqXN9iyIAkkpMALFqTmUMC6vzHYhZ0QzRPYmy5dbleaiIjrdoe2nhSqDReOxmAxt0AB1rRCp4yxorQooX_UB9M81eNuTbd13S3y2huz_h_1lC8eGz2oSGOdKFIQMn2Mc-eSkWiiX8MQhy63x74O-LDarx3rbvMkKVEekSvww%3D%3D)

I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=db43861ca448459b81a8c0f8237e1746&_e=TZO-wZtN21fn2e4bAWJ3t8iNFfmH_Rmcf0qnNB6ZYtr1jkQFCPbgP8RpmCRBdDAjo5FUISaDGimM-tvSwQ9xxPjEQ6A0ksZLfcERs4f6VXNQyMdNHtmen2g6v2LE7aiUK9gTwKtvQa__8UVlo9Jdrv3ZHEaBt1E7Rpv1_y1Kcl42UHXqXN9iyIAkkpMALFqTeBdoFc8W1zLO-9qXl0hEvqrjw1545-pVKXfSwol1MFNf1JMYYWN7mSFbGuKkehFO9ynrBNiqRLANFDXjiVFMSRjkt-3YW_F56S5LyhhXLxbxXeaPhlIYCTcZSCV7To7PMRMrd3FKxI_aV_YzhancKg%3D%3D)

clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: Georgia’s runoff is almost here. = | = = This is a crucial election with a razor-thin margin. Millions of dollars from Republican mega-donors are flooding in to keep the U.S. Senate 50-50, and time is running out to get out the vote. In a situation like this, every organizer on the ground, every door knocked, and, yes, every vote really counts. Every single vote could mean the difference for any number of policies enacted impacting millions of lives. It’s why we, the New Pennsylvania Project, are heading there ourselves to support the New Georgia Project and their efforts on the ground. = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 2023, TBD GENERAL: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: David Horowitz
subject: Top 20 Hollywood Liberal Degenerates
body:
If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood elite. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6481%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=aKkf%2fiyP27ryJb5tMwLNlg&sysid=1)
| | | Dear friend, If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood elite. For all their glamorous parading on red carpets, and their self-righteous posturing about social justice, Tinseltown is teeming with _permanently damaged children_ , _spoiled brats_ , and _liberal degenerates_. I’m sick and tired of these virtue-signaling narcissists being given a megaphone by the mainstream media who ask _no questions_ about their blatant hatemongering. _So, I came up with a solution:_
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83345%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T3l%2beM4FAP%2fprVPL82t5Mg&sysid=1)
---
Since these Hollywood liberals only care about filling their mansions with pointless awards and trophies, why don’t I give them the award they _truly_ deserve. **The distinguished honor of being one of the _20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_.** In fact, I even put this list in a new pamphlet the Freedom Center just published, and I want you to have a copy of it so you can read it for yourself. **[Friend, if you donate $10 or more to the Freedom Center today, I will you send you a complimentary copy of _The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83346%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3E23nEhuM2diKqCNwCBEpA&sysid=1)**
---
[**DONATE TO THE FREEDOM CENTER TODAY TO RECEIVE YOUR COMPLIMENTARY PAMPHLET**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83347%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yrVDaBT8TjIqBy4cUtY5ig&sysid=1)
---
This pamphlet goes into detail about the vile, poisonous beliefs and actions of the Hollywood elite. From Jane Fonda to Kathy Griffin to Ron Pearlman and even to some that may surprise you. These elitist leftists need to be EXPOSED and not given a voice to spew their hatred of America. Here at the Freedom Center - headquartered in the liberal epicenter of Hollywood - we’re in Ground Zero fighting to end the reign of these Marxist elites who our society idolizes. Why are we taking this fight directly to the source? Well, let me briefly share with you my story. My name is David Horowitz. I’m committed to ending the reign of Marxist elites because 50 years ago... I _was _a Marxist. I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers - who the Hollywood Elite still idolize to this day. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. **Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible.** So, I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and dedicated my life to exposing them.
---
[**DONATE TO THE FREEDOM CENTER TODAY TO RECEIVE YOUR COMPLIMENTARY PAMPHLET**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83347%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yrVDaBT8TjIqBy4cUtY5ig&sysid=1)
---
I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, _we would lose our country forever._ And, to be frank with you, I simply can’t stand back and watch these coddled, Hollywood-bubble celebrities fantasize about Communism and Marxism and convince our young people it’s the way of the future. _Communism is nothing but a lie_. And it’s ironic that the most wealthy and privileged in our society so desperately want to be ushered into Communistic poverty. That’s why myself and my Freedom Center are 100% dedicated to exposing these liberal elites and shining a light on how poisonous their beliefs really are. I want you to see for yourself just how vile this is. [**That’s why I will send you a complimentary copy of The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers when you give a $10 or more donation to my Freedom Center.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83348%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lSUkVx842kW6ag6kA3McLA&sysid=1) Your $10 or more donation to the Freedom Center today won’t just secure yourself a complimentary copy of _The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_ , but it will be put to immediate use in our mission to expose Hollywood’s plan to destroy America and our free society. No longer will the elites get a “free pass” to be disgusting hatemongers. It’s time to expose them, hold them accountable, and take away their megaphones. Thank you for joining me and the Freedom Center in this mission!
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83349%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=npnPV6YMAXrJFz3wGmUHPQ&sysid=1)
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. Don’t forget to claim your complimentary copy of _The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers_ pamphlet! clean_body: If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood elite. | | | Dear friend, If you’ve turned on your TV any time in the past 5 years, you’ve seen the liberal insanity that spews from the Hollywood elite. For all their glamorous parading on red carpets, and their self-righteous posturing about social justice, Tinseltown is teeming with permanently damaged children , spoiled brats , and liberal degenerates. I’m sick and tired of these virtue-signaling narcissists being given a megaphone by the mainstream media who ask no questions about their blatant hatemongering. So, I came up with a solution: Since these Hollywood liberals only care about filling their mansions with pointless awards and trophies, why don’t I give them the award they truly deserve. The distinguished honor of being one of the 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers. In fact, I even put this list in a new pamphlet the Freedom Center just published, and I want you to have a copy of it so you can read it for yourself. This pamphlet goes into detail about the vile, poisonous beliefs and actions of the Hollywood elite. From Jane Fonda to Kathy Griffin to Ron Pearlman and even to some that may surprise you. These elitist leftists need to be EXPOSED and not given a voice to spew their hatred of America. Here at the Freedom Center - headquartered in the liberal epicenter of Hollywood - we’re in Ground Zero fighting to end the reign of these Marxist elites who our society idolizes. Why are we taking this fight directly to the source? Well, let me briefly share with you my story. My name is David Horowitz. I’m committed to ending the reign of Marxist elites because 50 years ago... I was a Marxist. I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers - who the Hollywood Elite still idolize to this day. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So, I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. And, to be frank with you, I simply can’t stand back and watch these coddled, Hollywood-bubble celebrities fantasize about Communism and Marxism and convince our young people it’s the way of the future. Communism is nothing but a lie. And it’s ironic that the most wealthy and privileged in our society so desperately want to be ushered into Communistic poverty. That’s why myself and my Freedom Center are 100% dedicated to exposing these liberal elites and shining a light on how poisonous their beliefs really are. I want you to see for yourself just how vile this is. Your $10 or more donation to the Freedom Center today won’t just secure yourself a complimentary copy of The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers , but it will be put to immediate use in our mission to expose Hollywood’s plan to destroy America and our free society. No longer will the elites get a “free pass” to be disgusting hatemongers. It’s time to expose them, hold them accountable, and take away their megaphones. Thank you for joining me and the Freedom Center in this mission! Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. Don’t forget to claim your complimentary copy of The 20 Dumbest Hollywood Hatemongers pamphlet! body:
This race is now the most important fight in America.

| Peter, In the wake of the Midterm Election, one thing is absolutely clear: **[the fate of our nation depends on winning the Georgia Runoff Election](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9WlXpsKM3RPkr_vOIzXsu3vML_Grss9drw7uA9sfmMpyfH6G5wJ4Q99l9q5BBiG0hxL0a3r3BFEHRRHbVWnlTwgUsv-I3WRZ3GQrUngF-q54Id0FF3qP665DNGep9AuxlWnUypOwKNcozeerg2UF6j_io_TESkF7bxfspbUe_UtitD06fFrX-EnHwJKKUG_18kvifjkdzGnxr22gT_UEl5ebU3bqF-Zj5Qjz7C5JcMzBeV4Aoybi9863YHqWSSE1m6KtCeZWri4zKTyLtCmMCj163usWyUADOYxiHrTD7WIFM78qsrUkheG-pTATzU2NHcFZfZ4Tdtr8dchQdXiBgGLA9v-3CmnKsGRdwXJgpPNT_x5D_6Jrn8nPM67pB9kcj&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20221111_hd_georgia_runoff_04&n=1)**. name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Building the Foundation for a Brighter Future
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501163133%2501100619%2b-%2b11-22-2022%2beNewsletter%250115542.39196154.5952349.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501163133%2501100619%2b-%2b11-22-2022%2beNewsletter%250115542.39196154.5952349.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **November 22, 2022** |
---|---|---|---
| | | On November 8th, over a million Marylanders made their voices heard at the ballot box. Our democracy depends on the participation of an engaged citizenry, and I thank the people of Maryland for your strong vote of confidence to continue representing you in the United States Senate. [I promise to do everything I can to uphold your trust.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1590197958934351872&redir_log=991333231998374) I'm proud of all we've achieved - especially over the past two years alongside the Biden-Harris Administration. But there's much more to do. I look forward to continuing to work on a wide range of issues important to our country, including building a more inclusive economy that works for everyone, not just those already at the top; advancing social and racial justice; protecting the right to vote and a woman's right to reproductive freedom; confronting the climate crisis; and so much more. We have our work cut out for us - but I am confident that we can succeed if we stand united. It's in that spirit that [I hope you continue to stay engaged](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285).
---
### Rebuilding Maryland's Infrastructure
Last year, we passed an historic law to bring our infrastructure into the 21st century. Through this initiative, we are already delivering over $7 billion to Maryland over the next five years for everything from transit and heavy rail - to roads, bridges, and tunnels - to water and sewer systems - to broadband and electric vehicle charging stations - and more. Funds are already out the door and supporting projects in Maryland's communities, and I recently joined White House Infrastructure Coordinator Mitch Landrieu at Fort McHenry to announce a [$43 million investment funded by the infrastructure law](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1578187186402312193&redir_log=575293614426373) to dredge the channels that allow the Port of Baltimore to service large ships that import and export goods every day - and support thousands of good-paying jobs in Maryland. These funds enable the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers to use the dredged material from shipping channels to restore two severely-eroded islands in the Chesapeake Bay and preserve local wildlife by protecting their habitats. Those two islands also help buffer communities along the Bay coastline from storm surges and flooding. It's a win-win: strengthening commerce at the Port while restoring key ecosystems along the Bay. This is just one example of how the infrastructure law is bolstering our economy, protecting our environment, and moving Maryland forward. And this effort goes hand-in-hand with the Army Corps' important work to [restore oyster habitats in key Bay tributaries](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1583923847299887105&redir_log=205943448544375), with the help of NOAA and other federal partners.
### Fighting Back Against Sickle Cell Disease
An estimated 100,000 Americans live with Sickle Cell Disease, a condition that mutates the shape of red blood cells and can lead to pain, seizure, infection, stroke, and even death. This illness exacts a daily toll on families across America - especially in Black communities. Last year, my office lost a beloved member of our team to Sickle Cell Disease: John Amara Walters, who died just a few months before his 30th birthday. John was a brilliant thinker and a generous friend, and he was deeply committed to serving the State of Maryland and the American people. Since John passed, I've been working with his mother - Kimberley Davis - colleagues in Congress, and advocates across the country to find ways to provide better care to Americans struggling with Sickle Cell and to advance our fight to defeat this disease. Over the past few months, I've introduced the [Sickle Cell Care Expansion Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-booker-introduce-bill-to-improve-access-to-care-quality-of-life-for-sickle-cell-disease-patients&redir_log=0470972241120), legislation to improve the quality of life for people living with Sickle Cell Disease. And as a member of the Senate Appropriations Committee, I'm working with colleagues to channel more federal funding toward Sickle Cell research, so we can develop better therapies and, ultimately, find a cure. In September, I [held an event](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fvideos%2f1735519913489665&redir_log=204093398362398) with my colleagues Senator Cory Booker, Representative Barbara Lee, and Representative Danny Davis to officially introduce our [Sickle Cell Disease Treatment Centers Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-booker-lee-davis-introduce-bill-to-improve-access-to-care-for-americans-with-sickle-cell-disease&redir_log=037342846791118), legislation I authored to improve access to care for Americans living with Sickle Cell Disease. Our bill would create a "hub and spoke" model to extend the reach of existing Sickle Cell centers into areas that don't yet have good access to care. And that event also featured remarks from the President and CEO of the Sickle Cell Disease Association of America, the Director of the Comprehensive Sickle Cell Program at Children's National Hospital, and John Amara Walters' mother. Our legislation marks the next step forward in a long fight to provide Sickle Cell patients with the services they need, and I'm committed to moving it across the finish line.
### Preserving the Chesapeake Bay
The Chesapeake Bay is a natural wonder and a national treasure. The Bay also drives economic opportunity, provides an eye-opening lens into Maryland history and the story of America, and represents an essential part of our region's heritage and identity. We have a responsibility to be good stewards of our beloved Bay and celebrate all it has to offer. After years of work with our committed partners who treasure the Bay and its bounty, I was proud to announce a comprehensive proposal for a new Chesapeake National Recreation Area that will spotlight the Bay's unique story and historical significance, generate more prosperity for those who make their livelihood from the Bay, leverage more federal investment, increase conservation resources, and encourage greater public access to the Bay's beauty and cultural landmarks. I recently joined community stakeholders and government leaders in Annapolis for the rollout of the plan that Congressman John Sarbanes and I have developed. Together, we stood shoulder-to-shoulder with watermen, advocates, elected officials, and members of our Chesapeake National Recreation Area Working Group, who have been key partners in this endeavor. The release of our discussion draft provides an opportunity for public input to ensure everyone's voice can be heard as part of this undertaking. I encourage all Marylanders to [check out our plan and weigh in with your thoughts](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcnra&redir_log=13641486482262). We have a lot more hard work in front of us to get this plan across the finish line, and I want to make sure all of our stakeholders and communities have a seat at the table.
### Putting Consumers First
Millions of Americans - mostly those living paycheck-to-paycheck - are gouged by billions of dollars in overdraft fees by certain banks every year. We need to end this practice and also protect Americans from hidden "junk fees" that can quickly add up and overwhelm consumers - especially those who can least afford it. For starters, Americans deserve a banking system that works for them. That's why I've been fighting to advance a "real time payments system" - one where the money you deposit in your account is immediately available to make payments so folks don't have to turn to predatory payday lenders or get hit with overdraft fees. I've introduced the [Payments Modernization Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-warren-pressley-garcia-introduce-bill-to-provide-americans-immediate-access-to-money-in-their-bank-accounts&redir_log=732484777491200), legislation requiring banks to ensure deposits are accessible without any waiting period. This common-sense bill will help Americans better manage their finances by providing quicker access to their hard-earned money and reducing the risk of incurring costly overdraft charges. I've been pushing the Federal Reserve to establish a real time payments system for years. Now, leaders at the Fed have stated that a real time payments system, called FedNow, will be ready to deploy in the summer of 2023. We've made headway - but I won't let up until we get FedNow online. Last month, President Biden also announced steps to counter corporations and financial institutions that charge hidden "[junk fees](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1585428296715669507&redir_log=027332336073375)." This action by the President is a positive step that will help us protect more consumers and add much-needed transparency to our banking and financial systems. I've been pressing big banks to get rid of these fees for a long time, but there's still much more that needs to be done - and I'll continue working with the Biden Administration to do everything we can to lower costs for American families. On top of that action, I've joined colleagues in [calling on the FDA](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-warren-grassley-call-on-fda-to-finalize-rule-on-over-the-counter-hearing-aids-without-delay&redir_log=097831689161086) to allow the sale of over-the-counter hearing aids - and last month, the Biden Administration got it done. For millions of Americans, hearing loss is a major health challenge that comes with a big financial burden. But providing over-the-counter access to hearing aids means big cost savings. [This is another way we're working to make health care more affordable for all.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1582136562770288640%3fs%3d20%26t%3dIvdDvzz4Kx0maQTI9ur81w&redir_log=288646361564607) In addition, I've long pressed for legislation to make airlines more consumer-friendly, and I was glad to see the Department of Transportation take enforcement action to ensure that airlines provide passengers with $600 million in refunds due to canceled or significantly delayed flights - and to crack down on airline "junk fees."
### Building a Stronger Maryland, Together
It's always great to get out of Washington and spend time with people across our state. Over the past few weeks, I've met with so many Marylanders who are moving our state and nation forward - and I've been inspired by their perseverance, innovation, dedication, and good stewardship.

I joined my friend Senator Tammy Duckworth at [MCOP Prosthetics](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1579936403752091648%3fs%3d20%26t%3d-ahguBSWzNFokUVj9ViZHA&redir_log=800709804519605) in Silver Spring to meet with Ukrainian soldier Oleksandr Chaika, who is receiving care there after being wounded on the front lines of the war launched by Russia. I spoke with [Girl Scouts at Camp Woodlands](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fposts%2fpfbid0TUXoCvbf67MWvJ1LooQg4CwrV342Gk77VYsuj6P9kht3MJCMvYFwzTYrVWTnsM6Ml&redir_log=893168741632783) in Anne Arundel County after securing federal funds to help address seasons of wear and tear that have taken their toll on their historic grounds. I attended the [2022 Baltimore District Conference of the African Methodist Episcopal (AME) Church](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fposts%2fpfbid02UmFG7GFAZeeZkD9zHWdnZdXkbta57wxhiCGMM799BoHbRm6LKRx6AVuLudkxgAhgl&redir_log=892624981365793) to discuss how we can build a more perfect union, together, by lending a helping hand to those in need and strengthening our communities through action. And I've had the chance to meet dozens of Marylanders at a series of festivals, walk-a-thons, and celebrations, from the annual [Pigtown Main Street Festival](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fposts%2fpfbid06RzxR9KXU5czSxFnCJ2csc4RCNbvXTDoCsjtb2gfu1X6sRirNoaeZEQmMotrRi7bl&redir_log=22333967368798) - to the [World is Your Oyster Fest](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fposts%2fpfbid0uL6XvzWANK1C4PDsiuLb6yoSm7X2LuvGYyYntGdc1kRPMi5q4sHgWgPSqcqNXGnml&redir_log=33294914759795) with Maryland watermen - to charity walks with [Down syndrome](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1583904923124920320&redir_log=837095792654372) and [breast cancer advocates](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15542.39196154.5952349.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1583885715058089986&redir_log=65343070324375).

These experiences, and others, have affirmed my deep belief that we can make a difference through the power of community and partnership. And as we mark this season of Thanksgiving, I will be holding that belief close to my heart. We have so much to be grateful for this year, from family and friends to community champions fighting for change. I will be thinking about all the Marylanders who have joined me in the fight to build a more prosperous state and a more perfect union. I am grateful for your teamwork every single day.

It's in that spirit that I want to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving filled with light, hope, love, and joy.
Chris Van Hollen
