clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | | November 22, 2022 | ---|---|---|--- | | | On November 8th, over a million Marylanders made their voices heard at the ballot box. Our democracy depends on the participation of an engaged citizenry, and I thank the people of Maryland for your strong vote of confidence to continue representing you in the United States Senate. I'm proud of all we've achieved - especially over the past two years alongside the Biden-Harris Administration. But there's much more to do. I look forward to continuing to work on a wide range of issues important to our country, including building a more inclusive economy that works for everyone, not just those already at the top; advancing social and racial justice; protecting the right to vote and a woman's right to reproductive freedom; confronting the climate crisis; and so much more. We have our work cut out for us - but I am confident that we can succeed if we stand united. It's in that spirit that . Rebuilding Maryland's Infrastructure Last year, we passed an historic law to bring our infrastructure into the 21st century. Through this initiative, we are already delivering over $7 billion to Maryland over the next five years for everything from transit and heavy rail - to roads, bridges, and tunnels - to water and sewer systems - to broadband and electric vehicle charging stations - and more. Funds are already out the door and supporting projects in Maryland's communities, and I recently joined White House Infrastructure Coordinator Mitch Landrieu at Fort McHenry to announce a to dredge the channels that allow the Port of Baltimore to service large ships that import and export goods every day - and support thousands of good-paying jobs in Maryland. These funds enable the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers to use the dredged material from shipping channels to restore two severely-eroded islands in the Chesapeake Bay and preserve local wildlife by protecting their habitats. Those two islands also help buffer communities along the Bay coastline from storm surges and flooding. It's a win-win: strengthening commerce at the Port while restoring key ecosystems along the Bay. This is just one example of how the infrastructure law is bolstering our economy, protecting our environment, and moving Maryland forward. And this effort goes hand-in-hand with the Army Corps' important work to , with the help of NOAA and other federal partners. Fighting Back Against Sickle Cell Disease An estimated 100,000 Americans live with Sickle Cell Disease, a condition that mutates the shape of red blood cells and can lead to pain, seizure, infection, stroke, and even death. This illness exacts a daily toll on families across America - especially in Black communities. Last year, my office lost a beloved member of our team to Sickle Cell Disease: John Amara Walters, who died just a few months before his 30th birthday. John was a brilliant thinker and a generous friend, and he was deeply committed to serving the State of Maryland and the American people. Since John passed, I've been working with his mother - Kimberley Davis - colleagues in Congress, and advocates across the country to find ways to provide better care to Americans struggling with Sickle Cell and to advance our fight to defeat this disease. Over the past few months, I've introduced the , legislation to improve the quality of life for people living with Sickle Cell Disease. And as a member of the Senate Appropriations Committee, I'm working with colleagues to channel more federal funding toward Sickle Cell research, so we can develop better therapies and, ultimately, find a cure. In September, I with my colleagues Senator Cory Booker, Representative Barbara Lee, and Representative Danny Davis to officially introduce our , legislation I authored to improve access to care for Americans living with Sickle Cell Disease. Our bill would create a "hub and spoke" model to extend the reach of existing Sickle Cell centers into areas that don't yet have good access to care. And that event also featured remarks from the President and CEO of the Sickle Cell Disease Association of America, the Director of the Comprehensive Sickle Cell Program at Children's National Hospital, and John Amara Walters' mother. Our legislation marks the next step forward in a long fight to provide Sickle Cell patients with the services they need, and I'm committed to moving it across the finish line. Preserving the Chesapeake Bay The Chesapeake Bay is a natural wonder and a national treasure. The Bay also drives economic opportunity, provides an eye-opening lens into Maryland history and the story of America, and represents an essential part of our region's heritage and identity. We have a responsibility to be good stewards of our beloved Bay and celebrate all it has to offer. After years of work with our committed partners who treasure the Bay and its bounty, I was proud to announce a comprehensive proposal for a new Chesapeake National Recreation Area that will spotlight the Bay's unique story and historical significance, generate more prosperity for those who make their livelihood from the Bay, leverage more federal investment, increase conservation resources, and encourage greater public access to the Bay's beauty and cultural landmarks. I recently joined community stakeholders and government leaders in Annapolis for the rollout of the plan that Congressman John Sarbanes and I have developed. Together, we stood shoulder-to-shoulder with watermen, advocates, elected officials, and members of our Chesapeake National Recreation Area Working Group, who have been key partners in this endeavor. The release of our discussion draft provides an opportunity for public input to ensure everyone's voice can be heard as part of this undertaking. I encourage all Marylanders to . We have a lot more hard work in front of us to get this plan across the finish line, and I want to make sure all of our stakeholders and communities have a seat at the table. Putting Consumers First Millions of Americans - mostly those living paycheck-to-paycheck - are gouged by billions of dollars in overdraft fees by certain banks every year. We need to end this practice and also protect Americans from hidden "junk fees" that can quickly add up and overwhelm consumers - especially those who can least afford it. For starters, Americans deserve a banking system that works for them. That's why I've been fighting to advance a "real time payments system" - one where the money you deposit in your account is immediately available to make payments so folks don't have to turn to predatory payday lenders or get hit with overdraft fees. I've introduced the , legislation requiring banks to ensure deposits are accessible without any waiting period. This common-sense bill will help Americans better manage their finances by providing quicker access to their hard-earned money and reducing the risk of incurring costly overdraft charges. I've been pushing the Federal Reserve to establish a real time payments system for years. Now, leaders at the Fed have stated that a real time payments system, called FedNow, will be ready to deploy in the summer of 2023. We've made headway - but I won't let up until we get FedNow online. Last month, President Biden also announced steps to counter corporations and financial institutions that charge hidden "." This action by the President is a positive step that will help us protect more consumers and add much-needed transparency to our banking and financial systems. I've been pressing big banks to get rid of these fees for a long time, but there's still much more that needs to be done - and I'll continue working with the Biden Administration to do everything we can to lower costs for American families. On top of that action, I've joined colleagues in to allow the sale of over-the-counter hearing aids - and last month, the Biden Administration got it done. For millions of Americans, hearing loss is a major health challenge that comes with a big financial burden. But providing over-the-counter access to hearing aids means big cost savings. In addition, I've long pressed for legislation to make airlines more consumer-friendly, and I was glad to see the Department of Transportation take enforcement action to ensure that airlines provide passengers with $600 million in refunds due to canceled or significantly delayed flights - and to crack down on airline "junk fees." Building a Stronger Maryland, Together It's always great to get out of Washington and spend time with people across our state. Over the past few weeks, I've met with so many Marylanders who are moving our state and nation forward - and I've been inspired by their perseverance, innovation, dedication, and good stewardship. I joined my friend Senator Tammy Duckworth at in Silver Spring to meet with Ukrainian soldier Oleksandr Chaika, who is receiving care there after being wounded on the front lines of the war launched by Russia. I spoke with in Anne Arundel County after securing federal funds to help address seasons of wear and tear that have taken their toll on their historic grounds. I attended the to discuss how we can build a more perfect union, together, by lending a helping hand to those in need and strengthening our communities through action. And I've had the chance to meet dozens of Marylanders at a series of festivals, walk-a-thons, and celebrations, from the annual - to the with Maryland watermen - to charity walks with and . These experiences, and others, have affirmed my deep belief that we can make a difference through the power of community and partnership. And as we mark this season of Thanksgiving, I will be holding that belief close to my heart. We have so much to be grateful for this year, from family and friends to community champions fighting for change. I will be thinking about all the Marylanders who have joined me in the fight to build a more prosperous state and a more perfect union. I am grateful for your teamwork every single day. It's in that spirit that I want to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving filled with light, hope, love, and joy. Chris Van Hollen "Facebook" "Twitter" "Instagram" "YouTube" |

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Alexandria’s thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
“I would like to see a greater shift toward everyday small-dollar diverse sources of funding”
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221122-3640-header&t=1&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)
Alexandria has outlined where she wants the Democratic Party to head in the future, following Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s announcement that she will not seek a post in House leadership in the next Congress.
“I think overall, core principles are the same. I, of course, want to see our party move to greater independence from large corporate donors,” Alexandria told _The Independent_. “I would like to see a greater shift toward everyday, small-dollar, diverse sources of funding.”
**With your help, we’ve proven that a successful campaign can be powered by everyday people — not corporations — pitching in what they can from emails like this.**
**In order to demonstrate that this new model of governance — powered by the grassroots — works, we need to keep up our pace.**[Can you pitch in $3 to show that a new way of politics free from corporate money is possible?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221122.WwMpNg&refcode=em20221122-3640-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221122.WwMpNg&refcode=em20221122-3640-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)**
Alexandria has been very clear that ending corporate influence in our politics is essential to truly support working people. Our campaign has made it clear that you don’t have to put corporate lobbyists over people to legislate, fundraise, and win.
**It’s insulting to tell everyday people that they must suffer insane drug prices, no voting rights, and climate disasters for political convenience.**
Alexandria doesn’t spend hours calling corporate donors with deep pockets. Our fundraising numbers are proof to the old-guard in Washington that we do not have to prioritize corporate interests over real people in order to run campaigns _and win_.
With your help, Team AOC can keep growing our grassroots power and showing what’s possible when we build a campaign for and by everyday people.
[If you’re able, will you pitch in $3 or anything you can to grow our momentum and build our case for campaigns powered for and by people – not special interests?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221122.WwMpNg&refcode=em20221122-3640-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)
Together we can show that a new direction for the Democratic party free from corporate influence is possible.
We’re so grateful to all of you and hope you have a great week with lots of family and friends.
— Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221122?refcode=em20221122-3640-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&refcode2=3640_2526796_gcMJmL&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221122-3640-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=24&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=3640%2E2526796%2EgcMJmL)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Let's send Herschel Walker to the US Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Help support Herschel Walker!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

| | Team, I know you’ve probably heard the news, too: **The Republican Party officially recaptured the House majority.** This isn’t good news but I’m still as determined as ever to advocate for working Nevadans. [**I’ll tell you more about what this means for us moving forward but if you’re too busy right now, I’m asking you to chip in to help me keep up the fight in the House.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54979523/380261877/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221122_FR_GOPMAJORITY_B1_other_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTU2NWIxOS1jODZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qFbI_mO6Q356uFLqBsb8GfRly2m4PVVDBxk5f1wIIU=) | | | [Chip in >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54979524/380261878/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221122_FR_GOPMAJORITY_B1_other_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTU2NWIxOS1jODZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qFbI_mO6Q356uFLqBsb8GfRly2m4PVVDBxk5f1wIIU=)

Now that the GOP has control of the House, here’s what we should expect:
— **Some of the Party’s most radical figures will take leadership posts** and others will be assigned to important positions on committees. _Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, Matt Gaetz, the list goes on._
— The Republican Party’s slight majority is already causing tension between members of Congress who crave leadership positions. **Instead of representing their constituents, they’re already serving their own political gain.**
— After the Republicans sort out their infighting, **they’ll make sure to prioritize the far-right agenda that they promised on the campaign trail.** Blocking reproductive freedom, cutting Social Security and Medicare, and gutting the Affordable Care Act will all be options for the GOP.
The new Republican House majority hasn’t even been sworn in yet, but it’s already clear that these next two years will be challenging.
[**Please chip in however much you can to help me stand against the GOP’s attacks on our institutions. clean_body: | = | | Team, I know you’ve probably heard the news, too: The Republican Party officially recaptured the House majority. This isn’t good news but I’m still as determined as ever to advocate for working Nevadans. = | | | = Now that the GOP has control of the House, here’s what we should expect: — Some of the Party’s most radical figures will take leadership posts and others will be assigned to important positions on committees. Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, Matt Gaetz, the list goes on. — The Republican Party’s slight majority is already causing tension between members of Congress who crave leadership positions. Instead of representing their constituents, they’re already serving their own political gain. — After the Republicans sort out their infighting, they’ll make sure to prioritize the far-right agenda that they promised on the campaign trail. Blocking reproductive freedom, cutting Social Security and Medicare, and gutting the Affordable Care Act will all be options for the GOP. The new Republican House majority hasn’t even been sworn in yet, but it’s already clear that these next two years will be challenging. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Join our team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Keystone Progress Education Fund/Keystone Progress is growing and we are looking to expand our team.

We're hiring a full-time Communications and Development Coordinator, and w e'd also like community leaders to join our Board of Directors.

Are you a strong writer who is organized and cares deeply about justice and Pennsylvania progressive politics? You should apply for the role of Communications and Development Coordinator where you'd work to develop our messaging out into the community, help plan events, and maintain our social media platforms. In this fast-paced, dynamic role you'll work to inspire people to take action.

Think you're up for the job? Please email a resume, sample of a fundraising ask, and two sample social media posts to laura@keystoneprogress.org [laura@keystoneprogress.org] with the subject line: Comms and Dev position, (your name).

Are you a passionate progressive with a track record of board leadership who is committed to our mission? Apply to join one of our boards — Keystone Progress (KP)/Keystone Progress Education Fund (KPEF). Start by filling out this form [https://forms.gle/mcPXPTrLvoiRCtNHA] .

Here are detailed descriptions of the responsibilities, benefits, and qualifications needed for these roles: https://www.kpef.info/job-openings

Apply today!

Laura
Executive Director
Keystone Progress Education Fund

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112222kp2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=112222kp2]

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]
https://twitter.com/KPprogressforPA [https://twitter.com/KPprogressforPA]
https://www.instagram.com/keystoneprogress/ [https://www.instagram.com/keystoneprogress/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info [http://www.kpef.info/] . Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224
United States

name: Ted
subject: Thank you to our poll worker volunteers.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Together, with a strong, democracy, a better tomorrow is possible.
|
---

Team -- I can't begin to express my gratitude for the hard work poll workers put into the midterm election. One thing was evident in our volunteer recruitment process: Democracy was on the ballot.

During this election, our volunteers felt like everything was on the line. Months ago, election experts began to raise concerns about what they viewed as a significant danger to a smooth voting process in the fall: a lack of poll workers.

All On The Line responded by organizing volunteers to help with election administration by becoming poll workers in the months leading up to the election.

President Obama summarized how the role of poll workers was essential to fair elections and helped power volunteer sign up significantly: "Poll workers help make sure voters can cast their ballots and elections are administered freely and fairly."

Our partner, Power The Polls, highlighted areas with significant need for poll workers in states like Pennsylvania, Ohio, North Carolina, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Georgia throughout the recruiting process. We utilized that information to mobilize our supporters in those states, and the reaction from our volunteers was overwhelmingly positive.

Nearly 4,000 individuals joined our efforts as poll workers to strengthen our election infrastructure so that voters around the nation could participate in a fair election and vote for the candidate who best represented them.

Again, I am grateful to all volunteers who did not stand by and allow democracy to fail. We have the necessary tools to move our country forward. Our volunteers showed up time and time again. I hope that this shows all of us, together, with a strong democracy, a better tomorrow is possible.

In gratitude,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: ...this is WAR
body:
|
---
| | There's a full-blown war in America right now...

For our way of life.

For our individual liberties.

For the very survival of our Republic.

And as you probably know... Idaho is in the crosshairs.

Why?

Because we're a VERY conservative state... and the Left HATES us for it.

I mean it quite literally..._they HATE us._

Because we stand for LIFE, LIBERTY, and the pursuit of HAPPINESS.

We stand for traditional family values and freedom of religion.

And we're NOT okay with mentally ill cross-dressing men in lingerie DANCING for our kids (aka groomers).

It's not a "culture war."

It's a war for our survival.

So please if you can (you can) will you pray for our state and nation?

Will you pray for me and the entire Idaho state legislature as we go into our "organizational meeting" next week?

That's where we decide who will be in leadership (this is a BIG deal) and it's also where everyone receives their committee assignments (also a BIG deal).

Because depending on who lands where, things could go very well, stay the same, or get worse.

So please do pray for us.

_**We're ready to go to WAR...**_

And we need to prepare for this spiritually more than anything.

Can you hit reply and let me know if you'll commit to praying for me/us/my family from January through March? I crave that more than anything.

Stay frosty,

Brian

**P.S.** I have three bills I'm about ready to release to the public:
* **Bill #1:**
Gets rid of the grocery tax AND credit, plus increases tax rev share from 11.5% to 13%

* **Bill #2:**
Makes it illegal for CPS to consider child vaccination status as the basis for termination of parental rights

* **Bill #3:**
Prohibits state cooperation with federal COVID orders, etc.

There will be more bills I support and fight for too... these are just the ones on my shelf right now. I think they have a chance too... because the makeup of the statehouse shifted _very much to the right_ this election season, and we're committed to serving the people of Idaho, not "the state."

**P.P.S.** One thing I've been up to is getting to know some of my new colleagues. We recently went on a few trips to get to know each other and learn from other seasoned lawmakers about how to be EFFECTIVE at our jobs. It's been a fun learning time but more than anything, the team building and bonding are what will help us as we start this new journey.

So for the fun of it, [**here are a few pics from my recent trip to the east coast**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=2676833926&e=dea908e0fe "Click to see pics")

**P.P.P.S**. I've been informed by people who know things that there is ALREADY an effort to get me out... and I haven't even been sworn in yet! People are already raising money to run against me in 2024 (if I choose to run again, which I likely will, we'll see).

So... if you want to help me get ready for THAT fight, **[click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=ca9911884c&e=dea908e0fe "Get in the fight for our survival")**. NONE of your money goes to me or for my personal use. It's all for the fight ahead.

---
| | | | | | [](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=5863e3d392&e=dea908e0fe) | [Join me on Facebook](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=cbd078b8de&e=dea908e0fe)
---|---
| | [](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=396b450146&e=dea908e0fe) | [Join me on Twitter](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=8ee1642a78&e=dea908e0fe)
---|---
| | [](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=999a5daede&e=dea908e0fe) | [Visit my Website](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=41bd8ce730&e=dea908e0fe)
---|---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Brian Lenney for IdahoPO Box 3753Nampa, ID 83653-3753
[Add us to your address book](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=e50ed188df) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=e50ed188df).

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s all going to come down to turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932986:J5oq0yGPN:m:1:3373497171:0F877DEB67351691498C1BAD76623394:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932986:J5oq0yGPN:m:1:3373497171:0F877DEB67351691498C1BAD76623394:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932986:J5oq0yGPN:m:1:3373497171:0F877DEB67351691498C1BAD76623394:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932986:J5oq0yGPN:m:1:3373497171:0F877DEB67351691498C1BAD76623394:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932986:J5oq0yGPN:m:1:3373497171:0F877DEB67351691498C1BAD76623394:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932986:J5oq0yGPN:m:1:3373497171:0F877DEB67351691498C1BAD76623394:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61932986:J5oq0yGPN:m:1:3373497171:0F877DEB67351691498C1BAD76623394:r)

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on. Today's Goal: Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters. How we win: By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th. We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want. I sincerely hope you'll answer the call. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: These midterms are not the end of our fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Folks,

I didn't want to have to write this email. We have lost our hard won House majority and it's difficult to grapple with what that means for our democracy and our civil liberties.

However, as scary as it is, this is no time to give up. Democrats way out-performed expectations this year, putting up the best midterm performance for the President's party in 20 years . Republicans were expecting a far bigger win, but they didn't get it—because Americans are clearly not buying into their extremist agenda. So we need to keep up this fight.

It's time to start playing offense. We have too much on the line to continue playing nice with a party whose agenda threatens our livelihood.

Our fight for 2024 starts now. Two years of Kevin McCarthy’s leadership will do great damage to our democracy, but we cannot stop fighting for reproductive rights, racial justice, LGBTQ rights, and fair wages for every working family.

Today, we're pledging to never give up the fight for our vision of a functioning, productive, and progressive American democracy. If you're ready to continue the fight, you can chip in here >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E19515-20221122-ElectionResults-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

Thank you for all your support and hard work this cycle.
Onwards,
Eric

Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? Press here to sign up in just two clicks >> [http://go.txting.io/shfylh] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy.
DONATE TO ERIC >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sSRynqGvEUuAD1QP3hBpsA2?unsubscribedata=tWH1br9u1tsjD2tkOdMxvpjgeaSrlGOB8SyJWEtY2CZUBtWtdPnzFQGNaXZxfcYZX5UXdWUf3YqQ4jFk%2BWNY8ablP558t8F8e7DR0wFCiUVG29caw%2BAQpO%2B4XrPTfpe%2BwDphwaQOGOKXnVQRSiUARTfiOa4bpHPeL3zkDH7ZrqzYpoA%2FGrV6k2H2PHY7KUC3hNft0u481Egx0zARHcOz2Zxo8B8JKMtUMRqADOVKnvi9qhlLYL%2BL2eI0%2BT6Ef0nV6QGB4Y0jFGJr5%2FyFaLYx9hRDIumGuFPviVjuNLzrUqM9VCHrTx6lngaMA6%2F5dixI4b9ab6j8ttc%2BtR2VONc2kOljkCnTXkABVy4G650nl83Gqhs2Xx5vymkvRGpB5v%2FGKSBqvV2O%2B6ymPEXsC1eALPVzXCmskjofazJQ5X700yI%3D

**But now, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are spending MILLIONS to flip Senator Warnock’s seat in Georgia. Here’s what we’re up against:**

\-- Georgia Republicans have passed shameful restrictions on early voting for this runoff. \-- GOP ads are already blanketing the airwaves attacking Senator Warnock. \-- And even though our QUADRUPLE-IMPACT MATCH offer is active, **not enough Democrats in Pennsylvania are helping us fight back.**

This needs to be your top priority today because we are NOT on track to raise the funds required to defend our Senate majority and re-elect Senator Warnock in the _must-win_ Georgia runoff election.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Shaffer?=
subject: Thankful
body:
Dear Friends and Supporters, Thank you for your tremendous support throughout our race for U.S. Congress. We began this race nearly a year ago. It was | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/thankful?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Supporters,

Thank you for your tremendous support throughout our race for U.S. Congress. We began this race nearly a year ago. It was “all-in” for the entire Shaffer family. Stacey, the kids, and I all gave it 110% -- from sign waving at 7AM to attending countless community events, we worked tirelessly to reach every corner of the district for the past year. All of you, our volunteers and donors, also went above and beyond!

Together we did it all: handwriting tens of thousands of postcards and envelopes, making thousands of phone calls, putting up signs across the district, and giving generous contributions. I cannot adequately express my thanks to you. This was a true team effort, and we have much to be proud of. Our message of bringing people together to solve the big problems looming in our country resonated with voters across the political spectrum.

Unfortunately, the result fell short of our expectations and left us with the questions of why and what can we do differently in the future. Here is my quick attempt at an analysis. In Western Pennsylvania, we had a large blue wave that hit nearly every race either eroding our margins in Republican leaning areas or leading Democrats to victory everywhere else.

To illustrate this, here in the 17th Congressional District, our gubernatorial candidate lost by 26%, and Dr. Oz lost the vote in the 17th district by 14% to Fetterman. Through our collective efforts, our Congressional campaign was able to claw back 20% of Shapiro’s margin, but we still fell short by approximately 6% and lost 53%-47%.

Overall turnout was 64% across Beaver and Allegheny Counties. The Democrats were highly effective in organizing mail-in voting efforts which significantly aided all of their candidates. As the Pittsburgh Tribune-Review pointed out, our campaign won the 260,000 election-day votes by a 12% margin, but we lost the 95,000 mail-in votes by a 60% margin. Moving forward, Republicans in Pennsylvania will need to come up with a more effective approach to mail-in voting because it will not be going away with a new Democrat governor and a Democrat-controlled State House.

Together, we all poured our hearts and soul into this race and left nothing behind. The red wave we were expecting turned into a massive blue wave that overran even our best efforts. The result was obviously a great disappointment. I cherish the friendships made during the course of this campaign, and I hope to continue to grow those friendships as we work together to continue to have a positive impact in our communities.

As we approach Thanksgiving, I want to remind us all that despite the disappointment on election day, we still have much to be thankful for as I continue to believe that we live in the greatest country in the history of the world. The United States of America, the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, and our local communities are too important to give up on. There is too much at stake for current and future generations.

I encourage each of you to stay active and engaged. Your support is what kept me and our family going strong throughout this campaign season, and candidates in the upcoming local elections will need that same support and enthusiasm. Stacey and I will also continue to stay active in the fight to make our country, state, and local communities even better places.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Jeremy Shaffer

clean_body: Dear Friends and Supporters, Thank you for your tremendous support throughout our race for U.S. Congress. We began this race nearly a year ago. It was | | | | | | | Dear Friends and Supporters, Thank you for your tremendous support throughout our race for U.S. Congress. We began this race nearly a year ago. It was “all-in” for the entire Shaffer family. Stacey, the kids, and I all gave it 110% -- from sign waving at 7AM to attending countless community events, we worked tirelessly to reach every corner of the district for the past year. All of you, our volunteers and donors, also went above and beyond! Together we did it all: handwriting tens of thousands of postcards and envelopes, making thousands of phone calls, putting up signs across the district, and giving generous contributions. I cannot adequately express my thanks to you. This was a true team effort, and we have much to be proud of. Our message of bringing people together to solve the big problems looming in our country resonated with voters across the political spectrum. Unfortunately, the result fell short of our expectations and left us with the questions of why and what can we do differently in the future. Here is my quick attempt at an analysis. In Western Pennsylvania, we had a large blue wave that hit nearly every race either eroding our margins in Republican leaning areas or leading Democrats to victory everywhere else. To illustrate this, here in the 17th Congressional District, our gubernatorial candidate lost by 26%, and Dr. Oz lost the vote in the 17th district by 14% to Fetterman. Through our collective efforts, our Congressional campaign was able to claw back 20% of Shapiro’s margin, but we still fell short by approximately 6% and lost 53%-47%. Overall turnout was 64% across Beaver and Allegheny Counties. The Democrats were highly effective in organizing mail-in voting efforts which significantly aided all of their candidates. As the Pittsburgh Tribune-Review pointed out, our campaign won the 260,000 election-day votes by a 12% margin, but we lost the 95,000 mail-in votes by a 60% margin. Moving forward, Republicans in Pennsylvania will need to come up with a more effective approach to mail-in voting because it will not be going away with a new Democrat governor and a Democrat-controlled State House. Together, we all poured our hearts and soul into this race and left nothing behind. The red wave we were expecting turned into a massive blue wave that overran even our best efforts. The result was obviously a great disappointment. I cherish the friendships made during the course of this campaign, and I hope to continue to grow those friendships as we work together to continue to have a positive impact in our communities. As we approach Thanksgiving, I want to remind us all that despite the disappointment on election day, we still have much to be thankful for as I continue to believe that we live in the greatest country in the history of the world. The United States of America, the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, and our local communities are too important to give up on. There is too much at stake for current and future generations. I encourage each of you to stay active and engaged. Your support is what kept me and our family going strong throughout this campaign season, and candidates in the upcoming local elections will need that same support and enthusiasm. Stacey and I will also continue to stay active in the fight to make our country, state, and local communities even better places. Sincerely, | | Jeremy Shaffer | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Friends of Jeremy Shaffer, All rights reserved.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: He now has 900 campaign staff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933003:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933003:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933003:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933003:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933003:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933003:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933003:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933004:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933005:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933006:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61933007:6AgWRyG7N:m:1:3374012347:5C92BFCB5219D43F57D6B1D7D0DDA467:r)

**Press Contact:[press@emiliasykesforcongress.com](mailto:press@emiliasykesforcongress.com)**
---
|
# **Emilia Sykes Prepares to Open Congressional Office After Historic Victory**
#### _Congresswoman-Elect Sykes Eager to Deliver Results, Looks to Hire Staff For Upcoming Congressional Office _
---
| **AKRON, OH** — Congresswoman-Elect Emilia Sykes made history earlier this month on election day when the voters of Ohio’s 13th Congressional District elected her to serve in Congress, making her the first-ever woman to represent this district. Congresswoman-Elect Sykes spent the last week in Washington, D.C. at the U.S. Capitol preparing to take office.

“I can’t thank my community enough for entrusting me with the incredible responsibility of serving us in Congress,” **said Congresswoman-Elect Emilia Sykes**. “I’m eager to get to work as soon as possible so I can ensure Ohio’s 13th Congressional District has access to good-paying jobs, lower costs, quality and affordable education, and even safer communities. I know this work is going to require a team effort, and I’m looking for dedicated public servants who are willing to join me in working for this community.

Now more than ever, it’s critical our district has leaders who are working to strengthen our neighborhoods and are ready to devote their energy to fighting for what’s best for Ohio 13. I look forward to continuing to be that leader and to working alongside those ready to serve.”

The office of Congresswoman-Elect Sykes is currently accepting resumes for those who wish to work in either the Washington, D.C. or Northeast Ohio district office. Those interested in applying should send their resume to [OH13hiring@gmail.com](mailto:OH13hiring@gmail.com).
---
| **###**
Learn more about Emilia Sykes at [www.EmiliaSykesforCongress.com](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=3367009858&e=7730fa895a). Follow along for updates @[EmiliaSykesOH](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=c61dc6b413&e=7730fa895a) on Twitter and on Facebook at [Facebook.com/E](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=ec3e149602&e=7730fa895a)[miliaSykes](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=f1b16caf43&e=7730fa895a).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Final Stretch of 2022!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| [Join](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c852db5e18&e=d6c5c7d7ec) our DNC Native Caucus for a DNC Native American Heritage Month and Post-Election Wrap Up event **_TONIGHT_** at 6pm ET. We’ll hear from co-authors, Dr. Gabriel R. Sanchez and Dr. Raymond Foxworth, of the Brooking Institute article published last week, [Native Americans support Democrats over Republicans across House and Senate races](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e17242ca38&e=d6c5c7d7ec). They will provide us with their valuable insight into findings specific to Native American voters.

Earlier this month, DNC Chair Harrison and DNC Native Caucus Chair Clara Pratte issued a [joint statement](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ea7ca226f2&e=d6c5c7d7ec) on Native American Heritage Month recognizing that “Native American Heritage Month is also a time for celebrating the progress we’ve made and uplifting the hard work of those in the community.” We hope you will join us for this celebratory event
---
|
---
| How to Help in the Georgia Runoff Thanks to the work of countless volunteers in Georgia and across the country, we are on the verge of re-electing Reverend Warnock to the U.S. Senate. But we’re not there yet. In order to be successful on December 6th we need YOU to take action - knocking on doors and making phone calls, helping to organize communities across the state, and protecting the vote. There’s a place for everyone on Team Warnock and so many ways you can help.
---
|
---
| Important Voting Information **Now:** Make your plan to vote early **Nov 28:** Statewide start of Early Vote (select counties will start earlier) **Dec 2:** Last day of early vote **Dec 6:** Election Day Voters should make their plan to vote today at [www.IWillVote.com/GA](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c8bf44537d&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Questions? Text or call the GA Voter Protection Hotline at 8887305816. **Get Out The Vote ** Click [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=69f952f617&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to knock on doors and remind our supporters to vote in the runoff. If you’re not in Georgia, you can sign up to make the trip to talk to voters in person! Click [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4cb8344895&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to make phone calls to supporters in Georgia. [Sign up your group to voluntee](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2eab65dff7&e=d6c5c7d7ec)[r](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=eeae892116&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to make phone calls or travel to Georgia to knock on doors! [Donate now](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bceff9818d&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority!
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
* Meeting Communities Where They Are: Through both digital and print ads, the DNC was able to reach voters throughout the country on issues from abortion rights to community priorities. With great messengers like [Chris Paul](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=54ff6608d1&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [Kerry Washington](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ed529ad106&e=d6c5c7d7ec), we worked to make sure everyone understood that their rights were on the ballot.
* On-the-Ground Support: The DNC and Coalitions Team worked to support states with "boots on the ground" through early investments, from funding constituency-based directors in several different states to hosting a Campaign Readiness Project bootcamp, focused around recruiting, training, and placing in battleground states staff who are bi-lingual Spanish/English speakers.
* Translation: DNC’s Translation Assistance Program helped state parties translate voter registration and voter education materials into 28 languages.
* Community Engagement Grants: Thanks to the DNC’s Community Engagement Grant initiative, we were able to work with partner organizations and leaders in 12 states, providing community stakeholders and small grassroots organizations with resources to register, engage, and educate voters across the country. From events with drag queens to educating students on campuses, the DNC worked to make sure that folks on the ground had the resources that they needed!

---
|
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2022 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=d94e915928) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=d94e915928).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Candidate Spotlight: Ted Budd
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
| | Ted Budd’s hard work ethic goes back to his childhood growing up on a cattle and commercial chicken farm. Now, he will take that work ethic with him to the U.S. Senate.
---
|
---
| | As the congressman for North Carolina’s 13th Congressional District since 2017, Ted understands the importance of having strong conservative voices in office. That’s why he was proud to defend North Carolina’s Republican-held Senate seat in this year’s election. It was not an easy battle. He faced one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. His opponent, Cheri Beasley, put up a tough fight, but Ted Budd’s hard work, conservative values, and proven record of leadership won. Ted Budd will use his experience as a small business owner and farm kid to fight for creating more jobs and bringing down inflation. He’ll be a strong, conservative voice in the Senate. My very best,

---
---
Nikki Haley
---
|
---
[](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=3b4bbd5742e34a9b9f53265f5c77a48a&_e=bgVSg79uX4746tRxYtBftE7gHFvkLdh2l8eBqa3BCGwWU2Wl_VTVGxJ8unhwlIp06n-C1rNpGeBRQv4846ZF0W7tKlzQkI_px4QqbR2BiYzTQRhO397MFYjiQ7WScqtnqoFl5sLJ3MuzNKWtzHRWxbi5YLhpf9pn2Qq97ftmr1cyUDHPQhhUukYm6PXaOoTMGg2tFhFHQhzLAa34AVjHzroeNZKeh8kEIQNX-f3z65nV-cBO01QJwtNLSPEukBRFjPsNn7ZmUrsFTwLK0M957-iCtOBgrcS7HREnOMFS2VvLSqEWlH3vl6N9_orBsmetvq1zXKUAuppsS_MbrniKu0SvRxUR1RFj64KDx8OMVfE5IdQDfMfpOteg9Po_z6Kz)

clean_body: | | | Friend, | | Ted Budd’s hard work ethic goes back to his childhood growing up on a cattle and commercial chicken farm. Now, he will take that work ethic with him to the U.S. Senate. | | | As the congressman for North Carolina’s 13th Congressional District since 2017, Ted understands the importance of having strong conservative voices in office. That’s why he was proud to defend North Carolina’s Republican-held Senate seat in this year’s election. It was not an easy battle. He faced one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. His opponent, Cheri Beasley, put up a tough fight, but Ted Budd’s hard work, conservative values, and proven record of leadership won. Ted Budd will use his experience as a small business owner and farm kid to fight for creating more jobs and bringing down inflation. He’ll be a strong, conservative voice in the Senate. My very best, Nikki Haley | Special Message from Nikki Haley: I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms. This work is far from over. | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. Peter,

Speaker Newt Gingrich here with an urgent message on behalf of House Republicans:

**_This thing ain 't over!_** There are races yet to be called across the country and our Conservative candidates need your help to ensure victory.

---
With your immediate support, Republicans can direct resources to these close races.

Thanks to the hard work and extraordinary effort of House Republicans, we may see a Conservative resurgence in Washington like we had in 1994 after the Contract with America.

But we need your help to finish strong and win these close races, Peter.

**[Will you rush a 1300% matched donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61937769:JJMXgyGNk:m:1:3253819041:F8FA02EA30EC5B0478835C403C486A2E:r "Will you rush a 1300% matched donation today?")**

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: We’re on the edge
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [Learn How YOU Can Support Herschel Walker](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938020:6ZcUgyGNJ:m:1:3359512271:F136AD2C002B7A1B45C584155BD21A7D:r "Learn How
YOU Can Support Herschel Walker")
---
* * *

Senator Marsha Blackburn here. If I'm being honest, it pained me to write this email.

_**Everything hinges on Herschel Walker and the Georgia runoff. Republicans are on the brink of failure, and the situation couldn 't be more dire.

I'm worried this could be it for us.**_

If we lose Georgia, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority in the Senate, allowing them to pass every item on their wishlist. Packing the court, dismantling election integrity, codifying abortion on-demand, and more will all be on the table.

_**[We need Herschel Walker in the U.S. Senate to prevent this from happening, so please chip in just $25 to help flood his campaign with grassroots support!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938020:6ZcUgyGNJ:m:1:3359512271:F136AD2C002B7A1B45C584155BD21A7D:r "We need Herschel Walker in the U.S.
Senate to prevent this from happening, so please chip in just $5 to help flood his campaign with grassroots support!")**_

GRASSROOTS SUPPORT")

$5 FOR HERSCHEL WALKER")

_**[If you're willing, I need you to make an emergency contribution to replenish our Georgia Senate Runoff Fund. fuel the FINAL PHASE of this campaign, spread the conservative message, and save the future of America.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938020:6ZcUgyGNJ:m:1:3359512271:F136AD2C002B7A1B45C584155BD21A7D:r "If you’re willing, I need you to make an emergency contribution to replenish our Georgia Senate Runoff
Fund. fuel the FINAL PHASE of this campaign, spread the conservative message, and save the future of America.")**_

If we don't hear from you:

-> Democrats WILL pass Socialist legislation through Senate.

-> Our country will be DESTROYED by further economic recession.

-> Massive waves of illegal immigrants will SURGE across our Southern border.

-> The Supreme Court will be PACKED with liberal activists.

The list could go on and on. If we hear from you, we can win this race and stop the Democrats' Socialist agenda.

_**[Please make your emergency contribution to fuel our Georgia Senate Runoff Fund and save Patriot Herschel Walker!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938020:6ZcUgyGNJ:m:1:3359512271:F136AD2C002B7A1B45C584155BD21A7D:r "Please make your emergency contribution to fuel our Georgia Senate Runoff Fund and save Patriot Herschel
Walker!")**_

Thank you so much,

Senator Marsha Blackburn

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I am asking if you can make a donation to Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Georgia Inc
body:
[ stdin# ]One Georgia Leadership Committee

Derek,

First of all, thank you for everything
you’ve done to power our movement for One Georgia. Thank you for believing
in what we can achieve together. Thank you for fighting for a future for
Georgians where everyone has access to education, health care, housing and
a good living.

Each day, I think about the people I’ve met across Georgia. Like my family
and me, they wake up each day with a persistent belief that more is
possible.

Our work continues, so I’m going to ask if you can make a donation to Fair
Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund to help send my dear friend Reverend Raphael
Warnock back to the Senate. But before I get to that, I want to talk about
why this particular organization is such a meaningful destination for your
dollars at this pivotal moment.

I started Fair Fight after the 2018 election because I believe that every
eligible voter should be able to easily register to vote, cast their
ballot and have that ballot counted. Since then, Fair Fight has
successfully combatted voter suppression, made it possible for more people
to exercise their power and their voice at the ballot box and helped elect
pro-democracy champions like Senator Warnock to represent Georgia.

Now, Fair Fight is working day and night to re-elect Senator Warnock in
Georgia’s runoff election — and to ensure that Georgians can make their
voices heard and have their votes counted. Fair Fight was born for moments
like this, but their team needs our help.

Friend, will you make a donation of any amount to Fair Fight’s Georgia
Runoff Fund today? Help get out the vote to re-elect Senator Warnock, and
help protect the freedom to vote.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/6875?t=1002&akid=19123%2E1862389%2EfjoZkj ]chip in TODAY

I want to be very clear about the type of work your donation could
support, and why it would make such a difference in Senator Warnock’s
runoff election:

* Fair Fight is speaking directly to Georgians across the state with
phone calls, text messages, media outreach and organizing to get out
the vote for Senator Warnock — and their intentional, person-to-person
messaging played a leading role in winning Georgia’s last Senate
Runoffs.

* They stand out with their large-scale, culturally competent voter
education, mobilization in all of Georgia’s diverse communities —
inspiring, persuading and rallying the kind of multi-racial,
mutli-ethnic, multi-age coalition it takes to win in Georgia.

* And they mitigate the dissemination and proliferation of
disinformation while providing accessible voting information and
relevant civic education — making sure people have accurate
information about how to vote and where candidates stand on critical
issues, and also slowing the spread of elections-related
disinformation that can suppress and deter voters during critical
elections when their voices need to be heard.

In short, Fair Fight knows how to win Senate runoff elections in Georgia —
but it comes down to grassroots support from people like you.

Please make a donation if you can to support Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff
Fund and help re-elect Senator Warnock.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/6875?t=1003&akid=19123%2E1862389%2EfjoZkj ]chip in TODAY

Thank you,

Stacey

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/6875?t=1004&akid=19123%2E1862389%2EfjoZkj ]DONATE TO Fair fight

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| Paid for by One Georgia Inc. Approved by Abrams for Governor. |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+

One Georgia Inc.
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #345
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

We can accept unlimited funds from individuals or entities, including
LLCs, corporations, 501(c)4s, PACs and every type of labor union account.
Under Georgia law, all contributions to the One Georgia Leadership
Committee must be disclosed with the donor’s name, address, occupation,
and employer.

Contributions to One Georgia Inc. are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=19123%2E1862389%2EfjoZkj ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=19123%2E1862389%2EfjoZkj

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen
subject: Giving Green just gave us their highest endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
We’re one of the top five most effective climate groups in the country.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4381?t=2&akid=13123%2E53494%2Ed0Skhf) It's my honor to share this news with you, Friend: **For the second year in a row, Evergreen has been named one of the top five highest-impact climate organizations in the country.** Giving Green spends over 6,000 hours researching the best, most effective climate groups to donate to—and they've given us their highest endorsement again. [_**Chip in today to power our work, and know your donation is making the biggest possible difference in the fight against the climate crisis.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4381?t=3&akid=13123%2E53494%2Ed0Skhf) | [CHIP IN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4381?t=4&akid=13123%2E53494%2Ed0Skhf)
---
Giving Green endorsed us last year as we helped draft and win billions of climate investments. Even after that monumental achievement, we're _still_ at the top of Giving Green's evidence-based ranking of organizations poised to make an even greater climate impact. Here's why:
1. "Evergreen **successfully advocated** for many initiatives that were included in the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) such as clean energy tax credits, the green bank, and environmental justice block grants."
2. "Following the passage of the IRA, Evergreen is now planning to work on **bill implementation, state-level policy, and influencing the Biden Administration** and federal agencies to take further action on climate."
3. "We think Evergreen's nimble makeup, connections to governors' offices, and targeted focus on specific states could result in **big impacts in the years ahead.** "

Giving Green doesn't just recommend organizations doing good work. They only recommend high-impact groups that will actually put every single dollar you donate to good use.
**We can't afford to leave any climate opportunities on the table.[_Chip in today to power this critical work, and rest assured that your donation is going as far as possible in fighting the climate crisis._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4381?t=5&akid=13123%2E53494%2Ed0Skhf)**
[CHIP IN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4381?t=6&akid=13123%2E53494%2Ed0Skhf)
---
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13123%2E53494%2Ed0Skhf). | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
---

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: These numbers are disappointing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I’m checking in quickly because I wanted to share an update with you.
As one of Pramila’s most engaged supporters, I know you’ll share my concern that our fundraising numbers have been in rapid decline -- dipping far under levels we would expect. **It’s very disappointing, Peter, and if things don’t look up soon, we will have to make some tough calls.** See for yourself:
**Month** | **Amount**
---|---
October: | $41,062
November: | $23,427
**Difference:** | **–$17,635**
**Percentage:** | **57%**
**[Contribute $27](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23780?refcode=em20221122-1876&t=1&akid=1876%2E420207%2EnOE2Qp)**
We’re only **57%** of the way to the funds we’d raised by this time last month -- almost **$18,000** behind. That kind of money adds up quickly on a campaign of our size and influence, which is why I wrote to you as soon as I saw these numbers.
Looking ahead, we’re approaching the end of the year, and the funds we bring in now will inform the level of organizing and campaigning we can do in the new year. **For all of these reasons, I’m coming directly to you to make a personal appeal.**
[**Peter, I don’t reach out very often, but this is important. Will you please consider making a donation to support Pramila right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23780?refcode=em20221122-1876&t=2&akid=1876%2E420207%2EnOE2Qp)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23780?refcode=em20221122-1876&t=21&akid=1876%2E420207%2EnOE2Qp)**
One of the widely-known things about fundraising for a campaign in November (especially after an election!) is that numbers can start to drop off while people understandably prioritize other things. As the holidays come on, spending money on political causes is not an investment that seems as urgent.
But as the chair of our Progressive Caucus in Congress, Pramila’s work uplifts us all -- and helps to secure historic investments that will have ripple effects in our lives for years to come. **In other words, we’re worth the investment.**
[**Our grassroots donations add up quickly, which means yours will certainly help us get back on track. Can Pramila & I count on your donation today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23780?refcode=em20221122-1876&t=22&akid=1876%2E420207%2EnOE2Qp)
From the Congresswoman and our whole team, thank you.

Lauren Lalonde
Campaign Manager, Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221122-1876-footer&t=23&refcode2=1876_420207_nOE2Qp&akid=1876%2E420207%2EnOE2Qp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1876%2E420207%2EnOE2Qp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1876%2E420207%2EnOE2Qp)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Georgia is the second most expensive state to vote in, and fundraising has really dropped off this holiday week. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast. … It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state.
body:
Voting starts this Saturday
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81f12236-1ea2-49f5-b751-14abd61d7f8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between a Senator Warnock and a Senator (gulp...) Herschel Walker._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdaabd92f-c1da-4070-a42c-43777661afb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this time due to only 554 votes. 554. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right._** **_Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast.__ _** **_It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor._ **
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbc8fd9a-7028-49e2-babd-7ba16a68f637/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_In only six days--next Saturday--early voting in Georgia begins. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker? _** [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get Georgia Democrats to the polls to strengthen The Peach State and America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T344b6077-6428-44a8-86ec-cf7cc1683888/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy.**

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. clean_body: Voting starts this Saturday | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, | Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this time due to only 554 votes. 554. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right. Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast. It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor. | | | | | | | | | In only six days--next Saturday--early voting in Georgia begins. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker? We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy. name: Heather (VPP)
subject: Important update about the Georgia Senate runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need your help to expand our Senate Majority
| Hey, it's Heather from the Voter Protection Project.

We're launching ads to get youth voters to the polls on December 6th and secure victory for Sen. Warnock.

If Sen. Raphael Warnock wins the Georgia Senate runoff, Democrats will be able to protect voting rights, reproductive rights, and so much more. But we're a grassroots-funded organization, so we need your help to keep them live through Election Day. [**_Will you chip in $7 to help fund our ads, win this race, and expand our Senate majority?_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35445?t=6&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG) | | [HURRY: RUSH A $7 DONATION NOW TO FUND OUR PROVEN EFFECTIVE GEORGIA RUNOFF ADS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35445?t=7&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG)
---
**GOAL: $40,000 | DEADLINE: Friday @ Midnight**
Look, electing Raphael Warnock has never been so important:
* Election Day for the Georgia runoff is just 14 days away.
* Mitch McConnell is pouring in **MILLIONS** to flood the airwaves with attack ads.
* Raphael Warnock is **NECK-AND-NECK** with Hershel Walker in the polls.
* We're scrambling to raise $45,000 by midnight on Friday to make our next ad payment and secure _victory_ for Sen. Warnock.

[**_So we 're begging: Chip in (at least!) $7 to help fund our Georgia runoff ads and expand our Senate majority »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35445?t=8&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG)
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35446?t=9&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35447?t=10&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG)
