[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35449?t=12&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35445?t=13&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG)
14 days to go.

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5445%2E878179%2EAiLCRG)
---

subject: This grassroots team powered our midterm success, but the fight is not over. We need your support to cross the finish line in 14 days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Here are three key numbers you need to know in our fight to defend Georgia’s Senate seat and elect Democrats nationwide: | |
---
It’s official, Derek. Georgia is headed to a runoff election, and we need all hands on deck to power Sen. Warnock to victory. Here are three key numbers you need to know: **14 days.**
That's how long we have before the Dec. 6 runoff election to defend this seat. **7 million.**
That's the number of registered voters across Georgia that we need to reach with our people-powered message. **$10.**
That's how much we’re asking for to ramp up our voter mobilization efforts in this final stretch. **This grassroots team powered our midterm success, but the fight is not over. We need your support to cross the finish line in 14 days.[Will you split a donation of $10 or more between Sen. clean_body: Here are three key numbers you need to know in our fight to defend Georgia’s Senate seat and elect Democrats nationwide: | | It’s official, Derek. Georgia is headed to a runoff election, and we need all hands on deck to power Sen. Warnock to victory. Here are three key numbers you need to know: 14 days. That's how long we have before the Dec. 6 runoff election to defend this seat. 7 million. That's the number of registered voters across Georgia that we need to reach with our people-powered message. $10. That's how much we’re asking for to ramp up our voter mobilization efforts in this final stretch. This grassroots team powered our midterm success, but the fight is not over. We need your support to cross the finish line in 14 days. Derek, there is no question that your support will make a critical difference in a race this close. Thank you for all you do. The Democrats When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving these emails. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54977462/380239498/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTIyNDEwNi1iOTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4iFZ5j4uXWGX2g5YIcWnd-sd3TKk4_bqBf7RAD_1Yy8=&emci=4ce3b4a4-7a6a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=65224106-b96a-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. 's church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**

**_[Please, Peter, will you chip in $25 or more right now to split between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54977463/380239499/1583625711?refcode=20221122.5_RW_A35&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTIyNDEwNi1iOTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4iFZ5j4uXWGX2g5YIcWnd-sd3TKk4_bqBf7RAD_1Yy8=)_** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54977464/380239500/1583625711?refcode=20221122.5_RW_A35&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTIyNDEwNi1iOTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4iFZ5j4uXWGX2g5YIcWnd-sd3TKk4_bqBf7RAD_1Yy8=)
---
I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.

**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like _you_ with me to win – now more than ever.**

**_[So please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you split $25 or more between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54977465/380239501/1583625711?refcode=20221122.5_RW_A35&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTIyNDEwNi1iOTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4iFZ5j4uXWGX2g5YIcWnd-sd3TKk4_bqBf7RAD_1Yy8=)_**

Thank you,

Reverend Warnock

I'm releasing a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

My new book, **" Never Give An Inch,"** contains untold stories you don't want to miss.

**My negotiations with Kim Jong Un, the night we took out Qasem Soleimani, my work rescuing American hostages, and much, much more are _ALL_ detailed in my new book.**

clean_body: Keep the fight going Keep the fight going | It seems like the FAKE NEWS is doing everything in its power to stop our movement and suppress our voices. It is pure manipulation on their part. Arizonans deserve a full explanation for what happened on Election Day, and I won’t back down until they get it. It’s up to us to bring the fight straight to the fake news MSM. I cannot do this without your generous support. | Thank You, Kari Lake Candidate for Arizona Governor

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Victimhood is radical racism
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938051:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)

Hey Peter,

Who are the real racists in America?

The people trying to hold Black people accountable to lift themselves out of poverty through enterprise and hard work?

_**Or those telling Black people that they are forever victims and can't get ahead in life, so they need to depend on the government and rich liberals?**_

The answer? The latter group.

The media, academic institutions, and the radicals all treat Black people like they can't achieve anything on their own.

They're turning victimhood into a nationwide epidemic.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum. I co-founded BLEXIT with Candace Owens. Our mission is to change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities -- with a particular focus on Black Americans.

This month, one of our goals is to raise $50,000 to support our mission of uplifting Black and minority communities.

[_**Peter, can I count on you to stop modern racism? All you have to do is donate any amount today. Click here to join our mission >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938051:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)

This is deeply personal to me.

I served in the Tucson Police Department as a SWAT operator, field training officer, general instructor, and Public Information Officer.

I've patrolled the streets and interacted with these communities.

And I saw young men and women who believed they were hopeless because all they heard was, _" You're helpless," "You can't do that because of your skin color,"_ and _ "You won't achieve anything."_

But that's not true, and we're here to prove it!

**BLEXIT is doing things no other organization in the country is doing.** We work with communities that are often ignored and provide opportunities for leaders to step forward to make our country a better place.

We are empowering Black communities to abolish the mainstream narrative of the victimhood mentality.

[_**Can you help share the truth -- that these young men and women can achieve anything -- with a gift of $25, $35, or any amount? **__**Click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938051:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)

BLEXIT's programs give people the opportunity to shape their futures
and pursue the American Dream. All while championing our values of**faith, family, and freedom** to empower Black and urban communities.

It is our goal to lift up these urban communities.

Peter, I am personally asking you to help make this goal a reality.

Supporting BLEXIT means you're supporting your fellow Americans as they
change the narrative that's holding them back.

Can you send your urgent donation today to meet our fundraising goal?

[**Donate $25 >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938052:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)
[**Donate $35 >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938053:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)
[**Donate $50 >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938054:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)
[**Donate $100 >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938055:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)
[**Donate $250 >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938056:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)
[**Donate $500 >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938057:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)
[**Donate $1,000 >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938058:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)
[**Donate $2,500 >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938059:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)
[**Donate Any Amount >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61938051:6n0rNCGNE:m:1:3350876382:28160E031D5A81C170DC40CFBEFDE63D:r)

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

From: **Rev. ****Warnock**

**Friend, with early voting in our must-win runoff right around the corner, I needed to give you this time-sensitive update:**
* _**FIRST:**_ Election night results showed our people-powered campaign narrowly leading Herschel Walker – meaning we're primed to win.

* **_BUT THEN:_** National Republicans started _panicking_. Mitch McConnell's super PACs started launching nasty attack ads, and GOP donors flooded Walker's campaign with more than $37 million to defeat me.

* **_NOW:_** **We're running out of time to fight back against GOP attacks and mobilize the voters who will decide this race – but we're falling short of what we need to power our on-the-ground efforts.**

**So much is at stake. And if you know me, you know that I don't take a cent from corporate PACs. That's why I'm counting on you, friend, to chip in at this critical moment to help me fight back.**
**[Will you please rush $5 or more right now so we can defeat Walker, win this runoff, and expand the Senate majority for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54977945/380241396/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4459-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjIwMmY3Mi1iOTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x51pxRH5Y7rozHGQkjsXa1hzq1P0PO_VMLE9un36H04=)**

**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we’re in a runoff election against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That’s why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you’re with me, _[**please donate now to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54977950/380241401/-1468610671?refcode=jtk4459-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjIwMmY3Mi1iOTZhLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x51pxRH5Y7rozHGQkjsXa1hzq1P0PO_VMLE9un36H04=)_. name: DLCC Team
subject: We can’t fit every reason to support state Dems in this email – so we’ll start with 3:
body:
We can think of countless reasons to support our movement to elect state Democrats – but we can’t fit them all in an email. | | |
---
| | **We can think of countless reasons to support our movement to elect state Democrats – and while we can’t fit them all in this email (we tried!), we’ll start with three:**
1. **By chipping in _now,_ you’re helping us build a winning foundation for state Democrats** – supporting our work this early in the cycle is the _best way_ to set state Democrats up for success.
2. **Our work didn’t end on November 8th – we’re always in election mode!** As you read this, we're funding recounts that could decide control of the New Hampshire House. Plus, we already have a special election in Virginia coming up in just a few weeks, so we need to make sure we’re giving state Democrats the resources they need to secure victories.
3. **The DLCC is the _only_ official party committee dedicated to electing Democrats to state legislatures nationwide.** Our work covers _thousands_ of state legislative seats, and we’re relying on grassroots support to help state Democrats stay competitive in every state.
[Will you chip in $7 right now to give us the early investment we need to hit the ground running and set Democrats up for success in state legislative elections across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wIq45qgM0LGkgd86qa5aoDp-j1ZFUFhGdBoX3mIVs-OCTqbuUOY7nz-tGuEjbukfRZDo1wpCQI_Loq5V2PlhgQZaBnT3961Eqdr3Dxv4SKRSf_GH-502m2YE6mUWidBF6bWTwZDltaRxYw8gqgLiohllsJ0LhnT6FoFjSXDJt3SQas04GLxFOxZIcW2MwfA6-CPloMe_R8UeAeEev9Z-uBsG7J2kgmx3P5-NEyO-heYMz-GJDXH6i4V8UeN1WDWmTjsP7lP6dLkDd7BXGtzZCxHIqVZuXa1YelCxWl9i_4Kh-Jvd1JQCyM8SArlNrI1vVKbnthzKx9-loDR5TIIjzqGYEBWCFEsEB8tYqdwo22mzRqX_hpQiVvnLlHxQWMsiWeJkA1u2eMY0tN2h76TRPwmXXc2YEZFxkIZQYhffZzlf-j7lVXjxI6J5gUlP1ZNrhwXP_je2apR6P0QH7s4jZvQFCoyUT6-f6xyecgT31HNw/3rd/ku5XDqr6SbmauUxmA_81uQ/h0/Qa6Xs3QldFzXr2wc2sHCHoX9t2jhxt5jNHIl5bMZz2E) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: We can think of countless reasons to support our movement to elect state Democrats – but we can’t fit them all in an email. | | | | | We can think of countless reasons to support our movement to elect state Democrats – and while we can’t fit them all in this email (we tried!), we’ll start with three: 1. By chipping in now, you’re helping us build a winning foundation for state Democrats – supporting our work this early in the cycle is the best way to set state Democrats up for success. 2. Our work didn’t end on November 8th – we’re always in election mode! As you read this, we're funding recounts that could decide control of the New Hampshire House. Plus, we already have a special election in Virginia coming up in just a few weeks, so we need to make sure we’re giving state Democrats the resources they need to secure victories. 3. The DLCC is the only official party committee dedicated to electing Democrats to state legislatures nationwide. Our work covers thousands of state legislative seats, and we’re relying on grassroots support to help state Democrats stay competitive in every state. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie & AOC are raising the alarm about AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
serious.

BERNIE SANDERS: “This is a war for the future of the Democratic Party.”

AOC: “AIPAC is working for Republican control of Congress and further
destabilization of U.S. democracy.”

They’re right. Now that Summer Lee has overcome all of AIPAC’s hateful,
divisive attacks and secured her place in Congress, it’s time for us to
get really serious about this situation. We have had some historic wins,
but there is no doubt that AIPAC tried to weaken our movement along the
way.

They poured millions of dollars into attacks on progressive, working class
candidates of color. They sowed doubt and confusion. And they endorsed
hundreds of extremist Republicans who want to overturn elections. AIPAC is
a dangerous threat to the success of our progressive movement, to free and
fair elections, and even the future of our democracy.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121891?refcode=em20221122-26205&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26205%2E1203867%2EeVGJKe ]We need to start raising money now to fight back on our own terms,
which is why we’re coming to you: can you rush a donation right now so we
can build our own war chest?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121891?refcode=em20221122-26205&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26205%2E1203867%2EeVGJKe ]Contribute $3

Bernie Sanders and AOC are raising the alarm about AIPAC. Those of us who
are often attacked by corporate powers and the political establishment
recognize their tactics.

Not so long ago, the DCCC blacklisted any vendor who worked with a
progressive challenger to a Democratic incumbent. They soon found out they
couldn’t contain our movement, but they set a precedent. Now AIPAC is
using that same strategy to target any progressive who disagrees with
their far-right agenda.

AIPAC has shown they’re willing to do what it takes to destabilize our
elections and try to defeat our candidates. And (big surprise), the
Democratic establishment has shown that they are NOT willing to stand up
for progressives, even when control of Congress was on the line.

So we’re starting our own preparations immediately, to raise the money
we’ll need to fight back more next time. AIPAC showed their hand — and we
know they’ll be back with more millions to spend against us. So we’ll be
ready with more firepower of our own.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121891?refcode=em20221122-26205&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26205%2E1203867%2EeVGJKe ]The number one way we’ll raise those funds will be through supporters
like you,
Peter. We’re calling on you to
help because our movement and democracy are worth it — can you give
$3 right now?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26205%2E1203867%2EeVGJKe ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26205%2E1203867%2EeVGJKe ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221122-26205-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26205_1203867_eVGJKe&akid=26205%2E1203867%2EeVGJKe

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26205%2E1203867%2EeVGJKe

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: We will beat Obama. We will beat Warnock. We will save America! | Fellow American, It was just announced that former President Barack Obama is coming back to stump for Senator Raphael Warnock in Georgia's Senate runoff. Obama's visit on December 1st will create a lot of buzz and excitement with Democrat voters, so we need YOUR HELP to build our own momentum. We will beat Obama. We will beat Warnock. We will save America! But we cannot without your help. Thanks, Team Herschel P.S. Last time President Obama was in Georgia, he rallied 7,000 voters and got wall-to-wall tv coverage for Raphael Warnock in the final days of the General Election. Now he's looking to have a bigger impact in the runoff. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

* **Then:** Republicans attempted to **CUT crucial days of early voting.**
* **Now:** Democrats are fighting back with a MASSIVE voter mobilization drive to defend Sen. Warnock and fight for our Senate majority!

**We’re still $42,613 short of our must-hit midnight fundraising goal to rush vital support to Sen. Warnock and fight for a Democratic Senate for years to come. We’re counting on you to meet our goal -- so please:**
